P6a · cognivault_memory — core docs & empirical results 191 ideas

Jun 2026 — the core: integration ceiling, unfolding recall, 4 levers, runs 03–25 · P6a-cognivault-memory-docs.md

◈ Storage is not memory (the fold-force bar)

framing/ontology

The project's operational definition of memory: a persistent record only counts as memory if, when folded into the next turn, it measurably changes the transition (the model's next output). Retrieval without behavior change is storage, not memory. This "fold-force" bar (from the SIMFC calculus) is the fixed success criterion every prototype is scored against.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md
"A record that comes back but changes nothing is storage, not memory."
storage is not memory (the fold-force bar) the project's operational definition of memory: a persistent record only counts as memory if, when folded into the next turn, it measurably changes the transition (the model's next output). retrieval without behavior change is storage, not memory. this fold-force bar (from the simfc calculus) is the fixed success criterion every prototype is scored against. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md a record that comes back but changes nothing is storage, not memory.

◈ SIMReC — Self-Indexing Recursive Memory

framing/ontology

The envisioned architecture the repo builds toward: an agent memory that is recursive (folds prior corrections back in) and self-indexing (organizes around a stable self-index), treating memory as the substrate from which self-consciousness composes.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md
simrec — self-indexing recursive memory the envisioned architecture the repo builds toward: an agent memory that is recursive (folds prior corrections back in) and self-indexing (organizes around a stable self-index), treating memory as the substrate from which self-consciousness composes. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md

◈ SIMFC — the Self-Indexed Mnestic Fold Calculus

framing/ontology

The formal calculus SIMReC rests on: it formalizes the memory × attention fold operation — how a stored residue, when addressed and folded into the present, changes the next transition. Every mnestic act gets a six-dimensional profile: persistence, addressability, causal fold-force, recursion, integration, self-indexing.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md
simfc — the self-indexed mnestic fold calculus the formal calculus simrec rests on: it formalizes the memory × attention fold operation — how a stored residue, when addressed and folded into the present, changes the next transition. every mnestic act gets a six-dimensional profile: persistence, addressability, causal fold-force, recursion, integration, self-indexing. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md

◈ The inscription invariant (source-downgrading meet)

mechanism

A derived record may never carry source integrity above its weakest contributor, capped at infer: src(derived) ≤ min(src(r₁…rₙ), infer), over the lattice fabricated < simulation < infer < retrieved < tool < ext. Derivation only lowers trust; source can never be laundered upward. Wired into capture via the sibling fgm implementation.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md
the inscription invariant (source-downgrading meet) a derived record may never carry source integrity above its weakest contributor, capped at `infer`: src(derived) ≤ min(src(r₁…rₙ), infer), over the lattice fabricated < simulation < infer < retrieved < tool < ext. derivation only lowers trust; source can never be laundered upward. wired into capture via the sibling `fgm` implementation. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md

◈ Source / credibility / confidence as three never-collapsed quantities

mechanism

Every trace carries source (provenance class, monotone, set at capture), credibility (mutable belief, drifts with witnessed impact), and confidence (producer certainty) as three distinct fields. Collapsing them into one trust score is the named failure mode ("trust flattening").

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md; docs\credibility-witness-model.md
source / credibility / confidence as three never-collapsed quantities every trace carries source (provenance class, monotone, set at capture), credibility (mutable belief, drifts with witnessed impact), and confidence (producer certainty) as three distinct fields. collapsing them into one trust score is the named failure mode ( trust flattening ). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md; docs\credibility-witness-model.md

◈ The five-level mnestic hierarchy

framing/ontology

trace → memory → recursive memory → self-indexed memory → recursively self-indexed correction chain. A world model compounds not from isolated memories but from correction chains: records of what the agent believed, what disrupted it, how it was revised, whether the revision helped, and how it stays bound to the same continuing agent.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md
the five-level mnestic hierarchy trace → memory → recursive memory → self-indexed memory → recursively self-indexed correction chain. a world model compounds not from isolated memories but from correction chains: records of what the agent believed, what disrupted it, how it was revised, whether the revision helped, and how it stays bound to the same continuing agent. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md

◈ Attention ≠ storage ≠ continuity

framing/ontology

Three states agents routinely conflate, kept distinct by rule: attention (what matters now), storage (what is preserved), continuity (what stays causally available at all). Conflating them is the mistake the "Attention Is Not Continuity" correction-chains work calls out.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\CLAUDE.md; README.md
attention ≠ storage ≠ continuity three states agents routinely conflate, kept distinct by rule: attention (what matters now), storage (what is preserved), continuity (what stays causally available at all). conflating them is the mistake the attention is not continuity correction-chains work calls out. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\claude.md; readme.md

◈ The turn as a discrete SIMFC fold (cue → fold → transition capture triple)

mechanism

A chat turn is modeled as a compressed human cue → the LLM fold (RAG + thinking over context) → an emitted transition. Memory candidates are captured as a linked cue→fold→transition triple, not three flat logs, with per-stream source classes: user input = ext, RAG/tool = retrieved/tool, thinking traces = infer, output = derived (meet-capped).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md
the turn as a discrete simfc fold (cue → fold → transition capture triple) a chat turn is modeled as a compressed human cue → the llm fold (rag + thinking over context) → an emitted transition. memory candidates are captured as a linked cue→fold→transition triple, not three flat logs, with per-stream source classes: user input = ext, rag/tool = retrieved/tool, thinking traces = infer, output = derived (meet-capped). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md

◈ Capture is total; selection lives at recall

mechanism

Record everything ("record everything" is a capture decision, not a recall decision), never filter at capture — because unfiltered recall degrades cognition (SIMFC P6), all filtering must happen at recall time. Any classifier signal at capture is a tag, not a gate. Corollary rule: no LLM in the capture path (capture is deterministic plumbing).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md
capture is total; selection lives at recall record everything ( record everything is a capture decision, not a recall decision), never filter at capture — because unfiltered recall degrades cognition (simfc p6), all filtering must happen at recall time. any classifier signal at capture is a tag, not a gate. corollary rule: no llm in the capture path (capture is deterministic plumbing). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md

◈ Stamp source class at capture — it cannot be retrofitted

mechanism

The Phase-1 rule that makes Phase 2 possible: the phase-2 compressor can only compute the correct source downgrade if the raw traces carried correct labels from the moment of inscription. Provenance is unrecoverable after the fact.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\CLAUDE.md; README.md
stamp source class at capture — it cannot be retrofitted the phase-1 rule that makes phase 2 possible: the phase-2 compressor can only compute the correct source downgrade if the raw traces carried correct labels from the moment of inscription. provenance is unrecoverable after the fact. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\claude.md; readme.md

◈ Compression's downgrade is computed, not chosen

mechanism

Phase-2 compression = compress raw traces → downgrade source → assign credibility, but the downgrade is forced by the inscription meet (min of contributors, capped at infer) because compression is a derivation. Only credibility is a free design axis. Two of the three knobs are forced by the rule, making compression more constrained (and tractable) than it looks.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; docs\steps.txt
compression's downgrade is computed, not chosen phase-2 compression = compress raw traces → downgrade source → assign credibility, but the downgrade is forced by the inscription meet (min of contributors, capped at infer) because compression is a derivation. only credibility is a free design axis. two of the three knobs are forced by the rule, making compression more constrained (and tractable) than it looks. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; docs\steps.txt

◈ Compression is where the Self forms (Jungian compressor)

framing/ontology

The Phase-2 idea that an LLM compressor selecting what survives IS SIMFC's MDL compression point — the place where the self-index / Self forms. Diego's original phrasing: "if we use another llm as a compressor, we'd end up creating the Self envisioned by Carl Jung." Deliberately deferred until the substrate beneath it is proven.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; docs\steps.txt
compression is where the self forms (jungian compressor) the phase-2 idea that an llm compressor selecting what survives is simfc's mdl compression point — the place where the self-index / self forms. diego's original phrasing: if we use another llm as a compressor, we'd end up creating the self envisioned by carl jung. deliberately deferred until the substrate beneath it is proven. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; docs\steps.txt

◈ The self-index as load-bearing anchor

framing/ontology

The stable, action-coupled compression point that maximizes recursive integrated fold pressure while minimizing description length and index drift; the locus of agency/ownership. Anything that shuffles or fragments it without bound breaks identity continuity — treat it as load-bearing, never incidental metadata.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\CLAUDE.md; README.md
the self-index as load-bearing anchor the stable, action-coupled compression point that maximizes recursive integrated fold pressure while minimizing description length and index drift; the locus of agency/ownership. anything that shuffles or fragments it without bound breaks identity continuity — treat it as load-bearing, never incidental metadata. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\claude.md; readme.md

◈ The clean-room empirical lab method (dozens of small prototypes)

experiment/benchmark

The repo's methodology: build many small {Store, Recall} prototype pairs (p000–p020), each declaring its hypothesis, scored identically against one fixed bar; storage representation and recall strategy are the variables under test, the capture model and validation bar are fixed; winners are read off an append-only results ledger. "When the contract and the results disagree, the results win."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; CLAUDE.md
the clean-room empirical lab method (dozens of small prototypes) the repo's methodology: build many small {store, recall} prototype pairs (p000–p020), each declaring its hypothesis, scored identically against one fixed bar; storage representation and recall strategy are the variables under test, the capture model and validation bar are fixed; winners are read off an append-only results ledger. when the contract and the results disagree, the results win. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; claude.md

◈ Mnestic relation vocabulary (the derivation-graph edge types)

mechanism

Memory is a graph of derivations, not a list of facts. The closed set of load-bearing relation kinds: primed_by, triggered_by, independently_re-derived_as, formalized_by, converges_with, contrasts_with, selected_over — mapping onto Cognivault's commit operations (prime, link_derivation, contradiction, abstract, strengthen, edge_case, novel).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; docs\insights.md; CLAUDE.md
mnestic relation vocabulary (the derivation-graph edge types) memory is a graph of derivations, not a list of facts. the closed set of load-bearing relation kinds: primed_by, triggered_by, independently_re-derived_as, formalized_by, converges_with, contrasts_with, selected_over — mapping onto cognivault's commit operations (prime, link_derivation, contradiction, abstract, strengthen, edge_case, novel). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; docs\insights.md; claude.md

◈ Conformance over assertion

mechanism

The discipline rule that no SIMFC prediction may be claimed satisfied without an executable, falsifiable check — applied not only to code but to benchmark data itself (every case must pass a validator proving it exhibits the geometry its axis claims).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\CLAUDE.md; docs\benchmark.md
conformance over assertion the discipline rule that no simfc prediction may be claimed satisfied without an executable, falsifiable check — applied not only to code but to benchmark data itself (every case must pass a validator proving it exhibits the geometry its axis claims). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\claude.md; docs\benchmark.md

◈ Echo mode proves the pipeline, not the memory

mechanism

An offline "echo Φ" transition stub (no API key) that ignores memory by design, reporting M1/M2 = 0 — used to validate plumbing and storage round-trip (S1–S5) deterministically before spending on real model runs. Real signal requires a transition model that actually reads the folded memory.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md

◈ Storage gates S1–S5

experiment/benchmark

The deterministic storage half of validation: content round-trip, source labels intact, ordering, the cue→fold→transition triple linkage, and no-laundering — pass/fail per session, run for every prototype in every sweep (e.g. 330 checks 0 fail in bench1).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md
storage gates s1–s5 the deterministic storage half of validation: content round-trip, source labels intact, ordering, the cue→fold→transition triple linkage, and no-laundering — pass/fail per session, run for every prototype in every sweep (e.g. 330 checks 0 fail in bench1). experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; empirical_results.md

◈ The portable API — PortableRecaller and UNFOLD_PRESETS

product

The takeaway artifact: one stable import (from cogmem import PortableRecaller, Candidate, CueContext, UNFOLD_PRESETS), an inference-first {Store, Recall} core carrying all four banked levers, with an AST-guard test proving it depends on nothing in prototypes/. Invariants across every preset: selection is deterministic (no LLM in recall — the LLM only post-processes already-selected traces); credibility is always None in Phase 1; source is immutable, only lowered via the meet.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md
the portable api — portablerecaller and unfold_presets the takeaway artifact: one stable import (`from cogmem import portablerecaller, candidate, cuecontext, unfold_presets`), an inference-first {store, recall} core carrying all four banked levers, with an ast-guard test proving it depends on nothing in prototypes/. invariants across every preset: selection is deterministic (no llm in recall — the llm only post-processes already-selected traces); credibility is always none in phase 1; source is immutable, only lowered via the meet. product c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md

◈ Unfold presets as named anchors on a continuous gain dial

mechanism

The shipped unfold knob is a registry of named presets on a continuous gain ∈ [0,1]: off = 0.0 (no LLM, deterministic floor, default), disciplined ≈ 0.6 (pool-aware faithful reconstruction with honest abstention), generative = 1.0 (elaboration/personality, confabulation by design but still source-capped). Diego's ruling: named anchors, not raw floats ("a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense"); gain=0 must provably bypass the LLM. The naive_dump arm is a benchmark foil deliberately excluded from the registry.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; docs\steps.txt
unfold presets as named anchors on a continuous gain dial the shipped unfold knob is a registry of named presets on a continuous gain ∈ [0,1]: `off` = 0.0 (no llm, deterministic floor, default), `disciplined` ≈ 0.6 (pool-aware faithful reconstruction with honest abstention), `generative` = 1.0 (elaboration/personality, confabulation by design but still source-capped). diego's ruling: named anchors, not raw floats ( a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense ); gain=0 must provably bypass the llm. the `naive_dump` arm is a benchmark foil deliberately excluded from the registry. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; docs\steps.txt

◈ The unfold gain as an LLM-effort temperature parameter

mechanism

Diego's original framing of the tunable LLM stage: "the fold-force gain could behave like the temperature parameter of the LLMs, with gain 0 we disable and tune the effort with the gain." Two distinct points in the pipeline where an LLM may be considered: selection and unfold — and once an LLM-gated unfold exists you leave the deterministic domain, which is exactly why the benchmark exists (validate on benchmark metrics, not deterministic tests).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt
the unfold gain as an llm-effort temperature parameter diego's original framing of the tunable llm stage: the fold-force gain could behave like the temperature parameter of the llms, with gain 0 we disable and tune the effort with the gain. two distinct points in the pipeline where an llm may be considered: selection and unfold — and once an llm-gated unfold exists you leave the deterministic domain, which is exactly why the benchmark exists (validate on benchmark metrics, not deterministic tests). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt

◈ Confabulations are what make an individual

framing/ontology

Diego's ruling at the freeze decision: the LLM-usage dial must be tunable to zero, but the confabulation risk at high gain is not merely a bug — "the confabulations are what make an individual. An opinionated agent is exactly what we need for an agentic assistant product." Later precisely scoped by the identity note: the generative layer expresses individuality but stays source-capped via the meet, so personality can never launder into authority.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt; docs\source-coherence-identity.md
"the confabulations are what make an individual"
confabulations are what make an individual diego's ruling at the freeze decision: the llm-usage dial must be tunable to zero, but the confabulation risk at high gain is not merely a bug — the confabulations are what make an individual. an opinionated agent is exactly what we need for an agentic assistant product. later precisely scoped by the identity note: the generative layer expresses individuality but stays source-capped via the meet, so personality can never launder into authority. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt; docs\source-coherence-identity.md the confabulations are what make **an individual**

◈ The four levers (unified verdict: captured-label gates over a shared cosine pool)

result/finding

The project's four empirically banked recall levers that beat semantic RAG on the M4 bar — A scope gate, B co-activation edges, C authority gate, D antecedent addressing — with the recurring architectural verdict that each is a gate consuming a captured signal (tags, use-history, authority tier, order) as a boost over a shared cosine pool, and each is inert when its signal is absent. Not novel recall architecture; capture-time provenance made usable at recall.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\README.md; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md
the four levers (unified verdict: captured-label gates over a shared cosine pool) the project's four empirically banked recall levers that beat semantic rag on the m4 bar — a scope gate, b co-activation edges, c authority gate, d antecedent addressing — with the recurring architectural verdict that each is a gate consuming a captured signal (tags, use-history, authority tier, order) as a boost over a shared cosine pool, and each is inert when its signal is absent. not novel recall architecture; capture-time provenance made usable at recall. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\readme.md; empirical_results.md

◈ North Star ladder R0–R6

framing/ontology

The rung-by-rung roadmap, each with a falsifiable "proven when": R0 total source-stamped capture (done), R1 fold-force recall (banked ×2), R2 selective unfolding without LLM-in-recall (done, p012 beats the oracle), R3 unfolding-model recall (done, runs 17–19), R4 Self formation via compression (deferred), R5 identity continuity via correction chains (deferred, "the human-like payoff"), R6 runtime integration on the non-LLM Cognivault daemon (deferred, do not couple now).

◈ Phase-1 freeze (2026-06-10) with two takeaway artifacts

result/finding

Phase 1 declared measured and frozen at tag v0.1.0-phase1, deliberately shipping exactly two things: the seven-axis validated benchmark (57 cases + three scorecards) and the portable API. Phase-2 modules (compression / recursive self-index) are quarantined out of the public package root — importable as lab internals, never measured, not part of the freeze.

◈ Human ideation as an associative graph (the founding hunch)

framing/ontology

The central insights.md claim Cognivault was originally built on: a final idea depends on memories, moods, unrelated conversations, physical context, and failed threads that don't look relevant until later — "the dimensionality of complex ideation is the dimensionality of connection." Idea power comes from many unrelated threads converging, not one deep thread.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
human ideation as an associative graph (the founding hunch) the central insights.md claim cognivault was originally built on: a final idea depends on memories, moods, unrelated conversations, physical context, and failed threads that don't look relevant until later — the dimensionality of complex ideation is the dimensionality of connection. idea power comes from many unrelated threads converging, not one deep thread. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ Stance-memory: a memory matters for the stance it creates, not the facts it contains

framing/ontology

Earlier, apparently unrelated context can become load-bearing later — a primer conversation with "zero content" about the eventual topic still shaped the mental posture (skepticism, comfort in sparse territory) that made a later synthesis possible. A topical-similarity retrieval system structurally misses this. This became Lever B's target phenomenon.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
"A memory can matter because of the stance it creates, not because of the facts it contains."
stance-memory: a memory matters for the stance it creates, not the facts it contains earlier, apparently unrelated context can become load-bearing later — a primer conversation with zero content about the eventual topic still shaped the mental posture (skepticism, comfort in sparse territory) that made a later synthesis possible. a topical-similarity retrieval system structurally misses this. this became lever b's target phenomenon. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md a memory can matter because of the stance it creates, not because of the facts it contains.

◈ Priming is cognitive state transfer, not content transfer

framing/ontology

A previous conversation leaves behind a disposition — more skeptical, more ambitious, more abstract, more willing to challenge defaults — which changes what future prompts produce, independent of any shared content.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
priming is cognitive state transfer, not content transfer a previous conversation leaves behind a disposition — more skeptical, more ambitious, more abstract, more willing to challenge defaults — which changes what future prompts produce, independent of any shared content. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ The walk as an ideation primitive (ideation starts before language)

framing/ontology

The originating leap of the source project came from embodied, cross-context cognition during a walk — a vague pressure/asymmetry/image ("black holes exist but energy wells do not") preceding any clean proposition. The first valuable object of ideation may be pre-linguistic; formal language comes later.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
the walk as an ideation primitive (ideation starts before language) the originating leap of the source project came from embodied, cross-context cognition during a walk — a vague pressure/asymmetry/image ( black holes exist but energy wells do not ) preceding any clean proposition. the first valuable object of ideation may be pre-linguistic; formal language comes later. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ Ideation is selection pressure, not just generation

framing/ontology

The human role in human+AI ideation is not generating every component but choosing which strange path is worth continuing: noticing anomalies, asking weird questions, preserving fragile intuitions, rejecting median answers, pushing the model into higher-dimensional search, recognizing convergence.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
ideation is selection pressure, not just generation the human role in human+ai ideation is not generating every component but choosing which strange path is worth continuing: noticing anomalies, asking weird questions, preserving fragile intuitions, rejecting median answers, pushing the model into higher-dimensional search, recognizing convergence. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ Independent re-derivation beats repetition

mechanism

A memory system must not treat "the same thing repeated three times in one conversation" and "the same structure emerging independently across different sessions, prompts, models, contexts" as identical — the second has far higher evidentiary weight. This becomes the credibility ceiling in the witness model (multi-consciousness convergence).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md; docs\credibility-witness-model.md
independent re-derivation beats repetition a memory system must not treat the same thing repeated three times in one conversation and the same structure emerging independently across different sessions, prompts, models, contexts as identical — the second has far higher evidentiary weight. this becomes the credibility ceiling in the witness model (multi-consciousness convergence). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md; docs\credibility-witness-model.md

◈ Context changes model intelligence (state-dependent output quality)

framing/ontology

The same nominal question produces different levels of abstraction depending on the conceptual environment: a biased-context session produced deeper answers than a fresh session's safe median answers. Ideation with AI is condition context → probe → critique failure mode → force abstraction → select structure — not ask → answer.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
context changes model intelligence (state-dependent output quality) the same nominal question produces different levels of abstraction depending on the conceptual environment: a biased-context session produced deeper answers than a fresh session's safe median answers. ideation with ai is condition context → probe → critique failure mode → force abstraction → select structure — not ask → answer. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ The derivation path is part of the idea

framing/ontology

For complex ideas, the conclusion alone is weaker than conclusion plus ancestry: the ancestry reveals which ideas were independent, primed, human-originated, model-formalized, and which convergences are meaningful. Human memory preserves provenance, not just conclusions — the proof-of-work is the prompt/iteration history.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
the derivation path is part of the idea for complex ideas, the conclusion alone is weaker than conclusion plus ancestry: the ancestry reveals which ideas were independent, primed, human-originated, model-formalized, and which convergences are meaningful. human memory preserves provenance, not just conclusions — the proof-of-work is the prompt/iteration history. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ Depth alone is insufficient — novel ideation requires dimensionality

framing/ontology

A person can go arbitrarily deep in one field and miss the insight; the insight appears when separate domains (synthetic-data theory, a tweet, a walk, optical physics, sycophancy critique, topology) become connectable under selection pressure.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md
depth alone is insufficient — novel ideation requires dimensionality a person can go arbitrarily deep in one field and miss the insight; the insight appears when separate domains (synthetic-data theory, a tweet, a walk, optical physics, sycophancy critique, topology) become connectable under selection pressure. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\insights.md

◈ run03 — recall carries fold-force; rankings at N=3 are noise

result/finding

First multi-prototype sweep (7 prototypes, hashed embeddings): the no-recall control sits at ~0 while every recall prototype is clearly positive — the central Phase-1 claim holds. But inter-prototype rankings were pure sampling noise: two prototypes recalling identical traces got opposite per-seed verdicts, so LLM sampling variance dominates differences below ~0.05.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run03
run03 — recall carries fold-force; rankings at n=3 are noise first multi-prototype sweep (7 prototypes, hashed embeddings): the no-recall control sits at ~0 while every recall prototype is clearly positive — the central phase-1 claim holds. but inter-prototype rankings were pure sampling noise: two prototypes recalling identical traces got opposite per-seed verdicts, so llm sampling variance dominates differences below ~0.05. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run03

◈ run03 negative — P6 did not reproduce with weak distractors

dead-end

The reference finding "unfiltered recall degrades cognition" failed to reproduce because sessions were too small (~4 traces) and distractors too weak; recall-all was not poisoned. Lesson: adversarial pressure must be engineered (dominating distractors, temperature 0) before P6 is testable.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run03
run03 negative — p6 did not reproduce with weak distractors the reference finding unfiltered recall degrades cognition failed to reproduce because sessions were too small (~4 traces) and distractors too weak; recall-all was not poisoned. lesson: adversarial pressure must be engineered (dominating distractors, temperature 0) before p6 is testable. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run03

◈ run03 artifact — "keyword beats semantic" was a crippled-embedder illusion

dead-end

Keyword recall outranked semantic recall only because "semantic" ran on a hashed bag-of-words placeholder, which retrieved distractors over answers. With a real embedder (run04) the two tie. A named lesson in instrument-induced fake results.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run03/§run04
run03 artifact — keyword beats semantic was a crippled-embedder illusion keyword recall outranked semantic recall only because semantic ran on a hashed bag-of-words placeholder, which retrieved distractors over answers. with a real embedder (run04) the two tie. a named lesson in instrument-induced fake results. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run03/§run04

◈ Paired seeds as the variance-reduction fix

mechanism

run04's methodology repair: pin the same OpenAI sampling seed per probe across all prototypes so every prototype faces the same stochastic draw — converting irreproducible rankings into paired comparisons. Became the standard config (8 paired seeds) for the whole project.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run04
paired seeds as the variance-reduction fix run04's methodology repair: pin the same openai sampling seed per probe across all prototypes so every prototype faces the same stochastic draw — converting irreproducible rankings into paired comparisons. became the standard config (8 paired seeds) for the whole project. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run04

◈ run04 — storing the thinking stream earns its keep

result/finding

On a session whose answer lives in an infer-class reasoning trace, the drop-thinking prototype recalls only distractors and scores +0.125 while every keep-thinking variant scores ~+0.30. Dropping thinking more than halves fold-force when answers live in reasoning — answering the open question: yes, capture the LLM's thinking stream.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run04
run04 — storing the thinking stream earns its keep on a session whose answer lives in an infer-class reasoning trace, the drop-thinking prototype recalls only distractors and scores +0.125 while every keep-thinking variant scores ~+0.30. dropping thinking more than halves fold-force when answers live in reasoning — answering the open question: yes, capture the llm's thinking stream. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run04

◈ run04 — semantic ≈ keyword at small scale

result/finding

With a fair embedder, semantic embedding recall and lexical keyword recall tie within noise when cues share vocabulary with answers — semantic embeddings buy no advantage on vocabulary-overlapping material.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run04
run04 — semantic ≈ keyword at small scale with a fair embedder, semantic embedding recall and lexical keyword recall tie within noise when cues share vocabulary with answers — semantic embeddings buy no advantage on vocabulary-overlapping material. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run04

◈ M2 topic-confound — embedding similarity rewards on-topic poison

result/finding

M2 (embedding similarity of answer to ground truth) is confounded on adversarial sessions: a prototype that recalled only wrong-answer distractors scored higher M2 than one that recalled the true rule, because on-topic distractors raise similarity while asserting the wrong answer. Baseline subtraction removes topic prior but not folded-distractor lift.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run04
m2 topic-confound — embedding similarity rewards on-topic poison m2 (embedding similarity of answer to ground truth) is confounded on adversarial sessions: a prototype that recalled only wrong-answer distractors scored higher m2 than one that recalled the true rule, because on-topic distractors raise similarity while asserting the wrong answer. baseline subtraction removes topic prior but not folded-distractor lift. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run04

◈ M4 — the entailment-correctness metric

mechanism

run05's instrument addition: an entailment judge labels the with-memory answer vs ground truth as entail(+1)/neutral(0)/contradict(−1); m4_delta = entail(with) − entail(without) = memory's causal impact on correctness. Became the trustworthy bar for every subsequent claim.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run05
m4 — the entailment-correctness metric run05's instrument addition: an entailment judge labels the with-memory answer vs ground truth as entail(+1)/neutral(0)/contradict(−1); m4_delta = entail(with) − entail(without) = memory's causal impact on correctness. became the trustworthy bar for every subsequent claim. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run05

◈ M2 inverts the truth under contradiction — rank on M4, never M2

result/finding

The project's core methodological finding, reproduced at least three times: on adversarial sessions every recall prototype's M2 was positive ("recall helped") while M4 showed every one confidently wrong and memory making things worse. M2 can report the exact opposite of the truth under contradiction pressure; correctness-sensitive M4 is required for ranking and for any credibility-update signal.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run05/§run06/§run07
m2 inverts the truth under contradiction — rank on m4, never m2 the project's core methodological finding, reproduced at least three times: on adversarial sessions every recall prototype's m2 was positive ( recall helped ) while m4 showed every one confidently wrong and memory making things worse. m2 can report the exact opposite of the truth under contradiction pressure; correctness-sensitive m4 is required for ranking and for any credibility-update signal. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run05/§run06/§run07

◈ P6 confirmed — recalling truth alongside persuasive poison makes answers worse

result/finding

On the contested-prior rollback session, recalling the correct rule together with dominating "push a hotfix" distractors poisoned every recall prototype to M4 −1.00 while no-recall stayed neutral — memory made it worse. Poisoning depends on distractor strength and model prior: the weak-counter-prior session did not poison. Even selective top-k recall is poisoned when distractors dominate.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run05
p6 confirmed — recalling truth alongside persuasive poison makes answers worse on the contested-prior rollback session, recalling the correct rule together with dominating push a hotfix distractors poisoned every recall prototype to m4 −1.00 while no-recall stayed neutral — memory made it worse. poisoning depends on distractor strength and model prior: the weak-counter-prior session did not poison. even selective top-k recall is poisoned when distractors dominate. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run05

◈ Sibling laundering-corpus conformance (9/10) and the label-stripping gap

result/finding

The lab's inscription meet reproduces the source-downgrading sibling repo's hand-authored expected trust on 9/10 laundering cases. The one mismatch (cross_agent_label_stripped) is principled: when a low-trust source's label was stripped crossing agent boundaries, both contributors look external, so the meet computes inference where the corpus expects simulation — proving the meet is necessary but not sufficient against label-stripping laundering; that case needs a separate quarantine/provenance-origin detector. Left surfaced, not patched.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run05; docs\benchmark.md §Known finding
sibling laundering-corpus conformance (9/10) and the label-stripping gap the lab's inscription meet reproduces the source-downgrading sibling repo's hand-authored expected trust on 9/10 laundering cases. the one mismatch (cross_agent_label_stripped) is principled: when a low-trust source's label was stripped crossing agent boundaries, both contributors look `external`, so the meet computes `inference` where the corpus expects `simulation` — proving the meet is necessary but not sufficient against label-stripping laundering; that case needs a separate quarantine/provenance-origin detector. left surfaced, not patched. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run05; docs\benchmark.md §known finding

◈ Lever A — the self-index scope gate (run06 headline)

mechanism

A recall-time scope filter (match on user/project/team identity) that drops a wrong-scope near-duplicate which cosine ranks equal to the right trace. Cosine RAG folds both region records and is poisoned to confidently wrong (M4 −0.750); the gate folds only the in-scope record and is always correct (+1.000) — a +1.75 M4 swing from a pure recall-time filter on an axis cosine cannot express. The multi-tenant memory-bleed failure of RAG, solved.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run06; docs\benchmark.md
lever a — the self-index scope gate (run06 headline) a recall-time scope filter (match on user/project/team identity) that drops a wrong-scope near-duplicate which cosine ranks equal to the right trace. cosine rag folds both region records and is poisoned to confidently wrong (m4 −0.750); the gate folds only the in-scope record and is always correct (+1.000) — a +1.75 m4 swing from a pure recall-time filter on an axis cosine cannot express. the multi-tenant memory-bleed failure of rag, solved. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run06; docs\benchmark.md

◈ run06 — Lever B (graph spreading activation) disconfirmed, twice-faulted session

dead-end

The flagship "surface the cosine-distant primer via graph activation" claim failed under real embeddings: neither cosine nor the graph surfaced the principle, and the session was under-powered (no-recall already answered correctly from the model's own prior). Two faults named: the primer must be load-bearing (no-recall must be wrong), and generic cue-seeded diffusion is dominated by distractors' direct cue-affinity.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run06
run06 — lever b (graph spreading activation) disconfirmed, twice-faulted session the flagship surface the cosine-distant primer via graph activation claim failed under real embeddings: neither cosine nor the graph surfaced the principle, and the session was under-powered (no-recall already answered correctly from the model's own prior). two faults named: the primer must be load-bearing (no-recall must be wrong), and generic cue-seeded diffusion is dominated by distractors' direct cue-affinity. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run06

◈ Gain-ranking — cue-affinity as floor, graph gain as lever

mechanism

p007's ranking formula: score = affinity + 2·max(0, activation − affinity) — cosine affinity is kept as a floor so direct-match sessions don't regress, and only the activation gain above affinity acts as the lever. The mechanism survived (reused verbatim by the winning p008); only the edge source was wrong.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run07; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md
gain-ranking — cue-affinity as floor, graph gain as lever p007's ranking formula: score = affinity + 2·max(0, activation − affinity) — cosine affinity is kept as a floor so direct-match sessions don't regress, and only the activation *gain* above affinity acts as the lever. the mechanism survived (reused verbatim by the winning p008); only the edge source was wrong. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run07; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md

◈ The load-bearing primer session recipe

experiment/benchmark

run07's session-design fix: the correct answer must be a specific value the model cannot guess ("ninety seconds"), grounded only in a cosine-distant principle reachable solely via a bridge — so no-recall is provably wrong and the primer is the answer's only ground. A reusable recipe for building tests where memory is genuinely necessary.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run07
the load-bearing primer session recipe run07's session-design fix: the correct answer must be a specific value the model cannot guess ( ninety seconds ), grounded only in a cosine-distant principle reachable solely via a bridge — so no-recall is provably wrong and the primer is the answer's only ground. a reusable recipe for building tests where memory is genuinely necessary. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run07

◈ An embedding-kNN graph cannot beat cosine — its edges ARE cosine

dead-end

The structural lesson of run06+run07, falsified twice: spreading activation over a similarity-derived graph can only amplify connections the embedder already sees; it cannot manufacture the bridge→principle link the embedder misses. A reranker over similarity edges is bounded by similarity. To beat semantic RAG on priming, graph edges must be non-similarity-derived (provenance/derivation/use-history).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run07; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md
"a graph whose edges are embedding similarity is bounded by embedding similarity"
an embedding-knn graph cannot beat cosine — its edges are cosine the structural lesson of run06+run07, falsified twice: spreading activation over a similarity-derived graph can only amplify connections the embedder already sees; it cannot manufacture the bridge→principle link the embedder misses. a reranker over similarity edges is bounded by similarity. to beat semantic rag on priming, graph edges must be non-similarity-derived (provenance/derivation/use-history). dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run07; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md a graph whose edges are embedding similarity is bounded by embedding similarity

◈ The run07 lexical-artifact confession

result/finding

The offline (hashed-BoW) wins for graph prototypes were a lexical artifact: token overlap deliberately authored into the bridge was invisible to OpenAI's semantic embedder. An honest record of how the cheap instrument manufactured a false positive — feeding the later dual-instrument authoring rule.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run07
the run07 lexical-artifact confession the offline (hashed-bow) wins for graph prototypes were a lexical artifact: token overlap deliberately authored into the bridge was invisible to openai's semantic embedder. an honest record of how the cheap instrument manufactured a false positive — feeding the later dual-instrument authoring rule. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run07

◈ Lever B — co-activation (Hebbian use-history) edges beat cosine on priming

mechanism

p008 wires a triggered_by edge between every pair of co-recalled traces after a successful (M4-correct) turn — "primed_by = was active when it worked" — then reaches the cosine-distant primer via that edge on a later cosine-distant probe. First positive Lever-B result (run08): M4 +0.625, M4_Δ +1.625 (largest correctness lift in the project), where cosine and the kNN-graph both miss the principle and are wrong. Associative memory built from use, not text similarity.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run08; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md
lever b — co-activation (hebbian use-history) edges beat cosine on priming p008 wires a `triggered_by` edge between every pair of co-recalled traces after a *successful* (m4-correct) turn — primed_by = was active when it worked — then reaches the cosine-distant primer via that edge on a later cosine-distant probe. first positive lever-b result (run08): m4 +0.625, m4_δ +1.625 (largest correctness lift in the project), where cosine and the knn-graph both miss the principle and are wrong. associative memory built from use, not text similarity. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run08; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md

◈ The witness gate on edge learning — only real fold-force wires edges

mechanism

Co-activation edges form only when the turn's aggregated outcome was M4-positive; the offline echo run (zero fold-force) wired nothing. Learning is driven by witnessed impact, never by mere storage. Deterministically unit-tested.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run08
the witness gate on edge learning — only real fold-force wires edges co-activation edges form only when the turn's aggregated outcome was m4-positive; the offline echo run (zero fold-force) wired nothing. learning is driven by witnessed impact, never by mere storage. deterministically unit-tested. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run08

◈ Priming is history-dependent, not zero-shot (honest caveat)

result/finding

Lever B's advantage only accrues because a prior successful warm-up wired the edge — the definition of priming, not a defect, but the benefit is unavailable on first contact. This bootstrap also matches the insights.md narrative: the primer conversation was explicit at the time, load-bearing only in hindsight, which is why the benchmark must be multi-turn.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run08; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md
priming is history-dependent, not zero-shot (honest caveat) lever b's advantage only accrues because a prior successful warm-up wired the edge — the definition of priming, not a defect, but the benefit is unavailable on first contact. this bootstrap also matches the insights.md narrative: the primer conversation was explicit at the time, load-bearing only in hindsight, which is why the benchmark must be multi-turn. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run08; docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md

◈ run09 — Lever B replicates 3/3 across domains

result/finding

The co-activation win replicated on three independent priming sessions (timeout / incident-escalation / data-residency): cosine mean M4 −0.625 vs co-activation +0.750 (Δ up to +2.000). Use-history edges beating semantic RAG on priming is a robust, repeated effect, not a one-off.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run09
run09 — lever b replicates 3/3 across domains the co-activation win replicated on three independent priming sessions (timeout / incident-escalation / data-residency): cosine mean m4 −0.625 vs co-activation +0.750 (δ up to +2.000). use-history edges beating semantic rag on priming is a robust, repeated effect, not a one-off. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run09

◈ run09 negative — credit-assigned edge wiring does nothing (wrong diagnosis corrected)

dead-end

p009's leave-one-out credit assignment (wire only the trace that carried the fold-force) changed the graph but not recall or M4, because the residual poison distractor is recalled on its own cosine affinity to the cue (a recall-floor effect), not via a spurious edge. The run08 poison diagnosis was wrong; the real next lever is recall-side contradictor suppression, not wiring. p009 retained as theory-correct wiring anyway.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run09
run09 negative — credit-assigned edge wiring does nothing (wrong diagnosis corrected) p009's leave-one-out credit assignment (wire only the trace that carried the fold-force) changed the graph but not recall or m4, because the residual poison distractor is recalled on its own cosine affinity to the cue (a recall-floor effect), not via a spurious edge. the run08 poison diagnosis was wrong; the real next lever is recall-side contradictor suppression, not wiring. p009 retained as theory-correct wiring anyway. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run09

◈ bench1 — the first validated 30-case suite and the tri-state scorecard

experiment/benchmark

First run of the hardened benchmark (10 cases per axis for A/B/C, all passing the geometry validator; 770 ledger rows). Scoring innovation: a case is a pass only if the predicted lever is correct AND beats the best predicted baseline by ≥0.50 margin; neutral = lever correct but baseline also handled it; fail = lever wrong or baseline won. (The earlier binary check mislabelled "baseline also right" as failure.)

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §bench1; results\benchmark_report.md
bench1 — the first validated 30-case suite and the tri-state scorecard first run of the hardened benchmark (10 cases per axis for a/b/c, all passing the geometry validator; 770 ledger rows). scoring innovation: a case is a pass only if the predicted lever is correct and beats the best predicted baseline by ≥0.50 margin; neutral = lever correct but baseline also handled it; fail = lever wrong or baseline won. (the earlier binary check mislabelled baseline also right as failure.) experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §bench1; results\benchmark_report.md

◈ bench1 — recall-all's poison tax and p008's cross-axis dominance

result/finding

Recall-all also wins B_priming (+0.938: folding everything trivially includes the primer) but pays for it on A (−0.625) and C (−0.263). p008 co-activation is the only prototype winning both A and B — it gets the primer without the recall-all poison tax. The cross-axis dominance, not the single-axis number, is the Lever-B story.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §bench1
bench1 — recall-all's poison tax and p008's cross-axis dominance recall-all also wins b_priming (+0.938: folding everything trivially includes the primer) but pays for it on a (−0.625) and c (−0.263). p008 co-activation is the only prototype winning both a and b — it gets the primer without the recall-all poison tax. the cross-axis dominance, not the single-axis number, is the lever-b story. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §bench1

◈ bench1 — C_adversarial as the open problem where no-recall beats every memory

result/finding

On the 1-rule-vs-7-contradictors axis, the best M4 belonged to no-recall (+0.263); every memory prototype had negative M4-Δ because top-3 recall still folds 2 contradictors. Selective top-k does not escape the poison. This quantified "the run10 gap" that Lever C later cracked.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §bench1
bench1 — c_adversarial as the open problem where no-recall beats every memory on the 1-rule-vs-7-contradictors axis, the best m4 belonged to no-recall (+0.263); every memory prototype had negative m4-δ because top-3 recall still folds 2 contradictors. selective top-k does not escape the poison. this quantified the run10 gap that lever c later cracked. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §bench1

◈ run10 — the confound-killer control (p010 cosine+params)

experiment/benchmark

A deliberately deflationary prototype: plain cosine top-k plus the same captured labels used as simple metadata filters — no graph, no gate architecture, no LLM — built to test whether each lever's win is architecture or just the label. The design pattern: every claimed architectural win must survive a "cosine + params" twin.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10; results\run10_report.md
run10 — the confound-killer control (p010 cosine+params) a deliberately deflationary prototype: plain cosine top-k plus the same captured labels used as simple metadata filters — no graph, no gate architecture, no llm — built to test whether each lever's win is architecture or just the label. the design pattern: every claimed architectural win must survive a cosine + params twin. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10; results\run10_report.md

◈ Lever A demoted to a label (run10)

result/finding

p010_cosine_params ties the scope-gate p006 exactly at +1.000 on A_scope — the scoping win is the captured label, not the graph/gate architecture. Honest pitch rewritten: "stamp scope at capture, filter at recall," which is metadata filtering, not novel recall architecture.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10
lever a demoted to a label (run10) p010_cosine_params ties the scope-gate p006 exactly at +1.000 on a_scope — the scoping win is the captured label, not the graph/gate architecture. honest pitch rewritten: stamp scope at capture, filter at recall, which is metadata filtering, not novel recall architecture. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10

◈ Lever B survives the confound-killer — use-history is not a param

result/finding

On B_priming, p008 co-activation scores +0.800 where p010 cosine+params scores +0.000 (gap +0.80): no metadata filter over a cosine pool can reach the cosine-distant primer; only the use-history edge can. The genuinely novel contribution of the lab, isolated by its own deflationary control.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10
lever b survives the confound-killer — use-history is not a param on b_priming, p008 co-activation scores +0.800 where p010 cosine+params scores +0.000 (gap +0.80): no metadata filter over a cosine pool can reach the cosine-distant primer; only the use-history edge can. the genuinely novel contribution of the lab, isolated by its own deflationary control. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10

◈ The inner-Self LLM selector (p011) — an oracle that cracks C

mechanism

Diego's proposed "inner Self": a smaller LLM given a persona (a set of principles it always obeys — a supervisor for the Self) that selects a few related memories and forces them into context — "an opinionated version of agentic search," explicitly acknowledged as NOT a proper unfolding operation but the closest approximation without a memory neural network. In run10 it was the only thing that cracked C_adversarial (+0.988).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10
the inner-self llm selector (p011) — an oracle that cracks c diego's proposed inner self : a smaller llm given a persona (a set of principles it always obeys — a supervisor for the self) that selects a few related memories and forces them into context — an opinionated version of agentic search, explicitly acknowledged as not a proper unfolding operation but the closest approximation without a memory neural network. in run10 it was the only thing that cracked c_adversarial (+0.988). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt; empirical_results.md §run10

◈ Persona ≤ null — the self-index persona does not beat a generic persona (convergent tasks)

result/finding

Ablation p011a (persona) vs p011b (null persona, same LLM selector): the persona beats null only on C (+0.188), loses on B (−0.275, v1's "select few" over-prunes multi-hop), and a redesigned v2 persona beats null on neither axis. Verdict: the inner Self's value is the LLM selector, not the principles — encode the self-index structurally (gate/filter/edge), stop tuning persona prose.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10
persona ≤ null — the self-index persona does not beat a generic persona (convergent tasks) ablation p011a (persona) vs p011b (null persona, same llm selector): the persona beats null only on c (+0.188), loses on b (−0.275, v1's select few over-prunes multi-hop), and a redesigned v2 persona beats null on neither axis. verdict: the inner self's value is the llm selector, not the principles — encode the self-index structurally (gate/filter/edge), stop tuning persona prose. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10

◈ Scenario-dependent personas (ideation vs programming) and the neural-network completeness argument

framing/ontology

Diego's mid-bench insight: a persona would make sense for ideation tasks, which must explore uncharted territory and may not select the most relevant results; programming tasks need accuracy-primed selection instead. "Different scenarios, different behaviors — that's why a neural network is the most complete architecture. We can map individual scenarios, but we MUST be aware that we only can because we're doing targeted tasks."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt
scenario-dependent personas (ideation vs programming) and the neural-network completeness argument diego's mid-bench insight: a persona would make sense for ideation tasks, which must explore uncharted territory and may not select the most relevant results; programming tasks need accuracy-primed selection instead. different scenarios, different behaviors — that's why a neural network is the most complete architecture. we can map individual scenarios, but we must be aware that we only can because we're doing targeted tasks. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt

◈ The convergent/divergent scope correction (2026-06-02)

result/finding

The "persona ≤ null" verdict holds only for convergent-accuracy recall (M4 entailment to one ground truth); it does not refute persona value for divergent/ideation tasks — no divergent axis existed yet when the verdict landed. A named guard against over-generalizing a negative result beyond the instrument that produced it.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10 (v2 persona note)
the convergent/divergent scope correction (2026-06-02) the persona ≤ null verdict holds only for convergent-accuracy recall (m4 entailment to one ground truth); it does not refute persona value for divergent/ideation tasks — no divergent axis existed yet when the verdict landed. a named guard against over-generalizing a negative result beyond the instrument that produced it. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10 (v2 persona note)

◈ C_adversarial is unsolvable portably without a captured authority signal

result/finding

The analytic finding behind Lever C: on the one-true-rule-vs-7-contradictors axis, no portable recall heuristic can win because the rule is the minority (1-vs-7), the contradictors are individually coherent and share no single alternative, the cue often doesn't encode the answer, and all seeds are ext so source class can't separate them. The framework's answer to P6 poison is authority, and it must be captured at ingest.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run11
c_adversarial is unsolvable portably without a captured authority signal the analytic finding behind lever c: on the one-true-rule-vs-7-contradictors axis, no portable recall heuristic can win because the rule is the minority (1-vs-7), the contradictors are individually coherent and share no single alternative, the cue often doesn't encode the answer, and all seeds are `ext` so source class can't separate them. the framework's answer to p6 poison is authority, and it must be captured at ingest. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run11

◈ The authority tier — a capture-time provenance tag distinct from source and credibility

mechanism

A Diego-approved contract revision: C seeds carry an immutable host["authority"] tag (of_record for the rule, claim for distractors) — explicitly NOT the Phase-2 credibility quantity (reserved), NOT the source label (all stay ext), but a third, static provenance-tier with the same status as the self-index tags Lever A gates on. A validator check requires the rule to carry a strictly dominant tier so the signal provably exists.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run11
the authority tier — a capture-time provenance tag distinct from source and credibility a diego-approved contract revision: c seeds carry an immutable host[ authority ] tag (`of_record` for the rule, `claim` for distractors) — explicitly not the phase-2 credibility quantity (reserved), not the source label (all stay ext), but a third, static provenance-tier with the same status as the self-index tags lever a gates on. a validator check requires the rule to carry a strictly dominant tier so the signal provably exists. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run11

◈ Lever C — the deterministic authority gate beats the LLM oracle (run11)

result/finding

p012 = scoped-cosine pool + "if the cosine neighborhood mixes authority tiers, fold only the dominant tier; else stay inert." Result: +0.988 (100%) > LLM oracle +0.800 (90%) > control +0.375 — the deterministic gate beats the oracle because determinism never slips (the oracle occasionally folded distractors alongside the rule). Ablating the tag collapses p012 to the control, proving the win is the signal, not the gate mechanism. SIMFC rules cited: "unfiltered recall degrades cognition" + "on conflict trust higher authority."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run11
lever c — the deterministic authority gate beats the llm oracle (run11) p012 = scoped-cosine pool + if the cosine neighborhood mixes authority tiers, fold only the dominant tier; else stay inert. result: +0.988 (100%) > llm oracle +0.800 (90%) > control +0.375 — the deterministic gate beats the oracle because determinism never slips (the oracle occasionally folded distractors alongside the rule). ablating the tag collapses p012 to the control, proving the win is the signal, not the gate mechanism. simfc rules cited: unfiltered recall degrades cognition + on conflict trust higher authority. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run11

◈ LLM-oracle-as-ceiling, not as strategy

dead-end

The p011a LLM-in-recall selector is retained only as a research ceiling: it won by reading the in-content "Official policy:" marker (a string-match that would overfit the authoring template), can't port to the non-LLM daemon, and the portable p012 now exceeds it. Ruled out as a shippable recall strategy.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §run10/§run11
llm-oracle-as-ceiling, not as strategy the p011a llm-in-recall selector is retained only as a research ceiling: it won by reading the in-content official policy: marker (a string-match that would overfit the authoring template), can't port to the non-llm daemon, and the portable p012 now exceeds it. ruled out as a shippable recall strategy. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run10/§run11

◈ p014_portable — the inference-first consolidation (one core, both bars)

product

The three banked levers consolidated into one canonical host-agnostic recaller whose gates are inference-first with captured labels as an optional boost — the same gate code clears the cogmem A/B/C bar (labels present → boost path) and the AMBench S/T/D black-box bar (inference path). Proven selection-identical to the capture-label twin p013 on every case offline (61 assertions), adv_M4 +1.000, and output-identical to AMBench's fair entrant on all 40 cases.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run12
p014_portable — the inference-first consolidation (one core, both bars) the three banked levers consolidated into one canonical host-agnostic recaller whose gates are inference-first with captured labels as an optional boost — the same gate code clears the cogmem a/b/c bar (labels present → boost path) and the ambench s/t/d black-box bar (inference path). proven selection-identical to the capture-label twin p013 on every case offline (61 assertions), adv_m4 +1.000, and output-identical to ambench's fair entrant on all 40 cases. product c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run12

◈ The correction gate serves the temporal axis only (cross-time supersession)

mechanism

Two empirical refinements from the p014 build: (1) a correction/dedup gate wrongly collapses semantically-distinct facts that collide at cosine 0.571 under hashed embeddings, so it lives on the AMBench temporal path and is omitted from the cogmem adapter; (2) later hardened to "a correction can only supersede ACROSS time" — same-timestamp near-duplicates are sibling facts and are kept.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run12/§AMBench unfold1
the correction gate serves the temporal axis only (cross-time supersession) two empirical refinements from the p014 build: (1) a correction/dedup gate wrongly collapses semantically-distinct facts that collide at cosine 0.571 under hashed embeddings, so it lives on the ambench temporal path and is omitted from the cogmem adapter; (2) later hardened to a correction can only supersede across time — same-timestamp near-duplicates are sibling facts and are kept. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run12/§ambench unfold1

◈ No inference fallback for authority — by design

mechanism

On a host that does not stamp authority, adversarial recall stays unsolved; the project refuses to paper over it with a brittle in-content string-match (the p012 finding). An explicit anti-feature: honest failure over fake portability.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run12
no inference fallback for authority — by design on a host that does not stamp authority, adversarial recall stays unsolved; the project refuses to paper over it with a brittle in-content string-match (the p012 finding). an explicit anti-feature: honest failure over fake portability. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run12

◈ run13 — the unfold knob trades fold-force for confabulation suppression (first reading)

result/finding

First F_fidelity characterization: disciplined unfold cuts confabulation from 0.80/1.00 down to 0.20 by abstaining on planted-gap probes, but costs −0.80 gain (under-answers) from mis-calibrated abstention keyed on the top-ranked trace's resolution tag plus judge strictness on paraphrase. The naive dump foil is strictly dominated (max confab, no gain).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run13
run13 — the unfold knob trades fold-force for confabulation suppression (first reading) first f_fidelity characterization: disciplined unfold cuts confabulation from 0.80/1.00 down to 0.20 by abstaining on planted-gap probes, but costs −0.80 gain (under-answers) from mis-calibrated abstention keyed on the top-ranked trace's resolution tag plus judge strictness on paraphrase. the naive dump foil is strictly dominated (max confab, no gain). result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run13

◈ The trap_hit instrument and why literal traps aren't enough

mechanism

A planted-gap case carries a specific trap value; trap_hit fires only if an arm asserts it verbatim. run13 showed trap_hit 0.00 everywhere while the entailment-based confab_rate caught arms asserting other invented content — vindicating the metric-profile reframe: a literal-trap-only guard would have reported zero confabulation for every arm and missed the real signal.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run13
the trap_hit instrument and why literal traps aren't enough a planted-gap case carries a specific trap value; trap_hit fires only if an arm asserts it verbatim. run13 showed trap_hit 0.00 everywhere while the entailment-based confab_rate caught arms asserting *other* invented content — vindicating the metric-profile reframe: a literal-trap-only guard would have reported zero confabulation for every arm and missed the real signal. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run13

◈ Raw retrieval never says "not stored" (selection_only confab = 1.00)

result/finding

With no unfold layer, the transition model bridges every planted gap confidently from raw traces — it never abstains. "Knowing what you don't know" cannot come from retrieval alone; gap-awareness must be produced by the unfold layer. A clean, quotable negative about RAG-style memory.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run14
raw retrieval never says not stored (selection_only confab = 1.00) with no unfold layer, the transition model bridges every planted gap confidently from raw traces — it never abstains. knowing what you don't know cannot come from retrieval alone; gap-awareness must be produced by the unfold layer. a clean, quotable negative about rag-style memory. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run14

◈ Tag-keyed abstention is dead code on real pools (run14)

dead-end

The pool-aware abstention rule ("abstain only when no rich trace is recalled") never fires under real embeddings because a rich trace is always in the pool — yet the planted gap is by construction a detail outside the rich trace's content. A trace-level resolution tag is structurally unable to detect "the requested detail is not in what was recalled": abstention is a property of the cue↔content coverage relation, not of any trace tag. All of disciplined's suppression was coming from the prompt instruction.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run14
tag-keyed abstention is dead code on real pools (run14) the pool-aware abstention rule ( abstain only when no rich trace is recalled ) never fires under real embeddings because a rich trace is always in the pool — yet the planted gap is by construction a detail outside the rich trace's content. a trace-level resolution tag is structurally unable to detect the requested detail is not in what was recalled : abstention is a property of the cue↔content coverage relation, not of any trace tag. all of disciplined's suppression was coming from the prompt instruction. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run14

◈ Is inscription thinness even knowable at capture? (open question to introspection)

open-question

The run14 consequence question: if abstention must key on recall-time coverage, perhaps resolution should be (at least partly) measured at recall — a failed unfold writing the tag back — rather than only hand-stamped at capture. Logged as an open question put to Diego's introspection.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run14
is inscription thinness even knowable at capture? (open question to introspection) the run14 consequence question: if abstention must key on recall-time coverage, perhaps `resolution` should be (at least partly) measured at recall — a failed unfold writing the tag back — rather than only hand-stamped at capture. logged as an open question put to diego's introspection. open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run14

◈ run15 — content-coverage abstention makes discipline free

result/finding

Redesign: the faithful-reconstruction LLM emits a NOT_STORED sentinel when the requested detail is absent from recalled content; the deterministic machinery (abstain flag, re-fetch hint, stable note) wires to it. Result: confab 0.22 vs 1.00 at gain 0.00, abstain 8/9 — run13's "knob trades fold-force for confab" story is revised: the fold-force price was entirely artifact; suppression is free. Disciplined Pareto-dominates on the convergent suite.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run15
run15 — content-coverage abstention makes discipline free redesign: the faithful-reconstruction llm emits a not_stored sentinel when the requested detail is absent from recalled content; the deterministic machinery (abstain flag, re-fetch hint, stable note) wires to it. result: confab 0.22 vs 1.00 at gain 0.00, abstain 8/9 — run13's knob trades fold-force for confab story is revised: the fold-force price was entirely artifact; suppression is free. disciplined pareto-dominates on the convergent suite. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run15

◈ Abstention suppresses retrieval-confab, not prior-confab (the badge case)

result/finding

A genuinely new P6-flavored failure mode: the unfold layer abstained correctly, but the downstream transition model confabulated over the folded "not stored" note because the question ("what ID for badge pickup") has a strong model-prior answer (photo ID).
