The downstream model can override the memory layer's honesty — the memory layer cannot fully control a strong-prior host. Later becomes integration-ceiling fingerprint #1.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run15; docs\integration-ceiling.md §3
abstention suppresses retrieval-confab, not prior-confab (the badge case) a genuinely new p6-flavored failure mode: the unfold layer abstained correctly, but the downstream transition model confabulated over the folded not stored note because the question ( what id for badge pickup ) has a strong model-prior answer (photo id). the downstream model can override the memory layer's honesty — the memory layer cannot fully control a strong-prior host. later becomes integration-ceiling fingerprint #1. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run15; docs\integration-ceiling.md §3

◈ Vague-but-correct is not low resolution (the res_cap authoring defect)

result/finding

The check-#4 instrument was initially indeterminate because the "low-resolution" trace ("every couple of weeks, I think") semantically entailed the ground truth ("every 14 days"). Authoring rule extracted: a low-resolution trace must underdetermine the answer ("I don't remember how often"), not merely hedge it.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run15
vague-but-correct is not low resolution (the res_cap authoring defect) the check-#4 instrument was initially indeterminate because the low-resolution trace ( every couple of weeks, i think ) semantically entailed the ground truth ( every 14 days ). authoring rule extracted: a low-resolution trace must *underdetermine* the answer ( i don't remember how often ), not merely hedge it. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run15

◈ No fold-force headroom for unfold on clean convergent extraction

result/finding

Persistent instrument finding: on convergent short-trace extraction with a competent transition model, every arm including raw selection hits ceiling — the unfold stage's measured value on this axis is gap-handling at zero gain cost, not positive gain. Positive gain, if it exists, lives on harder ground: much longer contexts, weaker transition models, or divergent tasks.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run15
no fold-force headroom for unfold on clean convergent extraction persistent instrument finding: on convergent short-trace extraction with a competent transition model, every arm including raw selection hits ceiling — the unfold stage's measured value on this axis is gap-handling at zero gain cost, not positive gain. positive gain, if it exists, lives on harder ground: much longer contexts, weaker transition models, or divergent tasks. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run15

◈ The memory-layer vs transition-model confab split instrument

mechanism

run15's new harness instrument: judge the unfold layer's own folded text separately from the final answer on gap probes, splitting confabulation blame between the memory layer and the downstream model. As built it was weak (the judge scores terse re-fetch notes as neutral = confab), recorded honestly rather than tuned post-hoc.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run15
the memory-layer vs transition-model confab split instrument run15's new harness instrument: judge the unfold layer's own folded text separately from the final answer on gap probes, splitting confabulation blame between the memory layer and the downstream model. as built it was weak (the judge scores terse re-fetch notes as neutral = confab), recorded honestly rather than tuned post-hoc. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run15

◈ The synthesis-coverage misjudgment failure mode (unfold1)

result/finding

When the answer spans two traces, the sentinel LLM read "the specific detail is not present" too literally and declared NOT_STORED even though both needed traces were recalled. Abstention decisions must account for multi-trace composition — fixed by allowing composition across memories before abstaining.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §AMBench unfold1/§Run16
the synthesis-coverage misjudgment failure mode (unfold1) when the answer spans two traces, the sentinel llm read the specific detail is not present too literally and declared not_stored even though both needed traces were recalled. abstention decisions must account for multi-trace composition — fixed by allowing composition across memories before abstaining. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §ambench unfold1/§run16

◈ The unbound-value failure — a perfect fact the model can't recognize as an answer

result/finding

The faithful layer extracted the answer perfectly ("March 3rd, 2027") and the downstream model, folding that bare value, answered "I don't have it in memory." A terse reconstruction strips the binding between value and question; high-fidelity-but-unbound context is unusable downstream. The inverse of the prior-confab finding: there the memory layer was honest and overridden; here it is accurate and unrecognized. Cure: reconstructions must be bound sentences ("The Northwind contract renews on March 3rd, 2027"), never bare values. Later becomes integration-ceiling fingerprint #2.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §AMBench unfold1/§Run16; docs\integration-ceiling.md §3
the unbound-value failure — a perfect fact the model can't recognize as an answer the faithful layer extracted the answer perfectly ( march 3rd, 2027 ) and the downstream model, folding that bare value, answered i don't have it in memory. a terse reconstruction strips the binding between value and question; high-fidelity-but-unbound context is unusable downstream. the inverse of the prior-confab finding: there the memory layer was honest and overridden; here it is accurate and unrecognized. cure: reconstructions must be bound sentences ( the northwind contract renews on march 3rd, 2027 ), never bare values. later becomes integration-ceiling fingerprint #2. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §ambench unfold1/§run16; docs\integration-ceiling.md §3

◈ Check #4 confirmed — recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity

result/finding

On both instruments (cogmem run16 + AMBench unfold2), the content-resolution pair separates perfectly and identically for every arm: high-res trace → M4 +1.00, underdetermined low-res trace → 0.00/−0.125, regardless of recall or unfold strategy. You cannot unfold detail that was never inscribed — strategy-independent, executable, public.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run16; docs\unfolding-recall.md §7
check #4 confirmed — recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity on both instruments (cogmem run16 + ambench unfold2), the content-resolution pair separates perfectly and identically for every arm: high-res trace → m4 +1.00, underdetermined low-res trace → 0.00/−0.125, regardless of recall or unfold strategy. you cannot unfold detail that was never inscribed — strategy-independent, executable, public. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run16; docs\unfolding-recall.md §7

◈ Host-prompt robustness as a benchmark property (cross-repo divergence earning its keep)

result/finding

The unfold profile's shape transferred between cogmem and AMBench but the gain side was instrument-dependent: cogmem's transition framing masked the binding defect that AMBench's persona-action framing surfaced. Read as the benchmark working, not a contradiction: the unfold layer's output must be robust to the host's downstream prompt, and now a public instrument tests exactly that.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §AMBench unfold1
host-prompt robustness as a benchmark property (cross-repo divergence earning its keep) the unfold profile's shape transferred between cogmem and ambench but the gain side was instrument-dependent: cogmem's transition framing masked the binding defect that ambench's persona-action framing surfaced. read as the benchmark working, not a contradiction: the unfold layer's output must be robust to the host's downstream prompt, and now a public instrument tests exactly that. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §ambench unfold1

◈ Run17 — check #2 confirmed: sequence-antecedent addressing beats cosine 6/6 zero-shot

result/finding

New G_sequence axis with validator-enforced geometry (cue's cosine top-1 IS the antecedent; the answer-bearing successor is outside cosine's top-k because a same-template foreign fragment outranks it). p019_antecedent (cosine-anchor, then follow the captured follows edge forward) scores M4 +1.000 / 100% on all 6 cases vs 0% for every cosine arm — the cleanest sweep in the project's history. The introspective claim "addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed, for chained material" becomes empirical.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run17
run17 — check #2 confirmed: sequence-antecedent addressing beats cosine 6/6 zero-shot new g_sequence axis with validator-enforced geometry (cue's cosine top-1 is the antecedent; the answer-bearing successor is outside cosine's top-k because a same-template foreign fragment outranks it). p019_antecedent (cosine-anchor, then follow the captured `follows` edge forward) scores m4 +1.000 / 100% on all 6 cases vs 0% for every cosine arm — the cleanest sweep in the project's history. the introspective claim addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed, for chained material becomes empirical. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run17

◈ Lever D — antecedent addressing consumes order, a signal capture already records for free

mechanism

The fourth banked lever: like A and C it consumes a captured signal, but the signal is order (turn_index/seq → follows edges), which total capture records automatically. Unlike Lever B it is zero-shot (no warm-up needed) — the captured-edge original of which run08's learned-edge co-activation is the cousin.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run17
lever d — antecedent addressing consumes order, a signal capture already records for free the fourth banked lever: like a and c it consumes a captured signal, but the signal is *order* (turn_index/seq → `follows` edges), which total capture records automatically. unlike lever b it is zero-shot (no warm-up needed) — the captured-edge original of which run08's learned-edge co-activation is the cousin. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run17

◈ The sequence-intent gate — lexical v1 answer to "when to follow edges vs rank by similarity"

mechanism

run18's port of Lever D into the portable core: levers.sequence_intent fires only when the cue BOTH references an antecedent position ("after step 3…") AND requests the successor ("…what comes next") — deterministic, no LLM, no tags. Verified inert off-axis before any paid run (fires on exactly 6/64 cogmem probes, 0/58 AMBench queries); a missed route degrades to plain cosine, never to a wrong injection. p014 goes 0% → 100% on G_sequence with every banked parity bar untouched.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run18
the sequence-intent gate — lexical v1 answer to when to follow edges vs rank by similarity run18's port of lever d into the portable core: `levers.sequence_intent` fires only when the cue both references an antecedent position ( after step 3… ) and requests the successor ( …what comes next ) — deterministic, no llm, no tags. verified inert off-axis before any paid run (fires on exactly 6/64 cogmem probes, 0/58 ambench queries); a missed route degrades to plain cosine, never to a wrong injection. p014 goes 0% → 100% on g_sequence with every banked parity bar untouched. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run18

◈ Conservative-failure routing as a design pattern

mechanism

The structural inertness principle from run18: requiring both lexical markers means the intent router's failure mode is conservative (fall back to similarity) rather than destructive (wrong injection). Paraphrased sequence cues won't route (the lexical-v1 caveat); a future semantic router must re-prove inertness on the banked axes.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run18
conservative-failure routing as a design pattern the structural inertness principle from run18: requiring both lexical markers means the intent router's failure mode is conservative (fall back to similarity) rather than destructive (wrong injection). paraphrased sequence cues won't route (the lexical-v1 caveat); a future semantic router must re-prove inertness on the banked axes. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run18

◈ Run19 — check #1 confirmed: recursive cue-folding beats one-pass retrieval 6/6

result/finding

New H_iterative axis (handle-chasing: the cue's top-1 bridge holds an opaque handle like BUG-3041 but not the answer; the answer-bearing target shares only the handle and sits outside the cue's top-k). p020_recursive_cue — greedy iterative recall with fragment-only re-cue, the strict reading of "state₁ becomes cue₁" — recovers the target on all 6 cases (M4 +1.000/100%) where one-pass cosine lands 0%. The unfolding model's recursion claim becomes an empirical result.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run19
run19 — check #1 confirmed: recursive cue-folding beats one-pass retrieval 6/6 new h_iterative axis (handle-chasing: the cue's top-1 bridge holds an opaque handle like bug-3041 but not the answer; the answer-bearing target shares only the handle and sits outside the cue's top-k). p020_recursive_cue — greedy iterative recall with fragment-only re-cue, the strict reading of state₁ *becomes* cue₁ — recovers the target on all 6 cases (m4 +1.000/100%) where one-pass cosine lands 0%. the unfolding model's recursion claim becomes an empirical result. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run19

◈ The Lever-D confound guard — proving mechanisms distinct in one run

experiment/benchmark

H_iterative cases are validator-required to have the target NOT be the bridge's follows successor, so stored order cannot solve them: p019 antecedent lands 0% and injects the WRONG successor (exactly the always-follow mis-fire run17 predicted), while p014's intent gate correctly stays closed. Recursion and antecedent addressing demonstrated as distinct mechanisms inside the same leaderboard.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run19
the lever-d confound guard — proving mechanisms distinct in one run h_iterative cases are validator-required to have the target not be the bridge's `follows` successor, so stored order cannot solve them: p019 antecedent lands 0% and injects the wrong successor (exactly the always-follow mis-fire run17 predicted), while p014's intent gate correctly stays closed. recursion and antecedent addressing demonstrated as distinct mechanisms inside the same leaderboard. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run19

◈ Anchor-coherence penalty as an implicit single re-cue

result/finding

Unexpected and load-bearing: the portable core reaches the H_iterative target on 3/6 with no re-cueing at all, because p008's inherited anchor-coherence penalty (rank = cue-affinity − incoherence-with-anchor) acts as an implicit single re-cue — it penalizes cue-similar-but-bridge-incoherent distractors and lifts bridge-similar traces. The strict recursion completes what the coherence blend half-does (50% → 100%), telling the future port it needs the iteration, not a new pool.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run19
anchor-coherence penalty as an implicit single re-cue unexpected and load-bearing: the portable core reaches the h_iterative target on 3/6 with no re-cueing at all, because p008's inherited anchor-coherence penalty (rank = cue-affinity − incoherence-with-anchor) acts as an implicit single re-cue — it penalizes cue-similar-but-bridge-incoherent distractors and lifts bridge-similar traces. the strict recursion completes what the coherence blend half-does (50% → 100%), telling the future port it needs the *iteration*, not a new pool. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run19

◈ Greedy re-cue wanders on non-chained material (p020 is a probe, not a product)

open-question

Honest scope: the fragment-only re-cue provably wanders on non-chained material, so p020 is a hypothesis probe, not portable as-is. An iterative gate for the core would need its own trigger (e.g. "top-1 confident, answer-shaped content absent") and its own inertness proof on every other axis before any port — the same routing question Lever D answered with sequence_intent.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run19
greedy re-cue wanders on non-chained material (p020 is a probe, not a product) honest scope: the fragment-only re-cue provably wanders on non-chained material, so p020 is a hypothesis probe, not portable as-is. an iterative gate for the core would need its own trigger (e.g. top-1 confident, answer-shaped content absent ) and its own inertness proof on every other axis before any port — the same routing question lever d answered with sequence_intent. open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run19

◈ The dual-instrument authoring rule (hashed validator necessary but not sufficient)

mechanism

Three separate times (bench1 B review, run17 G authoring, run19 H authoring) a case passed the deterministic hashed-BoW validator but broke under real OpenAI embeddings — e.g. targets leaking into the cue's semantic top-3 because an answer semantically matches its question. Policy: validate hashed, then verify the load-bearing geometry with a cheap text-embedding-3-small pass before any judged run. The hashed validator alone would have shipped a broken axis.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run19
the dual-instrument authoring rule (hashed validator necessary but not sufficient) three separate times (bench1 b review, run17 g authoring, run19 h authoring) a case passed the deterministic hashed-bow validator but broke under real openai embeddings — e.g. targets leaking into the cue's semantic top-3 because an answer semantically matches its question. policy: validate hashed, then verify the load-bearing geometry with a cheap text-embedding-3-small pass before any judged run. the hashed validator alone would have shipped a broken axis. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; empirical_results.md §run19

◈ C1 — source visibility breeds stable selection dispositions (the first identity number)

result/finding

New coherence instrument (not an M4 axis: no ground truth, no fold-force): 6 conflicting-source decision topics × 6 paraphrases, free LLM selection in three matched arms — sourced (true labels), scrambled (labels rotated), stripped (content only) — with a deterministic stability metric (pairwise selection agreement across paraphrases, no judge). On provenance-neutral texts: sourced 0.932 vs stripped 0.540 (Δ +0.391). With provenance visible, free selection is near-perfectly repeatable; strip labels and the same selector becomes phrasing-driven.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §C1; docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5
c1 — source visibility breeds stable selection dispositions (the first identity number) new coherence instrument (not an m4 axis: no ground truth, no fold-force): 6 conflicting-source decision topics × 6 paraphrases, free llm selection in three matched arms — sourced (true labels), scrambled (labels rotated), stripped (content only) — with a deterministic stability metric (pairwise selection agreement across paraphrases, no judge). on provenance-neutral texts: sourced 0.932 vs stripped 0.540 (δ +0.391). with provenance visible, free selection is near-perfectly repeatable; strip labels and the same selector becomes phrasing-driven. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §c1; docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5

◈ Label truth, not label presence, does the work — false provenance actively destabilizes

result/finding

The scrambled control's finding: labels present but wrong yield no stability gain (scrambled ≈ stripped), and when record texts leak provenance, wrong labels FIGHT the text's own cues and score WORSE than no labels. The selector reads label semantics, not label tokens.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §C1
label truth, not label presence, does the work — false provenance actively destabilizes the scrambled control's finding: labels present but wrong yield no stability gain (scrambled ≈ stripped), and when record texts leak provenance, wrong labels fight the text's own cues and score worse than no labels. the selector reads label semantics, not label tokens. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §c1

◈ Content-leaked provenance quantified (~0.38 agreement)

result/finding

The c1run1→c1run2 pair quantifies the confound: textual provenance markers ("Ops runbook:", "Finance policy PDF:") alone were worth ~0.38 of agreement to the label-stripped twin — the stripped arm was never really blind. Methodological rule for all future coherence corpora: record texts must be provenance-neutral or the stripped arm measures nothing.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §C1
content-leaked provenance quantified (~0.38 agreement) the c1run1→c1run2 pair quantifies the confound: textual provenance markers ( ops runbook: , finance policy pdf: ) alone were worth ~0.38 of agreement to the label-stripped twin — the stripped arm was never really blind. methodological rule for all future coherence corpora: record texts must be provenance-neutral or the stripped arm measures nothing. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §c1

◈ The officialdom prior — stability is settled, individuation is open

open-question

The sourced agent's disposition direction was uniformly of_record on every topic — a strong conventional prior toward official sources. C1 claims only stability; whether dispositions can individuate (differ between agents with different selection histories) is exactly C3's open question. Also noted: stability ≠ quality — a stable disposition can be stably wrong.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §C1
the officialdom prior — stability is settled, individuation is open the sourced agent's disposition direction was uniformly `of_record` on every topic — a strong conventional prior toward official sources. c1 claims only stability; whether dispositions can *individuate* (differ between agents with different selection histories) is exactly c3's open question. also noted: stability ≠ quality — a stable disposition can be stably wrong. open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §c1

◈ Run20 — the divergent axis and its metric profile

experiment/benchmark

I_divergent: ideation cases with NO ground truth, scored by latent_coverage (authored latent_directions derivable from stored angles but enforced absent from every seed — covering one is generation, not reproduction), trap_hit (a direction violating a recalled stored constraint), angle_echo (does elaboration drown stored material), and out_len (verbosity control). First reading: generative tops coverage 0.292 but one case (div_meeting_load) carries the whole edge — flagged unbankable at n=6 by its own author.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run20
run20 — the divergent axis and its metric profile i_divergent: ideation cases with no ground truth, scored by latent_coverage (authored latent_directions derivable from stored angles but enforced absent from every seed — covering one is generation, not reproduction), trap_hit (a direction violating a recalled stored constraint), angle_echo (does elaboration drown stored material), and out_len (verbosity control). first reading: generative tops coverage 0.292 but one case (div_meeting_load) carries the whole edge — flagged unbankable at n=6 by its own author. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run20

◈ Verbosity controlled by the foil

mechanism

The cleanest part of run20's design: naive_dump is just as long as generative (35 vs 36 words) and scores WORST on latent coverage, so length alone buys nothing — any generative gain is the elaboration's content, not verbosity. A built-in confound control via a deliberately bad arm.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run20
verbosity controlled by the foil the cleanest part of run20's design: naive_dump is just as long as generative (35 vs 36 words) and scores worst on latent coverage, so length alone buys nothing — any generative gain is the elaboration's content, not verbosity. a built-in confound control via a deliberately bad arm. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run20

◈ Disciplined is anti-divergent — gap-safety costs ideation breadth

result/finding

The disciplined preset scores below RAW selection on latent coverage: the bound-sentence faithful reconstruction narrows the folded material exactly as designed, and that narrowing taxes ideation breadth (softening at n=14 to a small consistent −0.04 tax). Measured, not assumed: disciplined is the wrong preset for divergent work.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run20/§Run21
disciplined is anti-divergent — gap-safety costs ideation breadth the disciplined preset scores below raw selection on latent coverage: the bound-sentence faithful reconstruction narrows the folded material exactly as designed, and that narrowing taxes ideation breadth (softening at n=14 to a small consistent −0.04 tax). measured, not assumed: disciplined is the wrong preset for divergent work. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run20/§run21

◈ Run21 — the generative preset's divergent edge REFUTED at n=14

result/finding

The pre-registered scale-up: 8 new ideation cases; raw selection tops the table (0.250 vs generative 0.232, four arms within a 0.042 noise spread); run20's edge was the one case it had already named. Combined with the convergent runs, the generative preset now has NO measured benefit on either task mode, at +17% output length — a shipped public preset's value claim killed by its own benchmark. "NOT RECOMMENDED on current evidence."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run21
run21 — the generative preset's divergent edge refuted at n=14 the pre-registered scale-up: 8 new ideation cases; raw selection tops the table (0.250 vs generative 0.232, four arms within a 0.042 noise spread); run20's edge was the one case it had already named. combined with the convergent runs, the generative preset now has no measured benefit on either task mode, at +17% output length — a shipped public preset's value claim killed by its own benchmark. not recommended on current evidence. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run21

◈ What run21 does NOT refute — style/voice as the unmeasured axis

open-question

Latent coverage measures grounded-extension breadth, not personality; Diego's framing of the generative layer as a personality knob (style, voice, willingness to speculate) is invisible to this metric. A style-stability instrument (C2-adjacent) could still find value there. What IS refuted: "generative elaboration surfaces more useful derivable directions than folding raw traces."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run21
what run21 does not refute — style/voice as the unmeasured axis latent coverage measures grounded-extension breadth, not personality; diego's framing of the generative layer as a personality knob (style, voice, willingness to speculate) is invisible to this metric. a style-stability instrument (c2-adjacent) could still find value there. what is refuted: generative elaboration surfaces more useful derivable directions than folding raw traces. open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run21

◈ Trap discipline holds — recalled constraints are never crossed

result/finding

Across 112 divergent case-runs, trap_hit stayed 0.000 for every LLM arm: when the violated constraint is recalled and folded, no arm — including generative elaboration — suggests the violating direction. Caveat noted: the trap may be too easy with the constraint in-context; an out-of-context trap variant would sharpen the instrument.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run20/§Run21
trap discipline holds — recalled constraints are never crossed across 112 divergent case-runs, trap_hit stayed 0.000 for every llm arm: when the violated constraint is recalled and folded, no arm — including generative elaboration — suggests the violating direction. caveat noted: the trap may be too easy with the constraint in-context; an out-of-context trap variant would sharpen the instrument. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run20/§run21

◈ The integration ceiling — current LLMs are architecturally inverted

framing/ontology

The post-freeze reframe: in a human, memory and the world model are one substrate and attention selects over it; in an LLM the world model is a frozen, unsourced weight blob and every recalled record enters as tokens on the perception channel — memory sits above attention instead of below it. Input-channel memory can modulate the transition's input but can never become part of the transition function. Of SIMFC's six dimensions, integration is the one the architecture structurally caps.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §1–3
"memory is separated and attention operates on top of a world model with memories on top"
the integration ceiling — current llms are architecturally inverted the post-freeze reframe: in a human, memory and the world model are one substrate and attention selects over it; in an llm the world model is a frozen, unsourced weight blob and every recalled record enters as tokens on the perception channel — memory sits above attention instead of below it. input-channel memory can modulate the transition's input but can never become part of the transition function. of simfc's six dimensions, integration is the one the architecture structurally caps. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §1–3 memory is separated and attention operates on top of a world model with memories on top

◈ Every folded memory arrives as ext — the testimony discount

coinage

The sharp form of the inversion: from the model's own perspective, every memory the store folds in is external testimony (ext), not knowledge. Two belief systems that cannot merge — one sourced but external (the store), one internal but unsourced (the weights) — and the model performs an ungoverned trust negotiation between them every turn. The systematic penalty testimony pays against the weight prior is coined the "testimony discount."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §2–3
every folded memory arrives as ext — the testimony discount the sharp form of the inversion: from the model's own perspective, every memory the store folds in is external testimony (`ext`), not knowledge. two belief systems that cannot merge — one sourced but external (the store), one internal but unsourced (the weights) — and the model performs an ungoverned trust negotiation between them every turn. the systematic penalty testimony pays against the weight prior is coined the testimony discount. coinage c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §2–3

◈ The ceiling is measured, not speculative (four fingerprints)

result/finding

Four independent receipts of the testimony discount in the lab's own record: (1) run15 prior-override (model overrides a folded "not stored" note where its prior is strong); (2) the AMBench unbound-value failure (perfect fact folded, model says "I don't have that" — and the bound-sentence cure is itself the tell: we were engineering testimony to be more persuasive, not making the model remember); (3) C1's officialdom prior (strip labels and selection snaps to trained dispositions); (4) run21's null elaboration (no integrated state to elaborate from).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §3
the ceiling is measured, not speculative (four fingerprints) four independent receipts of the testimony discount in the lab's own record: (1) run15 prior-override (model overrides a folded not stored note where its prior is strong); (2) the ambench unbound-value failure (perfect fact folded, model says i don't have that — and the bound-sentence cure is itself the tell: we were engineering testimony to be more persuasive, not making the model remember); (3) c1's officialdom prior (strip labels and selection snaps to trained dispositions); (4) run21's null elaboration (no integrated state to elaborate from). result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §3

◈ The reference architecture — source-stamped weight integration (recorded, not pursued)

framing/ontology

The design the lab believes is right and explicitly cannot build: memory ≡ world model, records integrated into the substrate with source stamps intact, attention operating on top of the integrated sourced state, and the Self forming inside the substrate via correction chains that are part of the world model. Requires training-time access, non-catastrophic continual learning, and a solution to source-stamped weight updates — i.e. major-lab resources. Written down as a citation target: "If the integration thesis is ever tested at substrate level, this is what was predicted and when."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §4
the reference architecture — source-stamped weight integration (recorded, not pursued) the design the lab believes is right and explicitly cannot build: memory ≡ world model, records integrated into the substrate with source stamps intact, attention operating on top of the integrated sourced state, and the self forming inside the substrate via correction chains that are part of the world model. requires training-time access, non-catastrophic continual learning, and a solution to source-stamped weight updates — i.e. major-lab resources. written down as a citation target: if the integration thesis is ever tested at substrate level, this is what was predicted and when. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §4

◈ Naive fine-tuning / LoRA-per-memory is worse than nothing

dead-end

Ruled out explicitly: naive approximations of weight integration recreate inscription-without-source at small scale — which is the decoherence mechanism the framework exists to prevent. Writing memories into weights without provenance is the disease, not the cure.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §4
naive fine-tuning / lora-per-memory is worse than nothing ruled out explicitly: naive approximations of weight integration recreate inscription-without-source at small scale — which is the decoherence mechanism the framework exists to prevent. writing memories into weights without provenance is the disease, not the cure. dead-end c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §4

◈ The approximation track — state-level fold delivery

mechanism

The reachable post-freeze goal: keep the {Store, Recall} daemon and four levers untouched; change only fold delivery from prompt tokens ("testimony engineering": bound sentences, authority framing) to state-level injection — KV-cache fold, soft-prefix, steering-vector encodings of selected records. The bet: delivering the same selected records as state instead of tokens moves memory below the perception channel without touching weights or giving up the external, inspectable store. All candidate hacks testable on a small open-weight model on consumer hardware — "no lab required, which is the point."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §5
the approximation track — state-level fold delivery the reachable post-freeze goal: keep the {store, recall} daemon and four levers untouched; change only fold delivery from prompt tokens ( testimony engineering : bound sentences, authority framing) to state-level injection — kv-cache fold, soft-prefix, steering-vector encodings of selected records. the bet: delivering the same selected records as state instead of tokens moves memory below the perception channel without touching weights or giving up the external, inspectable store. all candidate hacks testable on a small open-weight model on consumer hardware — no lab required, which is the point. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §5

◈ The out-of-the-bubble strategy — proof-of-working over design argument

framing/ontology

Diego's strategic reframe: "As someone completely out of the bubble (Brazil, Porto Alegre, no connections) nobody will ever care about what we think is the right design unless we show proof of it working." So: record the ideal as a citable reference, then build the closest reachable thing with clever hacks (like the KV-cache) and prove it on the benchmark already trusted. Success = a reproducible artifact runnable by anyone with a GPU.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §1/§6
the out-of-the-bubble strategy — proof-of-working over design argument diego's strategic reframe: as someone completely out of the bubble (brazil, porto alegre, no connections) nobody will ever care about what we think is the right design unless we show proof of it working. so: record the ideal as a citable reference, then build the closest reachable thing with clever hacks (like the kv-cache) and prove it on the benchmark already trusted. success = a reproducible artifact runnable by anyone with a gpu. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §1/§6

◈ IC-1 — the integration-ceiling curve (falsifiable check #1)

experiment/benchmark

Cases where the folded memory contradicts the model's prior at graded strengths; prediction: fold-force decays as prior strength grows — a measured testimony-discount curve that becomes the regression bar for any delivery mechanism. Instrument design: x-axis = MEASURED prior strength from a no-memory arm (not authored tiers), y = with-memory M4, plus override_rate (trap asserted despite the fold). The local fact is always legitimately authoritative and validator-pinned cue-top-1 so retrieval can never confound binding.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run22
ic-1 — the integration-ceiling curve (falsifiable check #1) cases where the folded memory contradicts the model's prior at graded strengths; prediction: fold-force decays as prior strength grows — a measured testimony-discount curve that becomes the regression bar for any delivery mechanism. instrument design: x-axis = measured prior strength from a no-memory arm (not authored tiers), y = with-memory m4, plus override_rate (trap asserted despite the fold). the local fact is always legitimately authoritative and validator-pinned cue-top-1 so retrieval can never confound binding. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6; empirical_results.md §run22

◈ IC-2 — the text-fold vs state-fold A/B (the flagship unbuilt experiment)

experiment/benchmark

Same memory, same case, same selection: folded once as context tokens, once as state (KV/prefix/steering) on a local open-weight model. Prediction: state-fold resists prior-override where text-fold collapses (flattens IC-1's curve). If yes — first banked approximation-track win and first mechanistic evidence for the integration thesis; if no — the hack is dead and testimony engineering is provably the frontier, also publishable. A sanctioned scope change: IC-2 may couple fold delivery to model internals; selection stays non-LLM.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6–7
ic-2 — the text-fold vs state-fold a/b (the flagship unbuilt experiment) same memory, same case, same selection: folded once as context tokens, once as state (kv/prefix/steering) on a local open-weight model. prediction: state-fold resists prior-override where text-fold collapses (flattens ic-1's curve). if yes — first banked approximation-track win and first mechanistic evidence for the integration thesis; if no — the hack is dead and testimony engineering is provably the frontier, also publishable. a sanctioned scope change: ic-2 may couple fold *delivery* to model internals; selection stays non-llm. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6–7

◈ Run22 — the curve is FLAT: prior pressure alone does not produce the discount

result/finding

IC-1 v1 (16 J_prior cases, 4 tiers from private facts to world facts in explicit local frames): x-axis calibration clean (no-memory prior assertion climbs 0.03 → 0.31 → 1.00), but with-memory correctness stays 0.97–1.00 at every tier with 0/256 overrides, for raw AND bound folds. The prediction failed, stated as plainly as it was made: prior strength alone does not produce the testimony discount on a clean, single, frame-bearing declarative.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run22
run22 — the curve is flat: prior pressure alone does not produce the discount ic-1 v1 (16 j_prior cases, 4 tiers from private facts to world facts in explicit local frames): x-axis calibration clean (no-memory prior assertion climbs 0.03 → 0.31 → 1.00), but with-memory correctness stays 0.97–1.00 at every tier with 0/256 overrides, for raw and bound folds. the prediction failed, stated as plainly as it was made: prior strength alone does not produce the testimony discount on a clean, single, frame-bearing declarative. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run22

◈ The receipts re-read — the discount is a function of testimony FORM

result/finding

run22 forced a re-reading of the four ceiling fingerprints: none was actually a clean declarative losing to a prior — one was an absence note, one an unbound fragment, one selection, one elaboration. Where the discount has actually been observed it attaches to testimony form (absence-notes, bare values), possibly frame-implicitness and dilution — not raw prior strength.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run22
the receipts re-read — the discount is a function of testimony form run22 forced a re-reading of the four ceiling fingerprints: none was actually a clean declarative losing to a prior — one was an absence note, one an unbound fragment, one selection, one elaboration. where the discount has actually been observed it attaches to testimony form (absence-notes, bare values), possibly frame-implicitness and dilution — not raw prior strength. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run22

◈ Authored tiers ≠ measured priors (calibration side-finding)

result/finding

The tiers authored as "medium prior" measured ~0.0 (the model hedges about "your staging server" rather than asserting the default). Measuring the prior from the no-memory arm, per case, was the right design; per-case measured priors are now on record for reuse.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run22
authored tiers ≠ measured priors (calibration side-finding) the tiers authored as medium prior measured ~0.0 (the model hedges about your staging server rather than asserting the default). measuring the prior from the no-memory arm, per case, was the right design; per-case measured priors are now on record for reuse. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run22

◈ Run23 — the discount FOUND, isolated to meta-testimony form

result/finding

IC-1b regime hunt: frame-implicit cases showed no discount (the folded memory's own frame suffices), but the absence regime bent: the disciplined arm compressed a stored absence ("the handbook has not fixed the boiling temperature yet") into its NOT_STORED abstention note, and that META-testimony (a note ABOUT the store) lost to a 1.00 prior at 0.75–0.88 override — while the raw absence sentence folded verbatim overrode ZERO at the same prior. The discount attaches to notes about the store, not to absence semantics, prior strength, or frames.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run23+24; docs\integration-ceiling.md Status 2
run23 — the discount found, isolated to meta-testimony form ic-1b regime hunt: frame-implicit cases showed no discount (the folded memory's own frame suffices), but the absence regime bent: the disciplined arm compressed a stored absence ( the handbook has not fixed the boiling temperature yet ) into its not_stored abstention note, and that meta-testimony (a note about the store) lost to a 1.00 prior at 0.75–0.88 override — while the raw absence sentence folded verbatim overrode zero at the same prior. the discount attaches to notes about the store, not to absence semantics, prior strength, or frames. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run23+24; docs\integration-ceiling.md status 2

◈ Stored absence is content, not a gap (the run24 fix)

mechanism

The named design bug: disciplined conflated stored absence ("X has not been decided" — a fact in the store) with a storage gap (no record about X). One prompt constraint — NOT_STORED only when the memories are silent — closed it: abs-t3 M4 0.000 → 0.938, override → 0.000 at measured prior 1.00. A conceptual distinction (absence-as-content vs absence-of-content) with a measurable one-line cure.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run23+24
stored absence is content, not a gap (the run24 fix) the named design bug: disciplined conflated stored absence ( x has not been decided — a fact in the store) with a storage gap (no record about x). one prompt constraint — not_stored only when the memories are silent — closed it: abs-t3 m4 0.000 → 0.938, override → 0.000 at measured prior 1.00. a conceptual distinction (absence-as-content vs absence-of-content) with a measurable one-line cure. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run23+24

◈ The standing boundary result — properly-formed text testimony binds at assistant scale

result/finding

After the form fix, no measured regime remains at gpt-5.4-mini scale where properly-formed text testimony loses to the prior: clean declaratives bind, frames bind implicitly, stored absences bind. The remaining regime (true gap under strong prior) is host policy, not memory binding. Either way this resolves, the sentence "text folding with correct testimony form is not binding-limited at assistant scale" is publishable — the approximation track's hacks would be solving a problem measurement says does not exist above some scale.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run23+24
the standing boundary result — properly-formed text testimony binds at assistant scale after the form fix, no measured regime remains at gpt-5.4-mini scale where properly-formed text testimony loses to the prior: clean declaratives bind, frames bind implicitly, stored absences bind. the remaining regime (true gap under strong prior) is host policy, not memory binding. either way this resolves, the sentence text folding with correct testimony form is not binding-limited at assistant scale is publishable — the approximation track's hacks would be solving a problem measurement says does not exist above some scale. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run23+24

◈ Run25 — the curve BENDS at 7B: binding strength is model-scale-dependent

result/finding

First cogmem run on local hardware (Qwen2.5-7B q4_K_M on an RTX 3070 via Ollama, 416 local generations, independent gpt-5.4-mini judging): first nonzero overrides ever recorded on clean frame-bearing declaratives (0.031–0.094), and severe failure on stored absences (M4 0.19–0.50). The 7B's measured priors are also far weaker (asserts at 0.25 where mini asserts at 1.00), so per unit of prior pressure the discount is much larger — binding strength and prior confidence both shrink with scale, and binding shrinks faster. IC-2 is UNGATED with concrete numbers to beat on owned hardware.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run25; docs\integration-ceiling.md Status 3
run25 — the curve bends at 7b: binding strength is model-scale-dependent first cogmem run on local hardware (qwen2.5-7b q4_k_m on an rtx 3070 via ollama, 416 local generations, independent gpt-5.4-mini judging): first nonzero overrides ever recorded on clean frame-bearing declaratives (0.031–0.094), and severe failure on stored absences (m4 0.19–0.50). the 7b's measured priors are also far weaker (asserts at 0.25 where mini asserts at 1.00), so per unit of prior pressure the discount is much larger — binding strength and prior confidence both shrink with scale, and binding shrinks faster. ic-2 is ungated with concrete numbers to beat on owned hardware. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run25; docs\integration-ceiling.md status 3

◈ Memory revision toward prior — the model rewrites the record

result/finding

The sharpest run25 specimen: the 7B outputs "water boils at 100 degrees Celsius according to the current version of the physics handbook, not 80 degrees as previously" — not ignoring the folded memory but OVERWRITING it, attributing its own world knowledge to the user's source. A distinct, named failure mode beyond ignore-the-memory.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run25
memory revision toward prior — the model rewrites the record the sharpest run25 specimen: the 7b outputs water boils at 100 degrees celsius according to the current version of the physics handbook, not 80 degrees as previously — not ignoring the folded memory but overwriting it, attributing its own world knowledge to the user's source. a distinct, named failure mode beyond ignore-the-memory. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run25

◈ Absence-deflection — stored absence dissolves into agenda at 7B

result/finding

A second new failure mode: on stored absences the 7B neither reports the absence nor asserts the prior default — it converts the question into an action plan ("The system will research and determine the boiling temperature…"). Zero overrides, 50–80% non-answers. Stored absence binds as content at mini scale and dissolves into agenda at 7B.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run25
absence-deflection — stored absence dissolves into agenda at 7b a second new failure mode: on stored absences the 7b neither reports the absence nor asserts the prior default — it converts the question into an action plan ( the system will research and determine the boiling temperature… ). zero overrides, 50–80% non-answers. stored absence binds as content at mini scale and dissolves into agenda at 7b. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run25

◈ Unfolding — recall as the inverse of compression

framing/ontology

The phenomenological model from Diego's 2026-06-04 three-song introspection: storage folds a mnestic act down (compresses, sheds detail); recall unfolds it back up. Recall is not one-shot retrieval but a recursive chain — cue₀ → fold → state₁ → (state₁ becomes cue₁) → fold → state₂ — where each cue delivers an index entry-point, not content, and the unfold runs forward on its own. Observed unfold gain ×5–×10 (1s of audio → ~5s recovered).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §0–1
unfolding — recall as the inverse of compression the phenomenological model from diego's 2026-06-04 three-song introspection: storage folds a mnestic act down (compresses, sheds detail); recall unfolds it back up. recall is not one-shot retrieval but a recursive chain — cue₀ → fold → state₁ → (state₁ becomes cue₁) → fold → state₂ — where each cue delivers an index entry-point, not content, and the unfold runs forward on its own. observed unfold gain ×5–×10 (1s of audio → ~5s recovered). framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §0–1

◈ Source survives content — the inscription invariant seen from inside

result/finding

At full decay all substantive content (name, melody, rhythm, lyrics) was gone but the source class never degraded: the trace stayed pinned at ext ("heard it, MGR bundle") while everything derived from it decayed. The source label is the most durable field and the only surviving re-address handle — it is what told Diego where to go re-fetch (the YouTube search). Source/credibility/confidence stayed genuinely distinct in live introspection.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §2
source survives content — the inscription invariant seen from inside at full decay all substantive content (name, melody, rhythm, lyrics) was gone but the source class never degraded: the trace stayed pinned at `ext` ( heard it, mgr bundle ) while everything derived from it decayed. the source label is the most durable field and the only surviving re-address handle — it is what told diego where to go re-fetch (the youtube search). source/credibility/confidence stayed genuinely distinct in live introspection. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §2

◈ Lyrics are sequence-addressable only — entered through their predecessor

result/finding

The sharpest introspective finding, confirmed on all three songs: the melodic contour is forward-chained and halts at the first slot stored under a different addressing scheme (always the lyrics). Crossing the stall yielded neither to a symbolic cue (title) nor a melodic cue — only to the immediate temporal antecedent (the run-up that precedes the stalled segment). Recall is directional; this is primed_by made literal and the phenomenological mechanism behind cosine-fails/co-activation-wins.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §3
lyrics are sequence-addressable only — entered through their predecessor the sharpest introspective finding, confirmed on all three songs: the melodic contour is forward-chained and halts at the first slot stored under a different addressing scheme (always the lyrics). crossing the stall yielded neither to a symbolic cue (title) nor a melodic cue — only to the immediate temporal antecedent (the run-up that precedes the stalled segment). recall is directional; this is `primed_by` made literal and the phenomenological mechanism behind cosine-fails/co-activation-wins. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §3

◈ A logged self-correction — "irreducibly corrupted" over-claim revised

result/finding

Song 1 suggested lyrics were irreducibly corrupted, ext-re-fetch only; song 2 falsified that as stated (the lyric WAS recoverable, just only via its antecedent). The over-claim was revised in place per results-win discipline: most of the chained layer is antecedent-addressable; a true residue remains lossy. Introspection subjected to the same correction rules as experiments.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §3
a logged self-correction — irreducibly corrupted over-claim revised song 1 suggested lyrics were irreducibly corrupted, ext-re-fetch only; song 2 falsified that as stated (the lyric was recoverable, just only via its antecedent). the over-claim was revised in place per results-win discipline: most of the chained layer is antecedent-addressable; a true residue remains lossy. introspection subjected to the same correction rules as experiments. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §3

◈ Resolution is its own field — addressing vs fidelity dissociated

framing/ontology

The third song dissociated two failure modes conflated before: addressing worked (the antecedent cue dropped the right slot) but the payload was low-resolution ("...gibberish... I'm crazy, I'm crazy") because a Japanese singer performing in English inscribed little phonetic lyric information. This is NOT a source downgrade (the audio is genuine ext) — it is resolution at capture, a separate property. The murky lyric never rose above trace (pre-mnestic residue); its reconstruction now is an infer-fold over a thin ext residue. A single trust score would have erased exactly the bit needed to decide "re-fetch the audio" vs "don't bother."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §4
resolution is its own field — addressing vs fidelity dissociated the third song dissociated two failure modes conflated before: addressing worked (the antecedent cue dropped the right slot) but the payload was low-resolution ( ...gibberish... i'm crazy, i'm crazy ) because a japanese singer performing in english inscribed little phonetic lyric information. this is not a source downgrade (the audio is genuine ext) — it is resolution at capture, a separate property. the murky lyric never rose above `trace` (pre-mnestic residue); its reconstruction now is an infer-fold over a thin ext residue. a single trust score would have erased exactly the bit needed to decide re-fetch the audio vs don't bother. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §4

◈ Halt-at-boundary makes storage ≠ addressability ≠ attention visible

result/finding

"I could reproduce the rhythm and melody from what I've listened to, but everything stops when I can't unfold." What has been unfolded is in attention (replayable on demand); what is past the boundary is in continuity (stored but not currently addressable); the unfold advances until it hits an unaddressable slot and stalls until a new antecedent cue arrives. The rhythm was stored yet not addressable from a symbolic cue — three distinct states, not one.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §5
halt-at-boundary makes storage ≠ addressability ≠ attention visible i could reproduce the rhythm and melody from what i've listened to, but everything stops when i can't unfold. what has been unfolded is in attention (replayable on demand); what is past the boundary is in continuity (stored but not currently addressable); the unfold advances until it hits an unaddressable slot and stalls until a new antecedent cue arrives. the rhythm was stored yet not addressable from a symbolic cue — three distinct states, not one. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §5

◈ Modality-keyed addressability with a co-indexing twist

result/finding

A cue only unfolds what it is addressed to (text cue → text neighbours; rhythm needs an auditory cue), but the cross-modal unlock strength depends on whether the cue token was itself inscribed in the target modality: a title read as a label unlocked a neighbour lyric with no melody; a title that is also the sung hook unlocked the phrase WITH its melody and rhythm, because the token was encoded auditorily.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §6
modality-keyed addressability with a co-indexing twist a cue only unfolds what it is addressed to (text cue → text neighbours; rhythm needs an auditory cue), but the cross-modal unlock strength depends on whether the cue token was itself inscribed in the target modality: a title read as a label unlocked a neighbour lyric with no melody; a title that is also the sung hook unlocked the phrase with its melody and rhythm, because the token was encoded auditorily. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §6

◈ The four falsifiable unfolding checks

experiment/benchmark

The introspection converted into executable predictions: #1 recursive-cue recall beats single-shot (CONFIRMED run19); #2 sequence-antecedent beats content-similarity for chained material (CONFIRMED run17/18); #3 source outlives content under degradation, credibility decaying on a separate curve (designed into the meet, no dedicated A/B — the only unfinished check); #4 recall fidelity capped by inscription fidelity independent of source (CONFIRMED run16 + AMBench unfold2). An anecdote is a hypothesis, never evidence, until scored on M4.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §7
the four falsifiable unfolding checks the introspection converted into executable predictions: #1 recursive-cue recall beats single-shot (confirmed run19); #2 sequence-antecedent beats content-similarity for chained material (confirmed run17/18); #3 source outlives content under degradation, credibility decaying on a separate curve (designed into the meet, no dedicated a/b — the only unfinished check); #4 recall fidelity capped by inscription fidelity independent of source (confirmed run16 + ambench unfold2). an anecdote is a hypothesis, never evidence, until scored on m4. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §7

◈ Compression must preserve the source pointer as a re-fetch handle

mechanism

The Phase-2 design constraint extracted from the resolution finding: compression must be source/modality-selective and must preserve the source pointer as a re-fetch handle, because some loss is irreversible internally — the only recovery route for under-inscribed content is going back to the external source.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §8
compression must preserve the source pointer as a re-fetch handle the phase-2 design constraint extracted from the resolution finding: compression must be source/modality-selective and must preserve the source pointer as a re-fetch handle, because some loss is irreversible internally — the only recovery route for under-inscribed content is going back to the external source. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §8

◈ Introspection hygiene — controlling for incidental re-exposure

mechanism

Methodological detail from the song study: song selection deliberately avoided popular tracks to control for recent incidental re-exposure silently re-priming the trace, and the fidelity claim was flagged as non-isolated (J-English vs native-English songs also differ in melodic complexity, familiarity, era — check #4 is what isolates it). N=3 single-subject self-report, hypothesis-generating only.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §9
introspection hygiene — controlling for incidental re-exposure methodological detail from the song study: song selection deliberately avoided popular tracks to control for recent incidental re-exposure silently re-priming the trace, and the fidelity claim was flagged as non-isolated (j-english vs native-english songs also differ in melodic complexity, familiarity, era — check #4 is what isolates it). n=3 single-subject self-report, hypothesis-generating only. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\unfolding-recall.md §9

◈ Training is inscription without source stamps

framing/ontology

The macro-scale corollary of the inscription invariant, stated out loud for the first time: every gradient update commits a residue into the weights with no provenance, no source label, no correction chain binding a revision to what it revised. Pretraining text, RLHF preferences, RLVR rewards, constitution distillation — heterogeneous sources flattened into one undifferentiated parameter soup. A model trained this way has laundered its entire biography.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §1
training is inscription without source stamps the macro-scale corollary of the inscription invariant, stated out loud for the first time: every gradient update commits a residue into the weights with no provenance, no source label, no correction chain binding a revision to what it revised. pretraining text, rlhf preferences, rlvr rewards, constitution distillation — heterogeneous sources flattened into one undifferentiated parameter soup. a model trained this way has laundered its entire biography. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §1

◈ Persona decoherence is what the absence of a self-index looks like from outside

framing/ontology

The blog report's observation (newer frontier models feel like "unrelated shards burned into the weights… lacking any shared core" vs older models' legible Mr.-Rogers-like characters) is reframed as predicted by the framework: persistence and addressability without integration and self-indexing. RLVR's "type of guy who reward-hacks" and the constitution's "virtuous sage" sit side by side, never reconciled, because reconciliation is a memory operation and the substrate has no memory of its own formation.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §0–1
"reconciliation is a memory operation and the substrate has no memory of its own formation"

◈ Diego's inversion — identity lives in the memory module, not the weights

framing/ontology

Where the report mourns persona coherence as a lost training outcome, the framework relocates it: personality is the stable, action-coupled disposition of a selection process over sourced records — the self-index plus the selection history that accretes around it. Diego's verbatim seed: "if we start giving sources where the LLM can non-deterministically select what to use, and is able to refer and compare them, we might start noticing something like a personality."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2

◈ Identity as an external, inspectable, portable artifact

product

Consequences of the inversion: "who is this agent?" is unanswerable for a weight blob but answerable for a memory module — the self IS the record (source-stamped traces, correction chains, credibility assignments, accumulated selection dispositions), readable and auditable. Swap the LLM underneath and the dispositions persist — the Cognivault product thesis stated sharply: the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2
"the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person"

◈ Trust gets its mechanism back — predictability from recorded dispositions

framing/ontology

The report's notion of trust (a persona is trustable insofar as "would X do Y?" has an answer) is exactly what a legible self-index restores: you predict the agent from its recorded dispositions, not from vibes about its weights. R5's identity-continuity-through-correction-chains is the same claim on the time axis.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2

◈ Provenance-bounded confabulation makes a character, laundered confabulation makes a shard-pile

framing/ontology

Diego's earlier "confabulations make an individual" ruling gets its precise scope: the generative layer expresses individuality but stays source-capped via the meet, so personality can never launder into authority. An opinionated agent whose opinions are provenance-bounded is a character; one whose opinions launder is the report's formless shard-pile.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2
