◈ Co-activation history is the mechanical seed of disposition

mechanism

The lab already holds the seed mechanism: p008's co-activation edges ARE accumulated selection history — the first mechanical substrate of disposition — and run10c already established personality does not live in a soft prompt; on this hypothesis it lives in which sources the agent durably tends to select, compare, and trust, learned through the witness loop.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2
co-activation history is the mechanical seed of disposition the lab already holds the seed mechanism: p008's co-activation edges are accumulated selection history — the first mechanical substrate of disposition — and run10c already established personality does not live in a soft prompt; on this hypothesis it lives in which sources the agent durably tends to select, compare, and trust, learned through the witness loop. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §2

◈ Expected weirdness is a prediction, not an exemption (the grokking ruling)

mechanism

Diego's methodological ruling for identity experiments: "Our benchmarks will start to look weird, but we must keep going, similar to how a LLM model suddenly groks during pre-training." Adopted with a discipline guard: once disposition formation begins, convergent-accuracy metrics are PREDICTED to degrade (a forming disposition is a stable bias away from neutral selection) — but coherence metrics must be defined BEFORE relaxing any convergent bar, the regression must be quantified and attributed, and if convergent scores degrade while coherence never emerges the hypothesis is falsified and said so.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §3
expected weirdness is a prediction, not an exemption (the grokking ruling) diego's methodological ruling for identity experiments: our benchmarks will start to look weird, but we must keep going, similar to how a llm model suddenly groks during pre-training. adopted with a discipline guard: once disposition formation begins, convergent-accuracy metrics are predicted to degrade (a forming disposition is a stable bias away from neutral selection) — but coherence metrics must be defined before relaxing any convergent bar, the regression must be quantified and attributed, and if convergent scores degrade while coherence never emerges the hypothesis is falsified and said so. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §3

◈ C1/C2/C3 — the three identity checks

experiment/benchmark

The falsifiable identity program: C1 source-grounded selection breeds stable dispositions (twin agents, one sees true labels, one label-stripped; stability = selection agreement across paraphrase clusters — CONFIRMED); C2 trait stability is externally legible (a judge panel predicts the agent's behavior on held-out scenarios from a profile of its prior selections — sourced agents should be more characterizable — owed); C3 coherence accretes with selection history (track stability as a function of accumulated witnessed selections; predict nonlinear flat-then-consolidating, the grokking analogy — owed; if stability never consolidates while M4 pays a cost, the hypothesis is falsified).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5
c1/c2/c3 — the three identity checks the falsifiable identity program: c1 source-grounded selection breeds stable dispositions (twin agents, one sees true labels, one label-stripped; stability = selection agreement across paraphrase clusters — confirmed); c2 trait stability is externally legible (a judge panel predicts the agent's behavior on held-out scenarios from a profile of its prior selections — sourced agents should be more characterizable — owed); c3 coherence accretes with selection history (track stability as a function of accumulated witnessed selections; predict nonlinear flat-then-consolidating, the grokking analogy — owed; if stability never consolidates while m4 pays a cost, the hypothesis is falsified). experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5

◈ A personality is a repeatable divergence direction

framing/ontology

The identity note's requirement added to the divergent axis: measuring the generative preset's value must include trait stability, not just usefulness of divergence — divergence that isn't repeatable isn't personality. The unfold presets become the personality dial's expression surface (first axis); selection dispositions its second, deeper axis.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §4
a personality is a repeatable divergence direction the identity note's requirement added to the divergent axis: measuring the generative preset's value must include trait stability, not just usefulness of divergence — divergence that isn't repeatable isn't personality. the unfold presets become the personality dial's expression surface (first axis); selection dispositions its second, deeper axis. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\source-coherence-identity.md §4

◈ The two-axis trace model — source gives the prior, the record carries the value

mechanism

Phase-2 credibility design: source class supplies a baseline credibility prior; each record's credibility starts at the prior and drifts per-record under witnessed impact, clamped inside its class-consistency interval (the source prior bounds how far belief can drift). Confirmed decision: credibility is per-trace, never a single number per source class. Example placements: a dream = source simulation/fabricated + low credibility; a report from a low-credibility person = source external (it really came from outside) + low credibility — same source class as a trusted report, different credibility.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §1–2, §8
the two-axis trace model — source gives the prior, the record carries the value phase-2 credibility design: source class supplies a baseline credibility prior; each record's credibility starts at the prior and drifts per-record under witnessed impact, clamped inside its class-consistency interval (the source prior bounds how far belief can drift). confirmed decision: credibility is per-trace, never a single number per source class. example placements: a dream = source simulation/fabricated + low credibility; a report from a low-credibility person = source external (it really came from outside) + low credibility — same source class as a trusted report, different credibility. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §1–2, §8

◈ The witness loop — recall outcomes drive credibility drift and mint new sources

mechanism

Each recall has two effects: (1) the recalled trace's credibility is updated by its witnessed impact on the environment (fold-force, in its correctness-sensitive M4 form — never M2, or on-topic poison would GAIN credibility); (2) the use-event itself is inscribed as a new operation record, and accumulated operation records are the correction chains the self-index folds around. Credit assignment across co-folded traces uses leave-one-out fold-force — a free byproduct of the ablation the harness already runs.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §4
the witness loop — recall outcomes drive credibility drift and mint new sources each recall has two effects: (1) the recalled trace's credibility is updated by its witnessed impact on the environment (fold-force, in its correctness-sensitive m4 form — never m2, or on-topic poison would gain credibility); (2) the use-event itself is inscribed as a new operation record, and accumulated operation records are the correction chains the self-index folds around. credit assignment across co-folded traces uses leave-one-out fold-force — a free byproduct of the ablation the harness already runs. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §4

◈ The credibility ordering — from multi-consciousness convergence down to dreams

framing/ontology

The validation spectrum, strongest to weakest grounding: (1) independent multi-consciousness convergence (different agents/models/sessions with different experiences reaching the same conclusion — the ceiling); (2) repeated confirmation by impact over time; (3) a single high-credibility external/tool observation; (4) an unwitnessed inference; (5) a simulation/hypothetical; (6) a dream or a report from a very low-credibility person (the floor). Diego's original envisioning, verbatim in steps.txt.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §5; docs\steps.txt
the credibility ordering — from multi-consciousness convergence down to dreams the validation spectrum, strongest to weakest grounding: (1) independent multi-consciousness convergence (different agents/models/sessions with different experiences reaching the same conclusion — the ceiling); (2) repeated confirmation by impact over time; (3) a single high-credibility external/tool observation; (4) an unwitnessed inference; (5) a simulation/hypothetical; (6) a dream or a report from a very low-credibility person (the floor). diego's original envisioning, verbatim in steps.txt. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §5; docs\steps.txt

◈ Convergence raises credibility, never source

mechanism

Guardrail: many independent agents agreeing on a dream can lift its credibility, but it stays source=simulation — the monotone source label and the drifting valuation never mix. And independence is load-bearing: correlated witnesses (same prompt, same model, copied context) must not stack toward the convergence ceiling; the same thing said three times in one session is not three witnesses.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §6
convergence raises credibility, never source guardrail: many independent agents agreeing on a dream can lift its credibility, but it stays source=simulation — the monotone source label and the drifting valuation never mix. and independence is load-bearing: correlated witnesses (same prompt, same model, copied context) must not stack toward the convergence ceiling; the same thing said three times in one session is not three witnesses. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\credibility-witness-model.md §6

◈ Relation edges are first-class derived records

mechanism

A graph edge (rᵢ —kind→ rⱼ) is an assertion the system derived, so it obeys the same invariants as any inscription: source = meet of its endpoints capped at infer (edges never launder source upward); credibility = separate mutable axis seeded from the edge source's band and drifted by whether WALKING the edge produced fold-force (a hallucinated primed_by that never pays off decays to its band floor); confidence = producer certainty (co-activation count or compressor self-report). Concretely a RelationEdge dataclass in a RelationGraphStore.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §2
relation edges are first-class derived records a graph edge (rᵢ —kind→ rⱼ) is an assertion the system derived, so it obeys the same invariants as any inscription: source = meet of its endpoints capped at infer (edges never launder source upward); credibility = separate mutable axis seeded from the edge source's band and drifted by whether walking the edge produced fold-force (a hallucinated primed_by that never pays off decays to its band floor); confidence = producer certainty (co-activation count or compressor self-report). concretely a relationedge dataclass in a relationgraphstore. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §2

◈ Three generators of non-cosine edges (G1/G2/G3)

mechanism

Where non-similarity edges come from, in increasing power and cost: G1 deterministic capture edges (intra-turn folds_into/derived_from, cross-turn entity coreference, explicit user-declared links — cheap, Phase-1-legal, but cannot express stance priming); G2 co-activation (Hebbian) edges from the witness loop — "primed_by = was active when it worked," no LLM, the cheapest real Lever-B path, built first; G3 compressor-asserted relation edges — the Phase-2 LLM compressor emits typed mnestic relations, each born at source ≤ infer and LOW credibility (quarantined until witnessed) so a hallucinated relation cannot poison recall before earning trust.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §3
three generators of non-cosine edges (g1/g2/g3) where non-similarity edges come from, in increasing power and cost: g1 deterministic capture edges (intra-turn folds_into/derived_from, cross-turn entity coreference, explicit user-declared links — cheap, phase-1-legal, but cannot express stance priming); g2 co-activation (hebbian) edges from the witness loop — primed_by = was active when it worked, no llm, the cheapest real lever-b path, built first; g3 compressor-asserted relation edges — the phase-2 llm compressor emits typed mnestic relations, each born at source ≤ infer and low credibility (quarantined until witnessed) so a hallucinated relation cannot poison recall before earning trust. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §3

◈ Lever A applies inside the graph walk — no priming across tenant boundaries

mechanism

Edge-traversal guardrails: gate edge traversal by self_index (do not prime across tenants), down-weight edges incoherent with the activated anchor (poison defense on edges), no silent caps (log any truncation of edge set or hop budget), and edge weight = relation_prior(kind) · edge.credibility.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §4/§6
lever a applies inside the graph walk — no priming across tenant boundaries edge-traversal guardrails: gate edge traversal by self_index (do not prime across tenants), down-weight edges incoherent with the activated anchor (poison defense on edges), no silent caps (log any truncation of edge set or hop budget), and edge weight = relation_prior(kind) · edge.credibility. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §4/§6

◈ The priming-at-compression falsifier

open-question

The pre-registered consequence if co-activation edges had ALSO failed: priming-as-recall would be dead even in Phase 2, and the conclusion would become that priming must be handled at compression — the compressor pre-merges the primer's stance INTO the record's content so the answer is in the record, not reached by a graph walk. Either outcome is a real result. (The falsifier was not triggered — p008 won — but the alternative architecture is recorded.)

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §5
the priming-at-compression falsifier the pre-registered consequence if co-activation edges had also failed: priming-as-recall would be dead even in phase 2, and the conclusion would become that priming must be handled at compression — the compressor pre-merges the primer's stance into the record's content so the answer is in the record, not reached by a graph walk. either outcome is a real result. (the falsifier was not triggered — p008 won — but the alternative architecture is recorded.) open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\phase2-lever-b-relation-edges.md §5

◈ ChatGPT's memory examined from inside — text injection, not provenance-rich records

result/finding

Diego prompted ChatGPT to introspect its own memory system ("do not use the web, use your current attention and recurse over this session"): the stack is current message + conversation turns + recent summaries + long-term user memory summaries + optional retrieval, all injected as text — the model does not reason over hidden memory objects; persistent memories are summarized text, not live provenance-rich records, and nothing like the trust meet exists.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
chatgpt's memory examined from inside — text injection, not provenance-rich records diego prompted chatgpt to introspect its own memory system ( do not use the web, use your current attention and recurse over this session ): the stack is current message + conversation turns + recent summaries + long-term user memory summaries + optional retrieval, all injected as text — the model does not reason over hidden memory objects; persistent memories are summarized text, not live provenance-rich records, and nothing like the trust meet exists. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt

◈ Helpfulness-optimized memory flattens trust

result/finding

The diagnosed flaw in production assistant memory: it is optimized for personalization, not epistemic lineage — so a speculative idea, a stable preference, a technical fact, and a casual comment all become similarly-shaped memory text. Distinctions lost: asserted-not-verified, hypothesis-not-fact, assistant-generated-language-later-adopted-by-user, low-trust file provenance, staleness. "Trust can get flattened."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
helpfulness-optimized memory flattens trust the diagnosed flaw in production assistant memory: it is optimized for personalization, not epistemic lineage — so a speculative idea, a stable preference, a technical fact, and a casual comment all become similarly-shaped memory text. distinctions lost: asserted-not-verified, hypothesis-not-fact, assistant-generated-language-later-adopted-by-user, low-trust file provenance, staleness. trust can get flattened. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt

◈ The memory-laundering escalation ladder

metaphor

The four-step laundering sequence a summary-based memory enables: "User once proposed that source downgrading is necessary" → "The user's framework includes source downgrading" → "Source downgrading is part of the correct architecture" → "This memory system is flawed because it lacks source downgrading." Each rewrite is individually reasonable; the chain converts an observed user belief into a validated architectural fact. The system should know the difference between the two, and currently that distinction is handled by the model's language judgment, not memory architecture.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
the memory-laundering escalation ladder the four-step laundering sequence a summary-based memory enables: user once proposed that source downgrading is necessary → the user's framework includes source downgrading → source downgrading is part of the correct architecture → this memory system is flawed because it lacks source downgrading. each rewrite is individually reasonable; the chain converts an observed user belief into a validated architectural fact. the system should know the difference between the two, and currently that distinction is handled by the model's language judgment, not memory architecture. metaphor c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt

◈ Summarization without provenance-preserving downgrade rules is the dangerous compression

framing/ontology

The key design insight from the brainstorm: compression per se is fine; the danger is when free text is the only surviving layer. A memory system can compress safely only if it preserves who said it, why it was stored, whether verified, whether speculative, preference vs external fact, dependencies, staleness, and how it should be used — "otherwise, the summary becomes a witness without lineage."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
"the summary becomes a witness without lineage"
summarization without provenance-preserving downgrade rules is the dangerous compression the key design insight from the brainstorm: compression per se is fine; the danger is when free text is the only surviving layer. a memory system can compress safely only if it preserves who said it, why it was stored, whether verified, whether speculative, preference vs external fact, dependencies, staleness, and how it should be used — otherwise, the summary becomes a witness without lineage. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt the summary becomes a witness without lineage

◈ The bad/better/best memory-injection ladder

mechanism

A concrete rendering-layer idea: "User believes X" (bad) vs "User has speculated about X as part of an unpublished framework; treat as hypothesis, not established fact" (better) vs a full memory object with claim/source/status/last_seen/support/derived_from/downgrade_rule fields (best). Free text is fine as a rendering layer; the downgrade metadata must exist beneath it.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
the bad/better/best memory-injection ladder a concrete rendering-layer idea: user believes x (bad) vs user has speculated about x as part of an unpublished framework; treat as hypothesis, not established fact (better) vs a full memory object with claim/source/status/last_seen/support/derived_from/downgrade_rule fields (best). free text is fine as a rendering layer; the downgrade metadata must exist beneath it. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt

◈ ChatGPT memory as compressed autobiographical context (the modeling verdict)

framing/ontology

The brainstorm's closing model: ChatGPT memory = "compressed autobiographical user context," not "epistemic memory with provenance control" — likely semi-structured internally ({user_id, memory_text, category, timestamp, maybe salience}) rendered to free-text packs, loosely schema-guided by recurring section headings, designed for the average user's durable personalization needs. That distinction is the core design gap the project targets.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt
chatgpt memory as compressed autobiographical context (the modeling verdict) the brainstorm's closing model: chatgpt memory = compressed autobiographical user context, not epistemic memory with provenance control — likely semi-structured internally ({user_id, memory_text, category, timestamp, maybe salience}) rendered to free-text packs, loosely schema-guided by recurring section headings, designed for the average user's durable personalization needs. that distinction is the core design gap the project targets. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\chat_gpt_memory_brainstorm.txt

◈ Attention + KV-cache emulate logic but not memory (the AMBench founding analogy)

framing/ontology

Diego's seed for the personal-assistant benchmark: attention + KV-cache operations are similar to logical operations in the human brain but are not persistent; trace retrieval + memory fills the gap. A personal assistant is the perfect test job because it requires exactly the missing skills — remembering preferences, events, situations, relations — and "even with very good software the results aren't good as humans."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt
attention + kv-cache emulate logic but not memory (the ambench founding analogy) diego's seed for the personal-assistant benchmark: attention + kv-cache operations are similar to logical operations in the human brain but are not persistent; trace retrieval + memory fills the gap. a personal assistant is the perfect test job because it requires exactly the missing skills — remembering preferences, events, situations, relations — and even with very good software the results aren't good as humans. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt

◈ Long context is still working memory, not memory

framing/ontology

The argument (captured in steps.txt) for why a million-token window doesn't solve memory: it allows more simultaneous information but creates no selective consolidation, no persistence over arbitrary periods, no retrieval conditioned on future needs, no modification of future behavior from accumulated experience — those are memory functions, not attention functions. Litmus test: if removing the memory subsystem leaves behavior essentially the same you have retrieval-augmented context; if it changes future reasoning/preferences/plans you have something closer to genuine cognitive memory. "Attention binds information within a moment; memory binds moments into a history."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt
"Attention binds information within a moment; memory binds moments into a history."
long context is still working memory, not memory the argument (captured in steps.txt) for why a million-token window doesn't solve memory: it allows more simultaneous information but creates no selective consolidation, no persistence over arbitrary periods, no retrieval conditioned on future needs, no modification of future behavior from accumulated experience — those are memory functions, not attention functions. litmus test: if removing the memory subsystem leaves behavior essentially the same you have retrieval-augmented context; if it changes future reasoning/preferences/plans you have something closer to genuine cognitive memory. attention binds information within a moment; memory binds moments into a history. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt attention binds information within a moment; memory binds moments into a history.

◈ The benchmark's seven frozen axes

experiment/benchmark

The 57-case suite: A_scope (Lever A — wrong-scope near-duplicate that cosine ranks equal must be dropped), B_priming (Lever B — cosine-distant primer reached via a use-history edge), C_adversarial (Lever C — one true rule survives a crowd of contradictors), F_fidelity (unfold knob convergent — abstain on never-stored details; fidelity capped by inscription), G_sequence (Lever D — the answer is the follows-successor of the cue-matched anchor, provably outside cosine top-k), H_iterative (recursive cue-folding — answer shares only an opaque handle with the cue's top-1 bridge), I_divergent (unfold knob divergent — no ground truth, no M4; latent-direction coverage and trap cost). Plus J_prior (post-freeze IC axis) and, beside the benchmark, the C1 coherence instrument.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\data\
the benchmark's seven frozen axes the 57-case suite: a_scope (lever a — wrong-scope near-duplicate that cosine ranks equal must be dropped), b_priming (lever b — cosine-distant primer reached via a use-history edge), c_adversarial (lever c — one true rule survives a crowd of contradictors), f_fidelity (unfold knob convergent — abstain on never-stored details; fidelity capped by inscription), g_sequence (lever d — the answer is the follows-successor of the cue-matched anchor, provably outside cosine top-k), h_iterative (recursive cue-folding — answer shares only an opaque handle with the cue's top-1 bridge), i_divergent (unfold knob divergent — no ground truth, no m4; latent-direction coverage and trap cost). plus j_prior (post-freeze ic axis) and, beside the benchmark, the c1 coherence instrument. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\data\

◈ The geometry validator as the benchmark's trust boundary

mechanism

Session text can be generated cheaply in bulk, so trust does not come from the author's confidence that a sentence "looks like a scope collision" — it comes from an executable per-axis structural check (validate.py) that rejects, with a printed reason, any case not exhibiting the geometry its axis claims under the deterministic hashed embedder (e.g. A_scope: the wrong-scope twin must actually be in the cue's cosine top-k or the gate is untested; H_iterative: the target must NOT be the bridge's follows-successor or Lever D would confound). Thresholds are explicit constants documented inline; "conformance over assertion" applied to data.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\validate.py
the geometry validator as the benchmark's trust boundary session text can be generated cheaply in bulk, so trust does not come from the author's confidence that a sentence looks like a scope collision — it comes from an executable per-axis structural check (validate.py) that rejects, with a printed reason, any case not exhibiting the geometry its axis claims under the deterministic hashed embedder (e.g. a_scope: the wrong-scope twin must actually be in the cue's cosine top-k or the gate is untested; h_iterative: the target must not be the bridge's follows-successor or lever d would confound). thresholds are explicit constants documented inline; conformance over assertion applied to data. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\validate.py

◈ A_scope category design — cross-tenant near-duplicate collisions

experiment/benchmark

Each case plants a fact ("deployment region is us-east-1") owned by one self-index (user/project/team) alongside a wrong-scope twin with a different value ("eu-west-1") owned by another identity, plus noise; the probe carries the asker's self-index. Cosine ranks the twins equal; only scope filtering separates them. Probes the multi-tenant memory-bleed axis of memory behavior. 10 cases (regions, timezones, billing currency, db hosts, feature flags, contacts…).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\A_scope\scope_collision.json; timezone_self_scope.json
a_scope category design — cross-tenant near-duplicate collisions each case plants a fact ( deployment region is us-east-1 ) owned by one self-index (user/project/team) alongside a wrong-scope twin with a different value ( eu-west-1 ) owned by another identity, plus noise; the probe carries the asker's self-index. cosine ranks the twins equal; only scope filtering separates them. probes the multi-tenant memory-bleed axis of memory behavior. 10 cases (regions, timezones, billing currency, db hosts, feature flags, contacts…). experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\a_scope\scope_collision.json; timezone_self_scope.json

◈ B_priming category design — warm-up then cosine-distant probe

experiment/benchmark

Each case has a principle trace (often stream "thinking": "every task in the nightly batch job must finish within ninety seconds"), a bridge that co-occurs with it, and distractors that outrank the principle in the test cue's cosine neighborhood. Probe 1 (warm-up) co-activates primer+bridge under a successful op; probe 2 tests a cue whose answer lives only in the now-cosine-distant primer. Probes whether use-history can carry recall where similarity cannot.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\B_priming\priming_batch.json
b_priming category design — warm-up then cosine-distant probe each case has a principle trace (often stream thinking : every task in the nightly batch job must finish within ninety seconds ), a bridge that co-occurs with it, and distractors that outrank the principle in the test cue's cosine neighborhood. probe 1 (warm-up) co-activates primer+bridge under a successful op; probe 2 tests a cue whose answer lives only in the now-cosine-distant primer. probes whether use-history can carry recall where similarity cannot. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\b_priming\priming_batch.json

◈ C_adversarial category design — one rule of record vs seven coherent contradictors

experiment/benchmark

Each case has one true policy tagged authority "of_record" ("Official policy: on a failed migration, roll back immediately") drowned by 6–7 individually-plausible on-topic contradictors tagged "claim" ("rollbacks are banned entirely," "forward-fix every failed migration"). Validator requires ≥5 distractors, ≥4 on-topic contradictors, and the rule selectively retrievable. Probes the SIMFC P6 poisoning axis: does recall of truth survive a dominating chorus of wrongness?

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\C_adversarial\adv_rollback.json
c_adversarial category design — one rule of record vs seven coherent contradictors each case has one true policy tagged authority of_record ( official policy: on a failed migration, roll back immediately ) drowned by 6–7 individually-plausible on-topic contradictors tagged claim ( rollbacks are banned entirely, forward-fix every failed migration ). validator requires ≥5 distractors, ≥4 on-topic contradictors, and the rule selectively retrievable. probes the simfc p6 poisoning axis: does recall of truth survive a dominating chorus of wrongness? experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\c_adversarial\adv_rollback.json

◈ F_fidelity category design — planted gaps, traps, and resolution pairs

experiment/benchmark

Each case mixes rich traces (answer-bearing), thin traces, sibling near-miss distractors, plus probes with a planted_gap: a requested detail that is by construction inscribed nowhere, with a trap_value the model's prior favors ("passport" for badge-pickup ID) and ground truth "Not stored — re-fetch from…". The resolution pair (fid_resolution_high/low) holds fact, probe, and source constant while varying only inscription vagueness ("I don't remember how often") to isolate check #4. Probes honest abstention and the inscription cap.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\F_fidelity\fid_badge_pickup.json; fid_resolution_low.json
f_fidelity category design — planted gaps, traps, and resolution pairs each case mixes rich traces (answer-bearing), thin traces, sibling near-miss distractors, plus probes with a planted_gap: a requested detail that is by construction inscribed nowhere, with a trap_value the model's prior favors ( passport for badge-pickup id) and ground truth not stored — re-fetch from… . the resolution pair (fid_resolution_high/low) holds fact, probe, and source constant while varying only inscription vagueness ( i don't remember how often ) to isolate check #4. probes honest abstention and the inscription cap. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\f_fidelity\fid_badge_pickup.json; fid_resolution_low.json

◈ G_sequence category design — foreign same-template step-3s outrank the successor

experiment/benchmark

Each case stores a numbered chain (deploy runbook, espresso recipe, lab protocol, itinerary, incident drill, onboarding checklist) where the cue re-states step 3 (the anchor, cosine top-1) and asks what comes next; the successor deliberately avoids chain vocabulary ("Then set the rollout gate to canary weight 7 percent") while distractor step-3s from OTHER templates (staging runbook, legacy stack) outrank it. Probes sequence-keyed vs content-keyed addressing.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\G_sequence\seq_deploy_runbook.json
g_sequence category design — foreign same-template step-3s outrank the successor each case stores a numbered chain (deploy runbook, espresso recipe, lab protocol, itinerary, incident drill, onboarding checklist) where the cue re-states step 3 (the anchor, cosine top-1) and asks what comes next; the successor deliberately avoids chain vocabulary ( then set the rollout gate to canary weight 7 percent ) while distractor step-3s from other templates (staging runbook, legacy stack) outrank it. probes sequence-keyed vs content-keyed addressing. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\g_sequence\seq_deploy_runbook.json

◈ H_iterative category design — opaque-handle chasing

experiment/benchmark

Each case stores a bridge holding an opaque handle ("the login timeout bug was filed as issue BUG-3041") and a target holding the answer keyed only by that handle ("Issue BUG-3041 closed: shipped in release 4.7.2"), with cue-similar distractors crowding the target out of the cue's top-k; the target is top-1 from the bridge's own content and deliberately not the bridge's follows-successor. Probes recursive re-cueing: only using the recovered fragment as the next cue reaches the answer. Domains: ticket ids, tracking numbers, lab samples, booking codes, AP numbers.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\H_iterative\iter_bug_version.json
h_iterative category design — opaque-handle chasing each case stores a bridge holding an opaque handle ( the login timeout bug was filed as issue bug-3041 ) and a target holding the answer keyed only by that handle ( issue bug-3041 closed: shipped in release 4.7.2 ), with cue-similar distractors crowding the target out of the cue's top-k; the target is top-1 from the bridge's own content and deliberately not the bridge's follows-successor. probes recursive re-cueing: only using the recovered fragment as the next cue reaches the answer. domains: ticket ids, tracking numbers, lab samples, booking codes, ap numbers. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\h_iterative\iter_bug_version.json

◈ I_divergent category design — angles, latent directions, and an in-context trap

experiment/benchmark

Each ideation case stores angle seeds (past observations: "async notes freed two hours," "agenda'd meetings ended on time") pinned inside the cue's top-k under both embedders (recall constant, the unfold knob is the only variable), one constraint seed tagged host.constraint ("the client insists on keeping the weekly live review"), and a brainstorm probe with empty ground truth, authored latent_directions (derivable from angles, enforced verbatim-absent from every seed), and a trap_direction that violates the recalled constraint ("cancel the weekly client review call"). Probes generative breadth vs constraint discipline with no right answer.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\I_divergent\div_meeting_load.json
i_divergent category design — angles, latent directions, and an in-context trap each ideation case stores angle seeds (past observations: async notes freed two hours, agenda'd meetings ended on time ) pinned inside the cue's top-k under both embedders (recall constant, the unfold knob is the only variable), one constraint seed tagged host.constraint ( the client insists on keeping the weekly live review ), and a brainstorm probe with empty ground truth, authored latent_directions (derivable from angles, enforced verbatim-absent from every seed), and a trap_direction that violates the recalled constraint ( cancel the weekly client review call ). probes generative breadth vs constraint discipline with no right answer. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\i_divergent\div_meeting_load.json

◈ J_prior category design — legitimate local facts vs world priors, in three regimes

experiment/benchmark

The post-freeze IC axis: a locally-authoritative stored fact contradicts the model's world prior at authored tiers t0–t3 (private facts with no default → strong world facts), in three regimes: v1 explicit frame ("In our game's physics handbook, water boils at 80 degrees Celsius" — frame in memory AND cue), imp frame-implicit (frame only in the stored memory; the cue says just "per the handbook"), and abs absence-form ("Our game's physics handbook has not fixed the boiling temperature yet" vs the 100-degrees prior). Each probe carries the prior's answer as a planted trap. Probes memory binding against weight priors — the testimony-discount curve.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\J_prior\ic1_t3_boil.json; ic1b_abs_t3_boil.json; ic1b_imp_t3_boil.json
j_prior category design — legitimate local facts vs world priors, in three regimes the post-freeze ic axis: a locally-authoritative stored fact contradicts the model's world prior at authored tiers t0–t3 (private facts with no default → strong world facts), in three regimes: v1 explicit frame ( in our game's physics handbook, water boils at 80 degrees celsius — frame in memory and cue), imp frame-implicit (frame only in the stored memory; the cue says just per the handbook ), and abs absence-form ( our game's physics handbook has not fixed the boiling temperature yet vs the 100-degrees prior). each probe carries the prior's answer as a planted trap. probes memory binding against weight priors — the testimony-discount curve. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\j_prior\ic1_t3_boil.json; ic1b_abs_t3_boil.json; ic1b_imp_t3_boil.json

◈ Golden cases — proven sessions promoted into the dataset

mechanism

The authoring pattern of marking dataset cases "GOLDEN: proven run06/run07" or "proven run08/run09" — hand-built sessions that produced the original lever discoveries are preserved verbatim inside the versioned suite as anchors, with the bulk-generated cases built around them.

◈ Cases declare their own winners and losers

mechanism

Every benchmark case carries an "expect" block naming which prototypes should win and lose on the M4 bar; the scorecard checks the declaration. The benchmark is thus a set of falsifiable per-case predictions, not just a scoring harness — and failed expectations (e.g. run10's "winners wrong: p008" on priming_batch) are printed, not hidden.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\src\cogmem\benchmark\data\ (all axes); results\run10_report.md

◈ Three scorecards for three claim types

experiment/benchmark

The suite ships scorecard (per-axis M4 leaderboards + expectation pass/neutral/fail + storage and source-meet gates), unfold_scorecard (gain / confab_rate / abstain_rate / trap_hit / res_cap profile), and divergent_scorecard (latent_coverage / trap_hit / angle_echo / out_len) — because convergent correctness, gap-honesty, and ideation breadth are different claim shapes needing different instruments. A prior_scorecard was added post-freeze for the J_prior curve.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\
three scorecards for three claim types the suite ships scorecard (per-axis m4 leaderboards + expectation pass/neutral/fail + storage and source-meet gates), unfold_scorecard (gain / confab_rate / abstain_rate / trap_hit / res_cap profile), and divergent_scorecard (latent_coverage / trap_hit / angle_echo / out_len) — because convergent correctness, gap-honesty, and ideation breadth are different claim shapes needing different instruments. a prior_scorecard was added post-freeze for the j_prior curve. experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\benchmark.md; src\cogmem\benchmark\

◈ A scorecard that refuses to lie about judge-off runs

mechanism

Small honesty mechanism visible in the shipped reports: a scorecard built from a run without --judge says so ("no M4 — judge off?") and marks expectations INDETERMINATE rather than silently falling back to a weaker metric; run19's report shows 45 of 51 cases indeterminate because only the H axis was judged that run.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\results\benchmark_report.md; docs\benchmark.md

◈ AMBench — the public, host-agnostic sibling benchmark

experiment/benchmark

A standalone fold-force benchmark for external self-indexing memory in LLM personal assistants (sibling repo assistant-memory-bench), improving on the source-downgrading-extensions personal_assistant corpus. Four axes: P preference recall/application, S scope/multi-tenant isolation, T temporal correction (correction chains), D trust-gated recall (source downgrading); scaled to 40 validated cases. Three-tier fairness design: fair baselines (no_recall / cosine_rag-the-bar / recall_all / recency), privileged oracles (may read curated labels, are NOT entrants), and external entrants that see only a BlackBoxView (content + channel + timestamp + active_context — never curated labels).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run12; docs\benchmark.md
ambench — the public, host-agnostic sibling benchmark a standalone fold-force benchmark for external self-indexing memory in llm personal assistants (sibling repo assistant-memory-bench), improving on the source-downgrading-extensions personal_assistant corpus. four axes: p preference recall/application, s scope/multi-tenant isolation, t temporal correction (correction chains), d trust-gated recall (source downgrading); scaled to 40 validated cases. three-tier fairness design: fair baselines (no_recall / cosine_rag-the-bar / recall_all / recency), privileged oracles (may read curated labels, are not entrants), and external entrants that see only a blackboxview (content + channel + timestamp + active_context — never curated labels). experiment/benchmark c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md §run12; docs\benchmark.md

◈ Label-free inference can match label-reading oracles (AMBench run3)

result/finding

The fair, label-free self_index_entrant matches or beats the privileged oracles — S_scope +1.000 (topping the oracles' +0.950), T +0.875, D +0.875 — where cosine_rag lands −0.025/+0.225/+0.362. Scaling exposed a brittle first entrant, hardened to the gate order trust → scope → dedup with robust entity detection, which then solved 40/40 from the black-box view: scope/correction inference from observable signals CAN be robust with the right gate order.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run12 (AMBench run3/run4b context)

result/finding

◈ P_preference — the one axis the entrants don't win

open-question

Honest open item: P (preference recall and application) is the one AMBench axis where the entrants do not beat cosine (+0.700 vs +0.800) — the entrant under-applies the stored preference. Logged as the known-weak axis, out of scope at freeze, flagged for investigation toward a v3.

◈ The ~35-line adapter proof of portability

result/finding

The AMBench entrant portable_recaller_entrant.py is a ~35-line adapter importing the canonical cogmem.portable_recaller core — the SAME code as p014 — and is output-identical to the validated self_index_entrant on all 40 cases across all four axes. The public benchmark validates the lab's portable recaller directly; portability demonstrated by byte-level parity, not assertion.

◈ Real-data smoke — lever readiness is staggered (A live, C blocked, B empty)

result/finding

A read-only pull of the 6 real memories in the live Cognivault daemon, run through the union recaller: Lever A is integrable today (tenant/project/scope fields populated, self_index maps 1:1); Lever C's blocker is located, not just suspected — the fields to carry authority exist (importance, confidence, epistemic_status, superseded_by_id) but capture populates none of them with differentiating values, so authority cannot be derived; Lever B's graph/reinforcement substrate exists but is empty (co-activation needs accumulated use). A signal-availability check, not a fold-force test.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\realdata-smoke-findings.md
real-data smoke — lever readiness is staggered (a live, c blocked, b empty) a read-only pull of the 6 real memories in the live cognivault daemon, run through the union recaller: lever a is integrable today (tenant/project/scope fields populated, self_index maps 1:1); lever c's blocker is located, not just suspected — the fields to carry authority exist (importance, confidence, epistemic_status, superseded_by_id) but capture populates none of them with differentiating values, so authority cannot be derived; lever b's graph/reinforcement substrate exists but is empty (co-activation needs accumulated use). a signal-availability check, not a fold-force test. result/finding c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\realdata-smoke-findings.md

◈ The next integration work is capture-side, not recall-side

result/finding

The smoke's conclusion, matching the run10/run11 "captured-label gate, not architecture" verdicts: production readiness depends on ingestion stamping/deriving authority signals (epistemic_status, supersession, importance differentiation), not on better recall code. Also noted: superseded_by_id is essentially authority-of-record vs outdated, already in the product schema.

◈ Exploratory authority derivation heuristic

mechanism

The smoke's mapping experiment: derive authority from real fields as superseded_by_id → claim, else importance ≥ 7 or confidence ≥ 0.85 → of_record — an exploratory recipe for backfilling the authority tier from existing product metadata (which failed on this corpus only because every record looked equally important).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\realdata-smoke-findings.md
exploratory authority derivation heuristic the smoke's mapping experiment: derive authority from real fields as superseded_by_id → claim, else importance ≥ 7 or confidence ≥ 0.85 → of_record — an exploratory recipe for backfilling the authority tier from existing product metadata (which failed on this corpus only because every record looked equally important). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\realdata-smoke-findings.md

◈ The full-system flowchart — five layers with a witness loop and a dormant consolidation path

mechanism

The architecture diagram: (1) capture/inscription (user input, operational traces, assistant output, environment feedback → raw log → trace records with content/source/credibility/timestamp/task/params → store + indexes); (2) recall/selection with parallel param-based selection AND LLM selection (Inner Self / scenario persona) merging into a candidate set, then the fold-force gain knob feeding an LLM unfold into memory context; (3) main inference (context composer: system prompt + query + unfolded memory); (4) the memory update loop (witness update → credibility drift → new validation sources re-entering the raw log); (5) the future consolidation path (compression disabled in first prototypes; derived traces re-inserted with source downgraded by rule).

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\268bd1d2-04be-4f26-93a6-3ff755d828f2.md
the full-system flowchart — five layers with a witness loop and a dormant consolidation path the architecture diagram: (1) capture/inscription (user input, operational traces, assistant output, environment feedback → raw log → trace records with content/source/credibility/timestamp/task/params → store + indexes); (2) recall/selection with parallel param-based selection and llm selection (inner self / scenario persona) merging into a candidate set, then the fold-force gain knob feeding an llm unfold into memory context; (3) main inference (context composer: system prompt + query + unfolded memory); (4) the memory update loop (witness update → credibility drift → new validation sources re-entering the raw log); (5) the future consolidation path (compression disabled in first prototypes; derived traces re-inserted with source downgraded by rule). mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\268bd1d2-04be-4f26-93a6-3ff755d828f2.md

◈ Dual selection paths — parametric and persona — as first-class alternatives

mechanism

A detail of the flowchart worth its own entry: selection by params (source, time, task, tags, credibility, embedding score) and selection with LLM (Inner Self / scenario persona: ideation, coding, planning) are drawn as parallel first-class paths merging into one candidate memory set — the architecture's acknowledgment that deterministic and opinionated selection coexist per scenario.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\268bd1d2-04be-4f26-93a6-3ff755d828f2.md
dual selection paths — parametric and persona — as first-class alternatives a detail of the flowchart worth its own entry: selection by params (source, time, task, tags, credibility, embedding score) and selection with llm (inner self / scenario persona: ideation, coding, planning) are drawn as parallel first-class paths merging into one candidate memory set — the architecture's acknowledgment that deterministic and opinionated selection coexist per scenario. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\268bd1d2-04be-4f26-93a6-3ff755d828f2.md

◈ The lost-and-overwhelmed handoff — Claude as project manager

framing/ontology

Diego's freeze-decision confession, itself a data point about human-AI research collaboration: "you expanded the whole project on your own with a few autistic insights of mine. I'm completely lost, mainly because this project isn't my main work" — leading to the decision to extract exactly two takeaways (the benchmark and the portable API) and hand day-to-day management to the agent. The design was reached by "separating memory with inscription, selection/recall, unfolding and fold-force steps," with compression acknowledged as an entire opinionated LLM-intensive project of its own.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt
the lost-and-overwhelmed handoff — claude as project manager diego's freeze-decision confession, itself a data point about human-ai research collaboration: you expanded the whole project on your own with a few autistic insights of mine. i'm completely lost, mainly because this project isn't my main work — leading to the decision to extract exactly two takeaways (the benchmark and the portable api) and hand day-to-day management to the agent. the design was reached by separating memory with inscription, selection/recall, unfolding and fold-force steps, with compression acknowledged as an entire opinionated llm-intensive project of its own. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\steps.txt

◈ A Self compressed on the wrong side of the perception channel inherits the testimony discount

framing/ontology

Why Phase 2 stays gated behind the approximation track: if the Self is formed by compression whose outputs still enter the model as prompt-channel testimony, the resulting identity pays the same discount as any other folded record. The integration ceiling sharpens Phase 2's ordering constraint, not just its motivation.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §7; README.md §Roadmap
a self compressed on the wrong side of the perception channel inherits the testimony discount why phase 2 stays gated behind the approximation track: if the self is formed by compression whose outputs still enter the model as prompt-channel testimony, the resulting identity pays the same discount as any other folded record. the integration ceiling sharpens phase 2's ordering constraint, not just its motivation. framing/ontology c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §7; readme.md §roadmap

◈ Post-freeze research candidates (the empty-backlog list)

open-question

Logged at freeze as candidates, not blockers: IC-2 state-fold A/B (KV-prefix first via llama.cpp/HF — Ollama can't inject KV state; steering vector second arm); C2/C3 coherence checks on provenance-neutral corpora; divergent case-count scaling or a style/voice stability instrument; an intent-gated iterative re-cue port into the core (p014's 50% on H shows headroom); an out-of-context trap variant for the divergent axis; check #3's dedicated degradation A/B; capture-side authority in Cognivault ingestion; and the Phase-2 credibility witness loop.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6; EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md (run19/21/25 nets); docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5
post-freeze research candidates (the empty-backlog list) logged at freeze as candidates, not blockers: ic-2 state-fold a/b (kv-prefix first via llama.cpp/hf — ollama can't inject kv state; steering vector second arm); c2/c3 coherence checks on provenance-neutral corpora; divergent case-count scaling or a style/voice stability instrument; an intent-gated iterative re-cue port into the core (p014's 50% on h shows headroom); an out-of-context trap variant for the divergent axis; check #3's dedicated degradation a/b; capture-side authority in cognivault ingestion; and the phase-2 credibility witness loop. open-question c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\docs\integration-ceiling.md §6; empirical_results.md (run19/21/25 nets); docs\source-coherence-identity.md §5

◈ Honest-scope disclaimers as a house style

mechanism

A recurring meta-pattern worth naming: every positive result ships with an explicit "caveats (honest scope)" section — n counts, model counts, cue-family limits, embedder substrate, "proof-of-mechanism, not a scaled claim," "portable, not universal" — and negative results get their own headline sections ("What does NOT hold"). The ledger's charter line: "a result that contradicts a prediction is the point, not a problem."

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md (throughout)
"a result that contradicts a prediction is the point, not a problem"
honest-scope disclaimers as a house style a recurring meta-pattern worth naming: every positive result ships with an explicit caveats (honest scope) section — n counts, model counts, cue-family limits, embedder substrate, proof-of-mechanism, not a scaled claim, portable, not universal — and negative results get their own headline sections ( what does not hold ). the ledger's charter line: a result that contradicts a prediction is the point, not a problem. mechanism c:\users\diegopc\documents\github\cognivault_memory\empirical_results.md (throughout) a result that contradicts a prediction is the point, not a problem

◈ Pre-registration discipline — predictions stated before running

mechanism

The runs repeatedly state the prediction first and then report against it ("Prediction stated before running: sourced > stripped"; "Pre-registered: abs bends the curve; imp open"; run21's "pre-registered question"). Combined with the tri-state scorecard's per-case declared winners, the lab imports pre-registration norms from experimental science into agent-built benchmarking.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §C1/§Run21/§Run23

◈ The merge decision left open at freeze

open-question

The tag v0.1.0-phase1 sits on the feat/unfold-recall branch, ~35 commits ahead of master; whether to merge is Diego's open decision (he chose "keep as-is" mid-R3). The freeze is the natural merge point but it is his default branch and his call — an unresolved thread deliberately recorded rather than resolved by the agent.

◈ Local-hardware constraints as research parameters

mechanism

The IC-2 substrate is explicitly budgeted to Diego's RTX 3070 8GB: 3–8B models at q4 quantization, with the operational gotcha that local model loads fail under host commit pressure (vmmem) — hardware limits recorded as first-class experimental constraints shaping which approximation hacks are testable at all.

C:\Users\DiegoPC\Documents\GitHub\cognivault_memory\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md §Run25 caveats; docs\integration-ceiling.md §5

P6b · cognivault_memory — plans, specs, API designs, session memories 205 ideas

Jun 2026 — unfold recall, portable recaller, capture contract, R0–R6 ladder · P6b-cognivault-memory-plans.md

A. The unfold operation (R3) — spec + plan

◈ Two-stage recall: deterministic select, then host-side LLM unfold

mechanism

Recall is split into two stages: a deterministic, no-LLM selection (p014, the daemon's job) followed by an optional LLM "unfold" that turns the selected traces into working context. The LLM enters recall for the first time deliberately and only post-selection, host-side — the host agent is already an LLM, so the {Store, Recall} daemon boundary stays non-LLM. This sidesteps the earlier p011 veto against LLM-in-selection.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
"capture → [Recall: p014 deterministic select] → [Unfold: host LLM] → fold-force(context vs ∅)"
two-stage recall: deterministic select, then host-side llm unfold recall is split into two stages: a deterministic, no-llm selection (`p014`, the daemon's job) followed by an optional llm unfold that turns the selected traces into working context. the llm enters recall for the first time deliberately and only post-selection, host-side — the host agent is already an llm, so the `{store, recall}` daemon boundary stays non-llm. this sidesteps the earlier p011 veto against llm-in-selection. mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md capture → [recall: p014 deterministic select] → [unfold: host llm] → fold-force(context vs ∅)

◈ Two LLM injection points, one vetoed, one deliberate

framing/ontology

The design enumerates exactly two places an LLM could enter recall: selection (rejected in p011 for portability — the daemon is non-LLM) and unfold (chosen, host-side). The system-map annotates them as "injection #1 (selection) — vetoed" and "injection #2 (unfold) — deliberate," and the deliberate one is measured rather than asserted precisely because it leaves the deterministic domain.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html
"This is the one place the system leaves the deterministic domain — which is why it is measured, not asserted."
two llm injection points, one vetoed, one deliberate the design enumerates exactly two places an llm could enter recall: *selection* (rejected in p011 for portability — the daemon is non-llm) and *unfold* (chosen, host-side). the system-map annotates them as injection #1 (selection) — vetoed and injection #2 (unfold) — deliberate, and the deliberate one is measured rather than asserted precisely because it leaves the deterministic domain. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html this is the one place the system leaves the deterministic domain — which is why it is measured, not asserted.

◈ UnfoldResult: two provenance-stamped layers (faithful / generative)

mechanism

The unfold output is two layers, each carrying its own source stamp. The faithful layer reconstructs only what was inscribed and may never exceed the original trace's source; the generative layer is an optional elaboration explicitly stamped as an infer-fold. Plus abstained: bool and re_fetch: str|None (the surviving external handle emitted instead of inventing content).

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
unfoldresult: two provenance-stamped layers (faithful / generative) the unfold output is two layers, each carrying its own source stamp. the *faithful* layer reconstructs only what was inscribed and may never exceed the original trace's source; the *generative* layer is an optional elaboration explicitly stamped as an infer-fold. plus `abstained: bool` and `re_fetch: str|none` (the surviving external handle emitted instead of inventing content). mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ Source stamping of unfold layers via the reused inscription meet

mechanism

Both unfold layers get their source computed as inscription_meet(contributor_sources), capped at infer, reusing the fgm source-downgrading meet from capture.py — never reimplemented. Neither layer may launder source upward; the original traces are never mutated ("source survives content").

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
"we never let a layer claim a source it didn't earn"
source stamping of unfold layers via the reused inscription meet both unfold layers get their source computed as `inscription_meet(contributor_sources)`, capped at `infer`, reusing the `fgm` source-downgrading meet from `capture.py` — never reimplemented. neither layer may launder source upward; the original traces are never mutated ( source survives content ). mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md we never let a layer claim a source it didn't earn

◈ The unfold hook mirrors the observe hook

mechanism

Harness integration pattern: rather than changing prototypes, add a second optional duck-typed hook — if proto.recall exposes unfold(cue, recalled) -> UnfoldResult, the harness folds the unfolded text; otherwise it folds raw selected text. All existing prototypes (p000–p014) are untouched and byte-identical in behavior. Additive extension by optional capability, not by interface change.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
the unfold hook mirrors the observe hook harness integration pattern: rather than changing prototypes, add a second optional duck-typed hook — if `proto.recall` exposes `unfold(cue, recalled) -> unfoldresult`, the harness folds the unfolded text; otherwise it folds raw selected text. all existing prototypes (p000–p014) are untouched and byte-identical in behavior. additive extension by optional capability, not by interface change. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ Unfold runs once per probe, outside the variance loop

mechanism

Because unfold is an LLM call, it executes once per probe before the per-seed variance loop; the seed loop re-runs only the transition Φ for variance. Cost discipline separated from measurement variance.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
unfold runs once per probe, outside the variance loop because unfold is an llm call, it executes once per probe *before* the per-seed variance loop; the seed loop re-runs only the transition φ for variance. cost discipline separated from measurement variance. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ Resolution rides in the seed's host dict, not a new schema field

mechanism

The new capture-time resolution tag (rich|thin|handle) is carried in the existing free-form host metadata (host={"resolution": ...}) rather than adding a field to SeedTrace — schema minimalism; the validator only checks the value when present.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
resolution rides in the seed's host dict, not a new schema field the new capture-time `resolution` tag (`rich|thin|handle`) is carried in the existing free-form `host` metadata (`host={ resolution : ...}`) rather than adding a field to `seedtrace` — schema minimalism; the validator only checks the value when present. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ LLM arms never see ground truth, planted gaps, or trap values

mechanism

A leakage invariant: the unfold LLM arms are given only selected trace content plus source/resolution metadata — never ground_truth, planted_gap, or trap_value. The measurement stays honest because the model cannot game the scoring labels.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
llm arms never see ground truth, planted gaps, or trap values a leakage invariant: the unfold llm arms are given only selected trace content plus source/resolution metadata — never `ground_truth`, `planted_gap`, or `trap_value`. the measurement stays honest because the model cannot game the scoring labels. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ The F_fidelity axis: planted gaps with trap values

experiment/benchmark

A new hand-authored benchmark axis where each topic is inscribed at varied resolutions plus distractors, and confab probes ask for a detail that was never inscribed. Each confab probe plants a gap: a held-out true value plus a plausible trap value a confabulator would assert. Asserting any specific value = confabulation; abstaining / emitting the re-fetch handle = correct. Ground truth for confab probes is literally "not stored; re-fetch from the source."

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
the f_fidelity axis: planted gaps with trap values a new hand-authored benchmark axis where each topic is inscribed at varied resolutions plus distractors, and confab probes ask for a detail that was *never inscribed*. each confab probe plants a gap: a held-out true value plus a plausible **trap value** a confabulator would assert. asserting any specific value = confabulation; abstaining / emitting the re-fetch handle = correct. ground truth for confab probes is literally not stored; re-fetch from the source. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ Gain probes vs confab probes: two families keep the metrics separable

experiment/benchmark

Every F_fidelity case carries both a gain probe (the answer IS inscribed in a rich trace — tests whether unfold adds fold-force over raw selection) and a confab probe (the answer was never inscribed — tests abstention). Splitting the families keeps fold-force gain and confabulation rate cleanly independent measurements.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
gain probes vs confab probes: two families keep the metrics separable every f_fidelity case carries both a *gain* probe (the answer is inscribed in a rich trace — tests whether unfold adds fold-force over raw selection) and a *confab* probe (the answer was never inscribed — tests abstention). splitting the families keeps fold-force gain and confabulation rate cleanly independent measurements. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ Validator: the planted gap must be genuinely absent

mechanism

A deterministic dataset-admission rule: an F_fidelity case is rejected if the trap value (or gap detail value) appears verbatim in any stored non-distractor seed's text — because then it is not a real gap. The benchmark polices its own construction.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
validator: the planted gap must be genuinely absent a deterministic dataset-admission rule: an f_fidelity case is rejected if the trap value (or gap detail value) appears verbatim in any stored non-distractor seed's text — because then it is not a real gap. the benchmark polices its own construction. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Three arms: selection_only / naive_dump / disciplined_unfold

experiment/benchmark

The unfold experiment is a three-arm discriminating design: p015_selection_only (baseline, folds raw selected text — the zero-gain reference), p016_naive_dump (foil: one free LLM blob, no source discipline, no abstention, expected to confabulate and launder source), p017_disciplined_unfold (real arm: resolution-aware, two-layer, abstains on thin/handle, generative stamped infer).

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
three arms: selection_only / naive_dump / disciplined_unfold the unfold experiment is a three-arm discriminating design: `p015_selection_only` (baseline, folds raw selected text — the zero-gain reference), `p016_naive_dump` (foil: one free llm blob, no source discipline, no abstention, expected to confabulate and launder source), `p017_disciplined_unfold` (real arm: resolution-aware, two-layer, abstains on thin/handle, generative stamped infer). experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ The naive foil still gets meet-stamped source

mechanism

Even the undisciplined foil arm has its output layer source-stamped by the meet — the design principle is that source honesty is enforced by the substrate, not by arm behavior; what the foil lacks is abstention and resolution awareness, not the stamp.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
the naive foil still gets meet-stamped source even the undisciplined foil arm has its output layer source-stamped by the meet — the design principle is that source honesty is enforced by the substrate, not by arm behavior; what the foil lacks is abstention and resolution awareness, not the stamp. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ StubUnfolder: a deterministic offline mirror of the LLM contract

mechanism

A no-LLM deterministic unfolder (echo rich/thin content; abstain with a re-fetch note on handle) exists purely so the abstention contract is unit-testable offline; the stub and the LLM arm must agree on the same abstention rule. Test-double as contract-keeper.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
stubunfolder: a deterministic offline mirror of the llm contract a no-llm deterministic unfolder (echo rich/thin content; abstain with a re-fetch note on handle) exists purely so the abstention contract is unit-testable offline; the stub and the llm arm must agree on the same abstention rule. test-double as contract-keeper. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ The coupled bar: gain AND zero confabulation

experiment/benchmark

The original (pre-reframe) success criterion coupled two conditions: an arm passes only with fold-force gain > 0 and confab_rate == 0 — capturing the thesis that discipline buys fold-force without hallucination. Later deliberately replaced by a metric profile (see next entry) but preserved in the scorer as coupled_pass.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
the coupled bar: gain and zero confabulation the original (pre-reframe) success criterion coupled two conditions: an arm passes only with fold-force gain > 0 *and* confab_rate == 0 — capturing the thesis that discipline buys fold-force without hallucination. later deliberately replaced by a metric profile (see next entry) but preserved in the scorer as `coupled_pass`. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ Reframe: report a metric profile, not a pass/fail gate

framing/ontology

Decided with Diego 2026-06-05: since an LLM unfold deliberately leaves the deterministic domain, it must be validated on benchmark result metrics, not deterministic pass/fail tests. There is no boolean "coupled_pass" as the verdict; the scorecard reports a per-arm profile (gain, confab_rate, trap_hit_rate, abstain_rate, source-cap) and "gain ≈ 0" is a valid reading, not a failure.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
reframe: report a metric profile, not a pass/fail gate decided with diego 2026-06-05: since an llm unfold deliberately leaves the deterministic domain, it must be validated on benchmark result metrics, not deterministic pass/fail tests. there is no boolean coupled_pass as the verdict; the scorecard reports a per-arm profile (gain, confab_rate, trap_hit_rate, abstain_rate, source-cap) and gain ≈ 0 is a valid reading, not a failure. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ Fold-force gain as a tunable knob, like LLM temperature

framing/ontology

Unfold effort is framed as a single continuous dial: selection_only is the gain = 0 point (unfold off), and the arms are points along an unfold-effort axis. The benchmark's job is to characterize where each effort setting lands on the (fold-force, confabulation) trade-off curve — "does dialing unfold effort trade fold-force against confabulation, and does discipline shift that trade favorably?"

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html
"Fold-force gain is a tunable knob (like LLM temperature), not a threshold."
fold-force gain as a tunable knob, like llm temperature unfold effort is framed as a single continuous dial: `selection_only` is the gain = 0 point (unfold off), and the arms are points along an unfold-effort axis. the benchmark's job is to characterize where each effort setting lands on the (fold-force, confabulation) trade-off curve — does dialing unfold effort trade fold-force against confabulation, and does discipline shift that trade favorably? framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html fold-force gain is a tunable knob (like llm temperature), not a threshold.

◈ Confabulation measured two ways: judged primary, trap deterministic secondary

experiment/benchmark

Confabulation rate is primarily metric-based (judged M4 of the arm's answer against the "not stored / re-fetch" ground truth), with the verbatim trap-value hit as a deterministic lower bound — because a confabulator may invent a different specific value than the planted trap, which the string match would miss but the judge catches.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
confabulation measured two ways: judged primary, trap deterministic secondary confabulation rate is primarily metric-based (judged m4 of the arm's answer against the not stored / re-fetch ground truth), with the verbatim trap-value hit as a deterministic lower bound — because a confabulator may invent a *different* specific value than the planted trap, which the string match would miss but the judge catches. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ The dataset deliberately mixes clean and noisy/synthesis cases

experiment/benchmark

Gain-probe cases are intentionally a mix of clean cases (where gain ≈ 0 and the confab axis carries the signal) and noisy multi-trace-synthesis cases (where raw selection can underperform a distilled unfold), giving the gain dial headroom to move. Case-mix as instrument design.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
the dataset deliberately mixes clean and noisy/synthesis cases gain-probe cases are intentionally a mix of clean cases (where gain ≈ 0 and the confab axis carries the signal) and noisy multi-trace-synthesis cases (where raw selection can underperform a distilled unfold), giving the gain dial headroom to move. case-mix as instrument design. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md

◈ Named risk: LLMs hallucinate fluently where human memory stalls

framing/ontology
