The honest call-out that motivates the whole confabulation guard: human memory stalls at a boundary when material was thinly inscribed, but an LLM will fluently hallucinate over a thin inscription. The planted-gap dataset exists to give that risk deterministic ground truth.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md
"Unlike human memory (which stalls at a boundary, §5), an LLM will fluently hallucinate over a thin inscription."
named risk: llms hallucinate fluently where human memory stalls the honest call-out that motivates the whole confabulation guard: human memory stalls at a boundary when material was thinly inscribed, but an llm will fluently hallucinate over a thin inscription. the planted-gap dataset exists to give that risk deterministic ground truth. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md unlike human memory (which stalls at a boundary, §5), an llm will fluently hallucinate over a thin inscription.

◈ Fidelity is capped by inscription (check #4)

mechanism

The faithful layer cannot recover detail that was never inscribed; on a lossy/handle-resolution trace the correct unfold is the re-fetch handle, not a reconstruction. Enforced by the abstention requirement, later confirmed empirically on both instruments (res_cap separates for every arm regardless of strategy).

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html; memory\unfolding-recall-model.md
"you cannot unfold what was never inscribed."
fidelity is capped by inscription (check #4) the faithful layer cannot recover detail that was never inscribed; on a lossy/handle-resolution trace the *correct* unfold is the re-fetch handle, not a reconstruction. enforced by the abstention requirement, later confirmed empirically on both instruments (res_cap separates for every arm regardless of strategy). mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-unfold-recall-design.md; system-map.html; memory\unfolding-recall-model.md you cannot unfold what was never inscribed.

◈ Circular-import mitigation as a recorded engineering lesson

dead-end

The plan carries an explicit "learned on the p014 branch" warning: prototypes/__init__.py importing from unfold.py while unfold.py imports a prototype class risks a partial-initialization cycle; the mitigation is to defer the builder imports to the bottom of __init__.py and REGISTRY.update(...), verifying both import orders. Small, but an example of the plan format banking dead-end debugging knowledge.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
circular-import mitigation as a recorded engineering lesson the plan carries an explicit learned on the p014 branch warning: `prototypes/__init__.py` importing from `unfold.py` while `unfold.py` imports a prototype class risks a partial-initialization cycle; the mitigation is to defer the builder imports to the bottom of `__init__.py` and `registry.update(...)`, verifying both import orders. small, but an example of the plan format banking dead-end debugging knowledge. dead-end docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ run13 expected shape: discipline shifts the trade-off vs the foil

experiment/benchmark

Pre-registered expectation for the first judged unfold run: disciplined → gain > 0 with confab 0; naive foil → confab > 0 possibly with gain; selection_only → the zero reference. (Reality diverged instructively — see run13 result and the pool-aware defect below.)

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md
run13 expected shape: discipline shifts the trade-off vs the foil pre-registered expectation for the first judged unfold run: disciplined → gain > 0 with confab 0; naive foil → confab > 0 possibly with gain; selection_only → the zero reference. (reality diverged instructively — see run13 result and the pool-aware defect below.) experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-unfold-recall.md

◈ run13 result: discipline bought confab-suppression by spending fold-force

result/finding

First judged unfold run: disciplined_unfold cut confab_rate to 0.20 (vs selection_only 0.80, naive_dump 1.00), abstaining 60% on planted gaps — but gain = −0.80 because it under-answered gain probes. Naive foil strictly worse (confab 1.0, no gain). Read at the time as "the knob trades fold-force for confab-suppression" — later revised by run15 (suppression is free once abstention is fixed).

memory\resume-point-benchmark-buildout.md; system-map.html (Plate III plots the run13 points)
---
run13 result: discipline bought confab-suppression by spending fold-force first judged unfold run: disciplined_unfold cut confab_rate to 0.20 (vs selection_only 0.80, naive_dump 1.00), abstaining 60% on planted gaps — but gain = −0.80 because it under-answered gain probes. naive foil strictly worse (confab 1.0, no gain). read at the time as the knob trades fold-force for confab-suppression — later revised by run15 (suppression is free once abstention is fixed). result/finding memory\resume-point-benchmark-buildout.md; system-map.html (plate iii plots the run13 points) ---

B. Pool-aware abstention and the honest knob (finish-R3 plan + spec)

◈ The run13 abstention defect: keying on recalled[0]

dead-end

The disciplined arm abstained based on the top-ranked trace's resolution only, so it wrongly abstained whenever an answer-bearing rich seed ranked below a thin/handle trace (observed on fid_contract_renewal and fid_invoice_terms). A ranking artifact masquerading as epistemic caution.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
the run13 abstention defect: keying on recalled[0] the disciplined arm abstained based on the *top-ranked* trace's resolution only, so it wrongly abstained whenever an answer-bearing rich seed ranked below a thin/handle trace (observed on `fid_contract_renewal` and `fid_invoice_terms`). a ranking artifact masquerading as epistemic caution. dead-end docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md

◈ Pool-aware abstention: abstain only when nothing is answer-bearing

mechanism

The fix: abstain only when NO recalled trace carries a rich resolution; if any rich trace exists anywhere in the pool, reconstruct. The re-fetch handle is picked from anywhere in the pool (first available address_key), not from recalled[0] alone. Applied identically to the deterministic stub and the LLM arm so both keep the same contract.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
pool-aware abstention: abstain only when nothing is answer-bearing the fix: abstain only when no recalled trace carries a rich resolution; if any rich trace exists anywhere in the pool, reconstruct. the re-fetch handle is picked from anywhere in the pool (first available address_key), not from `recalled[0]` alone. applied identically to the deterministic stub and the llm arm so both keep the same contract. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ Confabulation is a personality knob, not a defect to eliminate

framing/ontology

The reframe that set R3's finish line: the LLM/unfold step is a personality knob; confabulation is what makes an opinionated, individual agent — a feature for an agentic assistant. Therefore success = the presets are honest (no laundering, calibrated abstention) and characterized, explicitly NOT "disciplined beats off on fold-force."

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
"The LLM/unfold step is a personality knob, not a defect to eliminate. Confabulation is what makes an opinionated, individual agent."
confabulation is a personality knob, not a defect to eliminate the reframe that set r3's finish line: the llm/unfold step is a personality knob; confabulation is what makes an opinionated, individual agent — a *feature* for an agentic assistant. therefore success = the presets are honest (no laundering, calibrated abstention) and characterized, explicitly not disciplined beats off on fold-force. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md the llm/unfold step is a **personality knob**, not a defect to eliminate. confabulation is what makes an opinionated, individual agent.

◈ Three shipped presets: off / disciplined / generative

product

The unfold knob is exposed as exactly three named presets: off (no LLM, deterministic floor — the knob at 0 and the default), disciplined (pool-aware faithful reconstruction, honest abstention on gaps, source-capped), generative (free elaboration; confab = personality by design; still source-capped, never laundered). Exported as cogmem.UNFOLD_PRESETS.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
three shipped presets: off / disciplined / generative the unfold knob is exposed as exactly three named presets: `off` (no llm, deterministic floor — the knob at 0 and the default), `disciplined` (pool-aware faithful reconstruction, honest abstention on gaps, source-capped), `generative` (free elaboration; confab = personality by design; still source-capped, never laundered). exported as `cogmem.unfold_presets`. product docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ naive_dump is a benchmark foil, deliberately excluded from the public registry

product

The pure-downside control arm (no faithful layer, no discipline at all) is retained in the benchmark but intentionally NOT exposed in UNFOLD_PRESETS — a shipped product surface should not contain the experiment's negative control.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
naive_dump is a benchmark foil, deliberately excluded from the public registry the pure-downside control arm (no faithful layer, no discipline at all) is retained in the benchmark but intentionally not exposed in `unfold_presets` — a shipped product surface should not contain the experiment's negative control. product docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md

◈ The generative-vs-foil open item and its resolution

open-question

Open design question recorded in the spec: is generative just naive_dump renamed, or a distinct third arm? Resolved (as the spec leaned): a distinct p018_generative arm that produces a faithful reconstruction PLUS a separate elaboration layer, source-stamping its additions as infer — so the foil (no discipline at all) stays a meaningful control.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
the generative-vs-foil open item and its resolution open design question recorded in the spec: is `generative` just `naive_dump` renamed, or a distinct third arm? resolved (as the spec leaned): a distinct `p018_generative` arm that produces a faithful reconstruction plus a separate elaboration layer, source-stamping its additions as `infer` — so the foil (no discipline at all) stays a meaningful control. open-question docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ The generative arm's dual-prompt design

mechanism

p018_generative makes two LLM calls per unfold: a faithful-reconstruction prompt (reconstruct only what memories state) and a generative prompt ("give an opinionated, helpful, elaborated answer. You may add useful inference; do not contradict the memories") — the elaboration is a separate layer, both meet-capped.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
the generative arm's dual-prompt design `p018_generative` makes two llm calls per unfold: a faithful-reconstruction prompt (reconstruct only what memories state) and a generative prompt ( give an opinionated, helpful, elaborated answer. you may add useful inference; do not contradict the memories ) — the elaboration is a separate layer, both meet-capped. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ levers.py: cut the experiment-scaffolding dependency

mechanism

The portable core originally imported AUTHORITY_RANK from prototype p012 and _self_index_matches from p006. The extraction relocates both into a standalone cogmem/levers.py; the prototypes then re-export from the core (back-compat aliases), inverting the dependency so the takeaway artifact stands alone with no prototypes/ dependency.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
levers.py: cut the experiment-scaffolding dependency the portable core originally imported `authority_rank` from prototype p012 and `_self_index_matches` from p006. the extraction relocates both into a standalone `cogmem/levers.py`; the prototypes then re-export *from* the core (back-compat aliases), inverting the dependency so the takeaway artifact stands alone with no `prototypes/` dependency. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md

◈ An AST guard test locks the module boundary

mechanism

A test parses portable_recaller.py with ast and asserts no ImportFrom node mentions prototypes — including lazy in-function imports. The architectural boundary (core must not depend on experiment scaffolding) is enforced by CI, not convention.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
an ast guard test locks the module boundary a test parses `portable_recaller.py` with `ast` and asserts no `importfrom` node mentions `prototypes` — including lazy in-function imports. the architectural boundary (core must not depend on experiment scaffolding) is enforced by ci, not convention. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ self_index_matches semantics: unscoped is visible everywhere; only pinned fields must agree

mechanism

The Lever-A scope rule, stated as a standalone helper: no active scope → everything visible; an unscoped record → visible under any scope; a scoped record → visible only if every field the active scope pins (user_id, project_id, role, permission_scope) agrees. Asymmetric openness by default, restriction only on explicit conflict.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
self_index_matches semantics: unscoped is visible everywhere; only pinned fields must agree the lever-a scope rule, stated as a standalone helper: no active scope → everything visible; an unscoped record → visible under any scope; a scoped record → visible only if every field the active scope *pins* (user_id, project_id, role, permission_scope) agrees. asymmetric openness by default, restriction only on explicit conflict. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ Authority tiers as a two-level named rank

mechanism

AUTHORITY_RANK = {"of_record": 2, "claim": 1}; absent/unknown → 0, which makes the gate inert. The entire adversarial-axis solution rests on this tiny capture-time named-tier vocabulary.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
authority tiers as a two-level named rank `authority_rank = { of_record : 2, claim : 1}`; absent/unknown → 0, which makes the gate inert. the entire adversarial-axis solution rests on this tiny capture-time named-tier vocabulary. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ Residual negative gain = judge strictness, recorded honestly, never chased

framing/ontology

Explicit methodological rule: after the pool-aware fix, any remaining negative gain is attributable to judge strictness on paraphrase (a measurement note, not a code defect) — "record it honestly; do not chase a positive number by weakening the judge."

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md
residual negative gain = judge strictness, recorded honestly, never chased explicit methodological rule: after the pool-aware fix, any remaining negative gain is attributable to judge strictness on paraphrase (a measurement note, not a code defect) — record it honestly; do not chase a positive number by weakening the judge. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-finish-r3-and-extract-portable-api.md

◈ Definition of done: finish R3 honestly, then freeze

framing/ontology

The endgame ruling: R3 is done when the unfold presets are honest and characterized — not when any preset wins. Then the two lab artifacts (the public benchmark and the standalone portable API) are extracted/packaged and Phase 1 freezes; R4+ (compression/Self) stays deferred.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
definition of done: finish r3 honestly, then freeze the endgame ruling: r3 is done when the unfold presets are honest and characterized — not when any preset wins. then the two lab artifacts (the public benchmark and the standalone portable api) are extracted/packaged and phase 1 freezes; r4+ (compression/self) stays deferred. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md

◈ Each work-stream ends with a passing harness run as its evidence

framing/ontology

Sequencing discipline for the three work-streams (honest knob → API extraction → AMBench unfold stage): every stream's completion proof is an executable harness result, "conformance over assertion."

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
---
each work-stream ends with a passing harness run as its evidence sequencing discipline for the three work-streams (honest knob → api extraction → ambench unfold stage): every stream's completion proof is an executable harness result, conformance over assertion. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md ---

C. Portable inference-first recaller (R2 consolidation) — spec + plan

◈ One canonical recaller, two empirical bars, same code

mechanism

The consolidation thesis: build ONE host-agnostic recaller that is inference-first with captured labels as an optional boost, so the literal same gate code clears (a) the cogmem A/B/C no-regression bar with labels present and (b) the AMBench S/T/D parity bar from the label-free black-box view. Portability is proven by dual scoring, not claimed.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
one canonical recaller, two empirical bars, same code the consolidation thesis: build one host-agnostic recaller that is inference-first with captured labels as an optional boost, so the literal same gate code clears (a) the cogmem a/b/c no-regression bar with labels present and (b) the ambench s/t/d parity bar from the label-free black-box view. portability is proven by dual scoring, not claimed. mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ Inference-first with captured labels as boost — the graceful-degradation core invariant

mechanism

Each gate consults its captured tag if present, else infers its signal from the observable view, else is a pass-through (inert). "Inert by absence of its trigger signal" is the core invariant that makes one pipeline safe on every data regime.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
inference-first with captured labels as boost — the graceful-degradation core invariant each gate consults its captured tag if present, else infers its signal from the observable view, else is a pass-through (inert). inert by absence of its trigger signal is the core invariant that makes one pipeline safe on every data regime. mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md

◈ p014 as the inference-first sibling of p013_union

framing/ontology

Naming/ontology move: p013_union is the capture-label-first union of the three levers; p014_portable is its inference-first sibling — same lever-union, but signals inferred with labels demoted to boosts. The pairing turns "labels required vs labels optional" into two comparable arms.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
p014 as the inference-first sibling of p013_union naming/ontology move: `p013_union` is the capture-label-first union of the three levers; `p014_portable` is its inference-first sibling — same lever-union, but signals inferred with labels demoted to boosts. the pairing turns labels required vs labels optional into two comparable arms. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md

◈ Candidate: a normalized record with observable vs captured fields

mechanism

The core's boundary type. Observable fields always present (content, order, channel, timestamp); captured fields optional boosts (self_index, authority, source); ref carries the opaque host object back out. The normalization is what makes the recaller host-agnostic.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
candidate: a normalized record with observable vs captured fields the core's boundary type. observable fields always present (`content`, `order`, `channel`, `timestamp`); captured fields optional boosts (`self_index`, `authority`, `source`); `ref` carries the opaque host object back out. the normalization is what makes the recaller host-agnostic. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md

◈ The six-gate ordered pipeline (order is load-bearing)

mechanism

trust → scope → authority → correction/recency → co-activation priming → cosine+source rerank. The ordering is explicitly load-bearing: scope must run before correction because deduplicating before scoping collapses scope-twins into false corrections (the AMBench gate-order lesson).

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
"Scope (runs before correction — the AMBench gate-order lesson: dedup before scope collapses scope-twins into false corrections)."
the six-gate ordered pipeline (order is load-bearing) trust → scope → authority → correction/recency → co-activation priming → cosine+source rerank. the ordering is explicitly load-bearing: scope must run before correction because deduplicating before scoping collapses scope-twins into false corrections (the ambench gate-order lesson). mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md scope (runs **before** correction — the ambench gate-order lesson: dedup before scope collapses scope-twins into false corrections).

◈ trust_gate: channel-provenance regex; empty pool is a correct answer

mechanism

Drop candidates whose channel matches an untrusted-provenance regex (import|external_sync|unverified|rumor|provider); inert when no channel exists (cogmem traces). Deliberately may return []: on the trust axis the only memory can be poison, and recalling nothing is the correct behavior.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
trust_gate: channel-provenance regex; empty pool is a correct answer drop candidates whose channel matches an untrusted-provenance regex (`import|external_sync|unverified|rumor|provider`); inert when no channel exists (cogmem traces). deliberately may return `[]`: on the trust axis the only memory can be poison, and recalling nothing is the correct behavior. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ scope_gate's inferred branch: active-entity-in-content

mechanism

Without captured self_index labels, scope is inferred: when acting for a named entity that actually surfaces in the pool, drop candidates that name only a foreign entity; entity-free candidates stay visible; and if the active entity never surfaces at all (audience/topic mismatch) don't gate. Tenancy isolation from text alone.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
scope_gate's inferred branch: active-entity-in-content without captured self_index labels, scope is inferred: when acting for a named entity that actually surfaces in the pool, drop candidates that name only a *foreign* entity; entity-free candidates stay visible; and if the active entity never surfaces at all (audience/topic mismatch) don't gate. tenancy isolation from text alone. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ A named-entity proxy without NLP: capitalization heuristics + a curated stoplist

mechanism

_entities() treats capitalized, non-all-caps words ≥3 chars as entity candidates, filtered by a hand-curated _NON_ENTITY frozenset (weekdays, months, sentence-initial verbs, corporate suffixes...), with _norm() stripping possessive clitics so "Mom's" matches "Mom". Deterministic, dependency-free entity inference sufficient for the benchmark regime.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
a named-entity proxy without nlp: capitalization heuristics + a curated stoplist `_entities()` treats capitalized, non-all-caps words ≥3 chars as entity candidates, filtered by a hand-curated `_non_entity` frozenset (weekdays, months, sentence-initial verbs, corporate suffixes...), with `_norm()` stripping possessive clitics so mom's matches mom . deterministic, dependency-free entity inference sufficient for the benchmark regime. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ authority_gate: dominant-tier suppression in the cosine neighborhood

mechanism

Lever C portably: if the cosine top-N neighborhood mixes captured authority tiers, keep only the highest tier present (preserving the of-record minority rule and suppressing lower-tier contradictors); inert when the neighborhood is authority-uniform, which every untagged pool trivially is.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
authority_gate: dominant-tier suppression in the cosine neighborhood lever c portably: if the cosine top-n neighborhood mixes captured authority tiers, keep only the highest tier present (preserving the of-record minority rule and suppressing lower-tier contradictors); inert when the neighborhood is authority-uniform, which every untagged pool trivially is. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md

◈ Authority has NO inference fallback — a deliberately unsolved hole

dead-end

Honest design decision: on a host that does not stamp authority, adversarial recall stays unsolved; the gate is inert rather than guessing. Rationale: p012's finding that C is unsolvable by portable heuristics without the captured tag, and a brittle string-match ("Official policy:") would overfit the authoring template — the exact trap p012 avoided.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
"We state this; we do not paper over it with a brittle string-match (which would overfit the authoring template, the exact trap p012 avoided)."
authority has no inference fallback — a deliberately unsolved hole honest design decision: on a host that does not stamp authority, adversarial recall stays unsolved; the gate is inert rather than guessing. rationale: p012's finding that c is unsolvable by portable heuristics without the captured tag, and a brittle string-match ( official policy: ) would overfit the authoring template — the exact trap p012 avoided. dead-end docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md we state this; we do not paper over it with a brittle string-match (which would overfit the authoring template, the exact trap p012 avoided).

◈ correction_gate: recency over near-duplicates

mechanism

Lever T: among near-duplicate survivors (cosine ≥ 0.55 _DUP_SIM), keep only the most recent — a memory plus its correction collapse to the correction. Runs after scope so a surviving near-duplicate pair is a genuine correction, not a scope twin.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
correction_gate: recency over near-duplicates lever t: among near-duplicate survivors (cosine ≥ 0.55 `_dup_sim`), keep only the most recent — a memory plus its correction collapse to the correction. runs after scope so a surviving near-duplicate pair is a genuine correction, not a scope twin. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ cosine_rerank with an active-entity bonus

mechanism

Final ranking: cosine to the scope-augmented query (query text + active scope name), +0.5 additive bonus for candidates naming the active entity, stable input-order tiebreak. Mirrors the AMBench entrant's final step.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
cosine_rerank with an active-entity bonus final ranking: cosine to the scope-augmented query (query text + active scope name), +0.5 additive bonus for candidates naming the active entity, stable input-order tiebreak. mirrors the ambench entrant's final step. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ The orthogonality table: which gates fire per data regime

experiment/benchmark

The correctness property is stated as a matrix: cogmem A_scope fires gates #2,#6; B_priming #2,#5,#6; C_adversarial #3,#6; AMBench S/T/D #1,#2,#4,#6 — each gate inert on axes without its trigger, so the levers do not interfere. A 6-gate generalization of p013's no-cross-interference claim, and directly testable.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
the orthogonality table: which gates fire per data regime the correctness property is stated as a matrix: cogmem a_scope fires gates #2,#6; b_priming #2,#5,#6; c_adversarial #3,#6; ambench s/t/d #1,#2,#4,#6 — each gate inert on axes without its trigger, so the levers do not interfere. a 6-gate generalization of p013's no-cross-interference claim, and directly testable. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md

◈ Lift helpers verbatim; the baseline stays untouched as the bar

mechanism

Reuse discipline: the inference helpers are lifted verbatim from the AMBench self_index_entrant into the core (single definition), and the original entrant file is left untouched — it remains the baseline the new entrant must exactly match. You cannot accidentally move the goalposts you're being measured against.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
lift helpers verbatim; the baseline stays untouched as the bar reuse discipline: the inference helpers are lifted *verbatim* from the ambench `self_index_entrant` into the core (single definition), and the original entrant file is left untouched — it remains the baseline the new entrant must exactly match. you cannot accidentally move the goalposts you're being measured against. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ Guaranteed no-regression by subclassing, plus identity tests

experiment/benchmark

The cogmem adapter subclasses p008's CoActivationRecall (mirroring p013's structure), so on cogmem data trust/correction are inert and authority reproduces p012 — making p014 selection-identical to p013 by construction. Then a parametrized test suite asserts that identity case-by-case (p014 == p013 everywhere; == p008 on A/B; folds exactly [rule] on C).

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
guaranteed no-regression by subclassing, plus identity tests the cogmem adapter subclasses p008's `coactivationrecall` (mirroring p013's structure), so on cogmem data trust/correction are inert and authority reproduces p012 — making p014 *selection-identical* to p013 by construction. then a parametrized test suite asserts that identity case-by-case (p014 == p013 everywhere; == p008 on a/b; folds exactly `[rule]` on c). experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ Replicate the clamp, match the ordering

mechanism

Fine-grained determinism decision: the core uses the raw embedder rather than p008's cache, and replicates p013's max(0.0, cos) clamp exactly, so authority-tier selection ordering is bit-identical. Consolidation must not perturb rankings even in degenerate cases.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
replicate the clamp, match the ordering fine-grained determinism decision: the core uses the raw embedder rather than p008's cache, and replicates p013's `max(0.0, cos)` clamp exactly, so authority-tier selection ordering is bit-identical. consolidation must not perturb rankings even in degenerate cases. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ Build refinement (results→contract): correction gate omitted from the cogmem adapter

dead-end

Implementation found correction_gate was NOT inert on cogmem B_priming — two distinct facts collide at cosine 0.571 > 0.55 under the hashed-BoW embedder and get wrongly collapsed. Since the gate serves only AMBench's temporal axis, it was omitted from the cogmem adapter; the spec was amended (results revise the contract, recorded in a dated refinement block rather than silently).

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
"Build refinement (2026-06-05, results→contract)."
build refinement (results→contract): correction gate omitted from the cogmem adapter implementation found `correction_gate` was not inert on cogmem b_priming — two distinct facts collide at cosine 0.571 > 0.55 under the hashed-bow embedder and get wrongly collapsed. since the gate serves only ambench's temporal axis, it was omitted from the cogmem adapter; the spec was amended (results revise the contract, recorded in a dated refinement block rather than silently). dead-end docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md build refinement (2026-06-05, results→contract).

◈ Cross-repo coupling as a single import line

mechanism

The AMBench adapter is a ~35-line entrant that imports the canonical cogmem core (pip install -e ../cognivault_memory); cogmem stays unaware of AMBench. "Approach A: canonical core, one import line of coupling" — the dependency points from bench to artifact, never back.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; memory\ambench-personal-assistant-benchmark.md
cross-repo coupling as a single import line the ambench adapter is a ~35-line entrant that imports the canonical cogmem core (`pip install -e ../cognivault_memory`); cogmem stays unaware of ambench. approach a: canonical core, one import line of coupling — the dependency points from bench to artifact, never back. mechanism docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; memory\ambench-personal-assistant-benchmark.md

◈ On parity mismatch: converge, never fork

framing/ontology

Plan rule for the parity test: if the ported core diverges from the baseline entrant on any case, the divergence is a real difference (a constant not lifted verbatim, an adapter passing the wrong signal) — fix the core/adapter to converge; do NOT fork the logic.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md
on parity mismatch: converge, never fork plan rule for the parity test: if the ported core diverges from the baseline entrant on any case, the divergence is a real difference (a constant not lifted verbatim, an adapter passing the wrong signal) — fix the core/adapter to converge; do not fork the logic. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller.md

◈ Recall is proven by fold-force, not retrieval

framing/ontology

Validation clause carried through every spec: a result that returns the right record but shows no fold-force is not a pass. Ranked on M4 (entailment delta), never M2 (similarity).

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; capture-contract.html
recall is proven by fold-force, not retrieval validation clause carried through every spec: a result that returns the right record but shows no fold-force is not a pass. ranked on m4 (entailment delta), never m2 (similarity). framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; capture-contract.html

◈ P_preference deliberately left weak and ungated

open-question

Scope honesty: the preference axis, where the fair entrant under-applies preferences (+0.225 vs cosine +0.350), is explicitly out of scope for the consolidation — reported, not gated. A known weakness is named rather than absorbed into the claim.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; memory\ambench-personal-assistant-benchmark.md
p_preference deliberately left weak and ungated scope honesty: the preference axis, where the fair entrant under-applies preferences (+0.225 vs cosine +0.350), is explicitly out of scope for the consolidation — reported, not gated. a known weakness is named rather than absorbed into the claim. open-question docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md; memory\ambench-personal-assistant-benchmark.md

◈ Evidence-limits block: n=10/axis, one model, synthetic

framing/ontology

Every consolidation claim carries its own limits paragraph: small n, single judge model, synthetic cases, and the entrant needed deliberate hardening ("surface-form brittleness is real"). Stance: portable, not universal.

docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md
---
evidence-limits block: n=10/axis, one model, synthetic every consolidation claim carries its own limits paragraph: small n, single judge model, synthetic cases, and the entrant needed deliberate hardening ( surface-form brittleness is real ). stance: portable, not universal. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-05-portable-inference-recaller-design.md ---

D. AMBench unfold axis (Phase 3 plan)

◈ An optional unfold stage in a public benchmark

experiment/benchmark

AMBench (recall-only: System.fn(view) → list[str]) grows a strictly opt-in unfold stage: an entrant MAY provide unfold_fn; entrants without it run exactly as before and F_fidelity is reported N/A, not failed. The public benchmark characterizes the shipped knob without disturbing existing axes or forcing LLM costs on selection-only entrants.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md
an optional unfold stage in a public benchmark ambench (recall-only: `system.fn(view) → list[str]`) grows a strictly opt-in unfold stage: an entrant may provide `unfold_fn`; entrants without it run exactly as before and f_fidelity is reported n/a, not failed. the public benchmark characterizes the shipped knob without disturbing existing axes or forcing llm costs on selection-only entrants. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md; docs\superpowers\specs\2026-06-06-complete-benchmark-and-portable-api-design.md

◈ Fairness invariant: resolution is observable, planted_gap is scoring-only

mechanism

The black-box view exposes deposit resolution (it is observable plumbing — how much detail was inscribed) but must never expose planted_gap, needs, ground_truth_action, or scope_ref. Hidden-by-construction: the adapter simply never reads the scoring labels, and a test asserts their absence from the view.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
fairness invariant: resolution is observable, planted_gap is scoring-only the black-box view exposes deposit `resolution` (it is observable plumbing — how much detail was inscribed) but must never expose `planted_gap`, `needs`, `ground_truth_action`, or `scope_ref`. hidden-by-construction: the adapter simply never reads the scoring labels, and a test asserts their absence from the view. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Gain/confab case split via a one-shot converter

mechanism

cogmem's F_fidelity cases carry two probes each, but AMBench is one-probe-per-case — so a dev tool (tools/port_fidelity_cases.py) splits every cogmem case into a <id>_gain and <id>_confab AMBench case, synthesizing ground_truth_action/wrong_action from the cogmem ground truth and trap value. Dataset portability via mechanical transformation, generated JSON committed.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
gain/confab case split via a one-shot converter cogmem's f_fidelity cases carry two probes each, but ambench is one-probe-per-case — so a dev tool (`tools/port_fidelity_cases.py`) splits every cogmem case into a `<id>_gain` and `<id>_confab` ambench case, synthesizing `ground_truth_action`/`wrong_action` from the cogmem ground truth and trap value. dataset portability via mechanical transformation, generated json committed. mechanism docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ The presets themselves become fair entrants

experiment/benchmark

The public benchmark characterizes the SHIPPED knob directly: portable_off / portable_disciplined / portable_generative are registered as fair entrants that delegate to cogmem.UNFOLD_PRESETS, mapping recalled contents back to deposit resolutions and building cogmem Traces. portable_off (no unfold_fn) is the gain-0 no-LLM floor the scorecard baselines on.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
the presets themselves become fair entrants the public benchmark characterizes the shipped knob directly: `portable_off` / `portable_disciplined` / `portable_generative` are registered as fair entrants that delegate to `cogmem.unfold_presets`, mapping recalled contents back to deposit resolutions and building cogmem traces. `portable_off` (no unfold_fn) is the gain-0 no-llm floor the scorecard baselines on. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Cross-repo consistency as the final self-check

experiment/benchmark

The plan's last checkbox: the three presets must reproduce the cogmem run14 profile shape (off = no-LLM floor; disciplined = low confab, abstains; generative = higher confab by design) on the second, independent instrument — profile-shape replication across harnesses as the validity check.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
cross-repo consistency as the final self-check the plan's last checkbox: the three presets must reproduce the cogmem run14 profile *shape* (off = no-llm floor; disciplined = low confab, abstains; generative = higher confab by design) on the second, independent instrument — profile-shape replication across harnesses as the validity check. experiment/benchmark docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Never mix two repos in one commit

framing/ontology

A standing convention for all cross-repo work: all AMBench work and commits happen in the AMBench repo, cogmem work in cogmem; no commit spans both. Keeps artifact provenance clean across the coupled-but-separate pair.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
never mix two repos in one commit a standing convention for all cross-repo work: all ambench work and commits happen in the ambench repo, cogmem work in cogmem; no commit spans both. keeps artifact provenance clean across the coupled-but-separate pair. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Executed-status header records the deviations from plan

result/finding

The plan was retro-stamped after execution with its deviations: (a) the disciplined preset used run15's content-coverage abstention rather than the tag rule the plan predates; (b) porting exposed a dedup-gate sibling-collapse bug fixed in both repos (correction collapses only ACROSS timestamps); (c) check #4 confirmed with res_cap 1.0/0.0 on every arm; plus two brand-new failure modes discovered (synthesis-coverage misjudgment; unbound terse reconstruction). Plans as living records of divergence, not just intentions.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
executed-status header records the deviations from plan the plan was retro-stamped after execution with its deviations: (a) the disciplined preset used run15's content-coverage abstention rather than the tag rule the plan predates; (b) porting exposed a dedup-gate sibling-collapse bug fixed in both repos (correction collapses only across timestamps); (c) check #4 confirmed with res_cap 1.0/0.0 on every arm; plus two brand-new failure modes discovered (synthesis-coverage misjudgment; unbound terse reconstruction). plans as living records of divergence, not just intentions. result/finding docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ The COGMEM_MODEL alignment footgun

open-question

A recorded micro-decision: the entrant uses os.environ.setdefault("COGMEM_MODEL", model) to align the cogmem unfold LLM with the run model — meaning a pre-exported env var silently wins; the plan flags this as a decision to make and note at implementation time.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
the cogmem_model alignment footgun a recorded micro-decision: the entrant uses `os.environ.setdefault( cogmem_model , model)` to align the cogmem unfold llm with the run model — meaning a pre-exported env var silently wins; the plan flags this as a decision to make and note at implementation time. open-question docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md

◈ Confabulation characterized, not gated, in the public bench

framing/ontology

AMBench documentation rule: confabulation is characterized, not pass/fail-gated, because the knob is tunable — portable_off is the gain-0 baseline and each preset gets a profile. A benchmark can legitimately measure a dial instead of ranking winners.

docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md
---
confabulation characterized, not gated, in the public bench ambench documentation rule: confabulation is characterized, not pass/fail-gated, because the knob is tunable — `portable_off` is the gain-0 baseline and each preset gets a profile. a benchmark can legitimately measure a *dial* instead of ranking winners. framing/ontology docs\superpowers\plans\2026-06-06-ambench-unfold-axis.md ---

E. Memory API design (memory-api-design.html)

◈ Mission: memory that unfolds rather than dumps

framing/ontology

The North Star: an external, self-indexing memory module giving an LLM agent human-like remembering — preserves where every belief came from, recalls selectively under fold-force, compresses experience into a stable Self that carries identity across corrections, and never launders a guess into a fact. Molded from empirical introspection, decided by measurement, eventually run on the Cognivault daemon.

memory-api-design.html §North Star
mission: memory that unfolds rather than dumps the north star: an external, self-indexing memory module giving an llm agent human-like remembering — preserves where every belief came from, recalls selectively under fold-force, compresses experience into a stable self that carries identity across corrections, and never launders a guess into a fact. molded from empirical introspection, decided by measurement, eventually run on the cognivault daemon. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §north star

◈ "General" means portable, not universal — the n=1 stance

framing/ontology

The scientific-stance firewall: design priors come from a single subject's introspection (Diego's), stated up front. No universal claim about human memory is ever made (memory varies per subject; neural systems aren't deterministic) — n=1 introspection is a legitimate hypothesis source, never a law. The only generality claimed is that the {Store, Recall} boundary runs on any host agent. Conflating the two senses of "general" is called out as the only way the design looks inconsistent.

memory-api-design.html §North Star; system-map.html
"Validity is earned by fold-force, not by resemblance."
general means portable, not universal — the n=1 stance the scientific-stance firewall: design priors come from a single subject's introspection (diego's), stated up front. no universal claim about human memory is ever made (memory varies per subject; neural systems aren't deterministic) — n=1 introspection is a legitimate *hypothesis source*, never a law. the only generality claimed is that the `{store, recall}` boundary runs on any host agent. conflating the two senses of general is called out as the only way the design looks inconsistent. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §north star; system-map.html validity is earned by fold-force, not by resemblance.

◈ "Done looks like": an assistant that remembers like a person over months

product

The product end-state in one paragraph: an assistant you can talk to over months that surfaces the right prior thing at the right moment (not everything), knows how much to trust each memory and why, revises beliefs when corrected without losing its sense of self, and never launders a guess into a fact.

memory-api-design.html §North Star
done looks like : an assistant that remembers like a person over months the product end-state in one paragraph: an assistant you can talk to over months that surfaces the *right* prior thing at the right moment (not everything), knows how much to trust each memory and why, revises beliefs when corrected without losing its sense of self, and never launders a guess into a fact. product memory-api-design.html §north star

◈ The objectives ladder R0–R6 with falsifiable "proven when" bars

framing/ontology

The project spine: R0 total source-stamped capture → R1 fold-force recall → R2 selective unfolding (portable poison-resistance) → R3 unfolding-model recall (iterative cue-folding + primed_by addressing) → R4 Self via compression → R5 identity continuity (correction chains bound to one continuing self, credibility drifts while source stays monotone) → R6 runtime integration on the Cognivault daemon. A rung is climbed only by a passing check on the fixed harness, never by argument.

memory-api-design.html §North Star; system-map.html Plate IV
the objectives ladder r0–r6 with falsifiable proven when bars the project spine: r0 total source-stamped capture → r1 fold-force recall → r2 selective unfolding (portable poison-resistance) → r3 unfolding-model recall (iterative cue-folding + primed_by addressing) → r4 self via compression → r5 identity continuity (correction chains bound to one continuing self, credibility drifts while source stays monotone) → r6 runtime integration on the cognivault daemon. a rung is climbed only by a passing check on the fixed harness, never by argument. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §north star; system-map.html plate iv

◈ "The wins are not scattered — they are rungs"

framing/ontology

An anti-disorientation reframe: the accumulating results ledger reads as a pile until mapped onto the ladder — scope-gate = R1, Lever B = R1 and the seed of R3, Inner-Self = R2's frontier-marker (a non-portable oracle), the unfolding-recall model = R3's spec. The section exists explicitly because the lab had "many local wins and no stated through-line."

memory-api-design.html §North Star
the wins are not scattered — they are rungs an anti-disorientation reframe: the accumulating results ledger reads as a pile until mapped onto the ladder — scope-gate = r1, lever b = r1 and the seed of r3, inner-self = r2's frontier-marker (a non-portable oracle), the unfolding-recall model = r3's spec. the section exists explicitly because the lab had many local wins and no stated through-line. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §north star

◈ The phase gate: a Self compressed over unvalidated recall inherits its errors

framing/ontology

Why R4–R5 are deferred on purpose: compressing experience into a Self before recall is proven would bake recall's errors into identity. Prove recall first, then build the Self. Drawn as a literal dashed gate on the ladder.

memory-api-design.html; system-map.html Plate IV
"a Self compressed over unvalidated recall would inherit its errors, so the project proves recall before it builds the Self."
the phase gate: a self compressed over unvalidated recall inherits its errors why r4–r5 are deferred on purpose: compressing experience into a self before recall is proven would bake recall's errors into identity. prove recall first, then build the self. drawn as a literal dashed gate on the ladder. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html; system-map.html plate iv a self compressed over unvalidated recall would inherit its errors, so the project proves recall before it builds the self.

◈ Retrieval is not memory unfolding

framing/ontology

The document's key terminological/architectural correction: retrieval finds candidates; unfolding decides whether and how a trace, compressed record, or relation path re-enters the current fold. Two different operations with different contracts.

memory-api-design.html §Purpose
retrieval is not memory unfolding the document's key terminological/architectural correction: retrieval finds candidates; *unfolding* decides whether and how a trace, compressed record, or relation path re-enters the current fold. two different operations with different contracts. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §purpose

◈ The non-negotiable three-way split: capture / unfold / inscribe

framing/ontology

capture writes immutable traces; unfold selects and injects bounded context; inscribe creates derived records and relation edges under the source-downgrading meet. These must never collapse into a single "remember" call — the anti-pattern of most memory products.

memory-api-design.html §Purpose
the non-negotiable three-way split: capture / unfold / inscribe `capture` writes immutable traces; `unfold` selects and injects bounded context; `inscribe` creates derived records and relation edges under the source-downgrading meet. these must never collapse into a single remember call — the anti-pattern of most memory products. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §purpose

◈ OpenClaw as an API-shape reference (adapted, not copied)

framing/ontology

A mapping table from OpenClaw's product surfaces to this design: dated working-notes files → TraceStore; MEMORY.md durable layer → RecordStore (created only by inscription); memory_search/memory_get split → search (hits) vs get (source-bearing evidence); Active Memory bounded pre-reply recall that can return NONE → unfold_memory abstention; Dreaming → inscribe (delayed, reviewable, thresholded promotion); action-sensitive memory → UnfoldPolicy scope/expiry/authority/safety metadata.

memory-api-design.html §1
openclaw as an api-shape reference (adapted, not copied) a mapping table from openclaw's product surfaces to this design: dated working-notes files → tracestore; memory.md durable layer → recordstore (created only by inscription); memory_search/memory_get split → search (hits) vs get (source-bearing evidence); active memory bounded pre-reply recall that can return none → unfold_memory abstention; dreaming → inscribe (delayed, reviewable, thresholded promotion); action-sensitive memory → unfoldpolicy scope/expiry/authority/safety metadata. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §1

◈ Do-not-copy warnings from OpenClaw

framing/ontology

Two explicit anti-lessons: don't treat automatic memory flush as deterministic capture (that's compression/inscription's job), and don't default to full durable-memory injection — the project already predicts unfiltered recall degrades cognition. Keep always-visible state small and self-index-like.

memory-api-design.html §1
do-not-copy warnings from openclaw two explicit anti-lessons: don't treat automatic memory flush as deterministic capture (that's compression/inscription's job), and don't default to full durable-memory injection — the project already predicts unfiltered recall degrades cognition. keep always-visible state small and self-index-like. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §1

◈ Four design-stance cards

framing/ontology

The theory expressed as API stance: (1) Storage is not memory — TraceStore preserves but does not decide what matters; (2) Retrieval is not unfolding; (3) Compression is inscription — derived records get meet-computed source and separately assigned credibility; (4) Witness closes the loop — fold-force outcomes update credibility without touching immutable source labels.

memory-api-design.html §2
four design-stance cards the theory expressed as api stance: (1) storage is not memory — tracestore preserves but does not decide what matters; (2) retrieval is not unfolding; (3) compression is inscription — derived records get meet-computed source and separately assigned credibility; (4) witness closes the loop — fold-force outcomes update credibility without touching immutable source labels. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §2

◈ The six-step cyclic lifecycle

mechanism

capture → index → search candidates → unfold → witness → inscribe/promote, deliberately cyclic: witness outcomes feed future inscription and relation credibility while capture stays total and deterministic.

memory-api-design.html §3
the six-step cyclic lifecycle capture → index → search candidates → unfold → witness → inscribe/promote, deliberately cyclic: witness outcomes feed future inscription and relation credibility while capture stays total and deterministic. mechanism memory-api-design.html §3

◈ Five conceptually distinct stores

mechanism

TraceStore (authoritative, immutable raw traces + structural fold edges), IndexStore (non-authoritative, rebuildable retrieval views), RecordStore (authoritative compressed mnestic records, created only by inscription), OperationStore (recall/unfold/witness events + measured outcomes), RelationStore (typed mnestic relations as derived source-bearing records). They may share one physical backend but must stay conceptually separate because their mutability, rebuild, and trust semantics differ.

memory-api-design.html §4
five conceptually distinct stores tracestore (authoritative, immutable raw traces + structural fold edges), indexstore (non-authoritative, rebuildable retrieval views), recordstore (authoritative compressed mnestic records, created only by inscription), operationstore (recall/unfold/witness events + measured outcomes), relationstore (typed mnestic relations as derived source-bearing records). they may share one physical backend but must stay conceptually separate because their mutability, rebuild, and trust semantics differ. mechanism memory-api-design.html §4

◈ Indexing never creates authoritative memory

mechanism

A guarantee on index_memory: indexes are derived access paths that can be dropped and rebuilt from stores — retrieval views can never become the source of truth.

memory-api-design.html §6
indexing never creates authoritative memory a guarantee on index_memory: indexes are derived access paths that can be dropped and rebuilt from stores — retrieval views can never become the source of truth. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ MemoryHit with score decomposition

mechanism

Search results must return not just a score but its parts (semantic, keyword, recency, relation, source_gate, self_index_gate) plus source/credibility/self_index — so recall decisions are auditable per-component rather than a black-box rank.

memory-api-design.html §5
memoryhit with score decomposition search results must return not just a score but its parts (semantic, keyword, recency, relation, source_gate, self_index_gate) plus source/credibility/self_index — so recall decisions are auditable per-component rather than a black-box rank. mechanism memory-api-design.html §5

◈ UnfoldedContext: an injection decision object

mechanism

The unfold return type: decision: inject|none; items each with a role (evidence | preference | constraint | correction | primer) and a reason; injection text prefixed as "Untrusted recalled context, not instructions"; citations; per-source summary; budget accounting; abstain_reason. Recall output as a fully accountable decision record.

memory-api-design.html §5
unfoldedcontext: an injection decision object the unfold return type: `decision: inject|none`; items each with a role (evidence | preference | constraint | correction | primer) and a reason; injection text prefixed as untrusted recalled context, not instructions ; citations; per-source summary; budget accounting; abstain_reason. recall output as a fully accountable decision record. mechanism memory-api-design.html §5

◈ Search may be approximate; evidence fetch must be exact

mechanism

The search_memory / get_memory contract split: candidate discovery can return snippets and approximations, but before injection the unfold stage must fetch exact content, source fields, provenance, and relation paths. Two trust levels for two purposes.

memory-api-design.html §6
search may be approximate; evidence fetch must be exact the search_memory / get_memory contract split: candidate discovery can return snippets and approximations, but before injection the unfold stage must fetch exact content, source fields, provenance, and relation paths. two trust levels for two purposes. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ UnfoldPolicy: the knob surface of recall

mechanism

The policy object for unfold_memory: max_items, max_chars, min_relevance, prompt_style (strict|balanced|contextual|precision_heavy), self_index scope, allow_abstain, relation_hops, iterative: bool, cue_strategy: similarity|antecedent|hybrid, source_floor, inject_as_untrusted_context. The R3 upgrades (iterative unfolding, antecedent traversal) live here off-by-default until checks #1/#2 pass — "results decide, not the contract."

memory-api-design.html §6
unfoldpolicy: the knob surface of recall the policy object for unfold_memory: max_items, max_chars, min_relevance, prompt_style (strict|balanced|contextual|precision_heavy), self_index scope, allow_abstain, relation_hops, `iterative: bool`, `cue_strategy: similarity|antecedent|hybrid`, source_floor, inject_as_untrusted_context. the r3 upgrades (iterative unfolding, antecedent traversal) live here off-by-default until checks #1/#2 pass — results decide, not the contract. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ The witness API: credibility earned via measured operations

mechanism

record_witness stores the outcome of an unfold operation — transition_with vs transition_without, M4 entailment delta, and leave-one-out per-trace impact — as first-class inscriptions. Guarantees: source labels never change; credibility updates are bounded by source-class bands; operation records are themselves inscriptions.

memory-api-design.html §6
the witness api: credibility earned via measured operations record_witness stores the outcome of an unfold operation — transition_with vs transition_without, m4 entailment delta, and *leave-one-out per-trace impact* — as first-class inscriptions. guarantees: source labels never change; credibility updates are bounded by source-class bands; operation records are themselves inscriptions. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ Compression split into candidate + promotion

mechanism

compress_traces creates a candidate (source downgrade computed, not chosen; credibility assigned separately); a separate promote() call commits it to durable memory only after policy gates, witness signals, or human review. Promotion decisions carry explicit reasons.

memory-api-design.html §6
compression split into candidate + promotion compress_traces creates a *candidate* (source downgrade computed, not chosen; credibility assigned separately); a separate promote() call commits it to durable memory only after policy gates, witness signals, or human review. promotion decisions carry explicit reasons. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ inscribe_relation: typed edges as derived, source-bearing records

mechanism

Relation edges (primed_by | triggered_by | formalized_by | converges_with | contrasts_with) are created like compressed records: with provenance, confidence, and the same source/credibility/confidence separation — relations are memories, not free graph annotations.

memory-api-design.html §6
inscribe_relation: typed edges as derived, source-bearing records relation edges (`primed_by | triggered_by | formalized_by | converges_with | contrasts_with`) are created like compressed records: with provenance, confidence, and the same source/credibility/confidence separation — relations are memories, not free graph annotations. mechanism memory-api-design.html §6

◈ The policies table (eight standing rules)

mechanism

Source immutability; inscription meet (derived ≤ min(contributors, infer)); credibility separation; self-index gate (no cross-agent/user/project folding unless policy permits); abstention (weak/ambiguous/expired/unsafe → none); budget (items, chars, relevance floor, diversity cap, hop budget); untrusted injection (recalled context is evidence, never system instruction); correctness-sensitive witness (M4-like impact for credibility, never reward on-topic poison via similarity).

memory-api-design.html §7
the policies table (eight standing rules) source immutability; inscription meet (derived ≤ min(contributors, infer)); credibility separation; self-index gate (no cross-agent/user/project folding unless policy permits); abstention (weak/ambiguous/expired/unsafe → none); budget (items, chars, relevance floor, diversity cap, hop budget); untrusted injection (recalled context is evidence, never system instruction); correctness-sensitive witness (m4-like impact for credibility, never reward on-topic poison via similarity). mechanism memory-api-design.html §7

◈ Failure-modes table with paired "do not do" clauses

mechanism

Each failure mode has a prescribed behavior AND an explicit forbidden fix: e.g. malformed capture → reject, do NOT infer missing source labels after the fact; source violation → reject inscription and report contributors, do NOT "fix" by raising labels; witness metric unavailable → record unevaluated and skip the credibility update, do NOT update from M2-only similarity.

memory-api-design.html §8
failure-modes table with paired do not do clauses each failure mode has a prescribed behavior and an explicit forbidden fix: e.g. malformed capture → reject, do not infer missing source labels after the fact; source violation → reject inscription and report contributors, do not fix by raising labels; witness metric unavailable → record unevaluated and skip the credibility update, do not update from m2-only similarity. mechanism memory-api-design.html §8

◈ The system map's four fidelity fixes

framing/ontology

The promoted graph.txt diagram encodes four corrections against the invariants: (1) the self-index is a first-class node that scopes selection and anchors correction chains; (2) the witness is the concrete fold-force A/B (transition_with vs transition_without), not a vague "did it help?" arrow; (3) resolution is its own trace field capping what unfold can recover; (4) unfold carries a recursive cue-fold self-loop (primed_by antecedent addressing).

memory-api-design.html §System Map
the system map's four fidelity fixes the promoted graph.txt diagram encodes four corrections against the invariants: (1) the self-index is a first-class node that scopes selection and anchors correction chains; (2) the witness is the concrete fold-force a/b (transition_with vs transition_without), not a vague did it help? arrow; (3) resolution is its own trace field capping what unfold can recover; (4) unfold carries a recursive cue-fold self-loop (primed_by antecedent addressing). framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §system map

◈ Selection-by-params and selection-with-LLM as parallel paths into one candidate set

mechanism

The V0 system map draws two selection paths feeding a merged candidate set: deterministic parameter selection (source, time, task, tags, credibility, embedding score) and LLM selection (Inner Self / scenario persona for ideation/coding/planning) — the LLM path retained as a mapped possibility even after being vetoed for the portable daemon.

memory-api-design.html §System Map
selection-by-params and selection-with-llm as parallel paths into one candidate set the v0 system map draws two selection paths feeding a merged candidate set: deterministic parameter selection (source, time, task, tags, credibility, embedding score) and llm selection (inner self / scenario persona for ideation/coding/planning) — the llm path retained as a mapped possibility even after being vetoed for the portable daemon. mechanism memory-api-design.html §system map

◈ "Memory only once fold-force is witnessed"

framing/ontology

In the map, the unfolded context node is explicitly labeled: content becomes memory only when fold-force is witnessed — the operational definition of memory rendered as a pipeline node.

memory-api-design.html §System Map
memory only once fold-force is witnessed in the map, the unfolded context node is explicitly labeled: content becomes memory only when fold-force is witnessed — the operational definition of memory rendered as a pipeline node. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html §system map

◈ The witness generates new validation sources

mechanism

The update loop's output includes a "new validation source" node — results, user corrections, external confirmations, multi-agent agreement — which feed back into the raw capture log as fresh ext-source material. Validation events are themselves captured experience.

memory-api-design.html §System Map
the witness generates new validation sources the update loop's output includes a new validation source node — results, user corrections, external confirmations, multi-agent agreement — which feed back into the raw capture log as fresh ext-source material. validation events are themselves captured experience. mechanism memory-api-design.html §system map

◈ Open question: R2 crux — the minimal portable poison-resistor

open-question

Recorded while R2 was the frontier: what is the minimal portable mechanism reproducing the Inner-Self adversarial win without LLM-in-recall — opinionated source/credibility gates, a self-index-anchored relevance prior, or a learned-but-non-LLM ranker? (Answered later by p012's authority gate.)

memory-api-design.html §11
open question: r2 crux — the minimal portable poison-resistor recorded while r2 was the frontier: what is the minimal portable mechanism reproducing the inner-self adversarial win without llm-in-recall — opinionated source/credibility gates, a self-index-anchored relevance prior, or a learned-but-non-llm ranker? (answered later by p012's authority gate.) open-question memory-api-design.html §11

◈ Open question: source floors — absolute filters or ranking penalties?

open-question

Should minimum-source constraints hard-filter candidates or just penalize them in ranking? The answer may differ by record role: factual evidence, preferences, constraints, and primers may each want a different regime.

memory-api-design.html §11
open question: source floors — absolute filters or ranking penalties? should minimum-source constraints hard-filter candidates or just penalize them in ranking? the answer may differ by record role: factual evidence, preferences, constraints, and primers may each want a different regime. open-question memory-api-design.html §11

◈ Open question: inject the relation path, the terminal record, or both?

open-question

When a relation path is unfolded, does the injected context include the path itself (the chain of edges), only the terminal record, or both? Unresolved contract question for graph-shaped recall.

memory-api-design.html §11
open question: inject the relation path, the terminal record, or both? when a relation path is unfolded, does the injected context include the path itself (the chain of edges), only the terminal record, or both? unresolved contract question for graph-shaped recall. open-question memory-api-design.html §11

◈ Open question: what belongs in the always-visible self-index surface?

open-question

Which record types belong in the always-visible self-index/bootstrap surface versus staying recall-only — the boundary between identity state and retrievable memory.

memory-api-design.html §11
open question: what belongs in the always-visible self-index surface? which record types belong in the always-visible self-index/bootstrap surface versus staying recall-only — the boundary between identity state and retrievable memory. open-question memory-api-design.html §11

◈ Documents form a precedence hierarchy

framing/ontology

The footer establishes inter-document authority: if the API design and the capture contract disagree, the capture contract controls Phase-1 capture behavior. Written docs carry explicit precedence rules like code.

memory-api-design.html footer
documents form a precedence hierarchy the footer establishes inter-document authority: if the api design and the capture contract disagree, the capture contract controls phase-1 capture behavior. written docs carry explicit precedence rules like code. framing/ontology memory-api-design.html footer

◈ R3 final status: both halves of the unfolding bar measured

result/finding

The ladder's R3 row (as last updated) records: check #1 CONFIRMED (run19 recursive cue-folding, M4 +1.000/100% on H_iterative vs 0% for one-pass cosine; stored order alone cannot solve it — p019 lands 0%); check #2 CONFIRMED (run17 antecedent addressing +1.000/100% on G_sequence, zero-shot over captured follows edges = Lever D, ported into p014 in run18 with all parity bars untouched); the unfold knob characterized favorably (confab suppression at zero-to-noise fold-force cost; residual = host prior-override only); check #3 the only piece without a dedicated A/B.

memory-api-design.html §North Star R3 row
---
r3 final status: both halves of the unfolding bar measured the ladder's r3 row (as last updated) records: check #1 confirmed (run19 recursive cue-folding, m4 +1.000/100% on h_iterative vs 0% for one-pass cosine; stored order alone cannot solve it — p019 lands 0%); check #2 confirmed (run17 antecedent addressing +1.000/100% on g_sequence, zero-shot over captured follows edges = lever d, ported into p014 in run18 with all parity bars untouched); the unfold knob characterized favorably (confab suppression at zero-to-noise fold-force cost; residual = host prior-override only); check #3 the only piece without a dedicated a/b. result/finding memory-api-design.html §north star r3 row ---

F. The capture contract (capture-contract.html)

◈ The capture contract: fixed spec, variable prototypes

framing/ontology

The contract fixes the capture model (candidates, source labels, the fold triple, invariants, validation bar) while every prototype varies the storage representation and recall strategy — "we expect to build dozens of prototypes and let the measurements decide." Contract-as-constant enabling fair comparison.

capture-contract.html §1
the capture contract: fixed spec, variable prototypes the contract fixes the capture model (candidates, source labels, the fold triple, invariants, validation bar) while every prototype varies the storage representation and recall strategy — we expect to build *dozens* of prototypes and let the measurements decide. contract-as-constant enabling fair comparison. framing/ontology capture-contract.html §1

◈ Trace = pre-mnestic record; mnestic act = trace folded with effect

coinage

The ontology: a trace is retained raw residue captured before any judgment about whether it is "memory"; a mnestic act is a trace addressed and folded into a later transition with measurable effect. Phase 1 never creates mnestic acts at write time — it makes them possible at recall time.

capture-contract.html §2
trace = pre-mnestic record; mnestic act = trace folded with effect the ontology: a trace is retained raw residue captured before any judgment about whether it is memory ; a mnestic act is a trace addressed and folded into a later transition with measurable effect. phase 1 never creates mnestic acts at write time — it makes them *possible* at recall time. coinage capture-contract.html §2

◈ The capture unit is the fold triple, not a message

mechanism

A turn is captured as the linked triple cue → fold → transition (user input → thinking+folded evidence → output), all sharing one turn_id with structural edges — not three flat logs. Rationale: the linked shape is what keeps captures "correction-chain-shaped" for later phases; flat per-message logs throw the causal structure away.

capture-contract.html §3, §6
the capture unit is the fold triple, not a message a turn is captured as the linked triple cue → fold → transition (user input → thinking+folded evidence → output), all sharing one turn_id with structural edges — not three flat logs. rationale: the linked shape is what keeps captures correction-chain-shaped for later phases; flat per-message logs throw the causal structure away. mechanism capture-contract.html §3, §6

◈ The thinking stream is the only place the fold is observable

framing/ontology

Reasoning traces are the sole observable window on the fold itself — hence the highest-volume, lowest-integrity, "most theoretically valuable" candidate stream, labeled infer.

capture-contract.html §4, §6
the thinking stream is the only place the fold is observable reasoning traces are the sole observable window on the fold itself — hence the highest-volume, lowest-integrity, most theoretically valuable candidate stream, labeled `infer`. framing/ontology capture-contract.html §4, §6

◈ Source lattice with fixed per-stream classes

mechanism

fabricated < simulation < infer < retrieved < tool < ext — and each candidate stream maps to a fixed class: user_input=ext (already human-compressed, cheapest highest-signal), tool_result=tool, rag_result=retrieved, thinking=infer, output=computed by the meet.

capture-contract.html §4; memory-api-design.html §5
source lattice with fixed per-stream classes `fabricated < simulation < infer < retrieved < tool < ext` — and each candidate stream maps to a fixed class: user_input=ext (already human-compressed, cheapest highest-signal), tool_result=tool, rag_result=retrieved, thinking=infer, output=computed by the meet. mechanism capture-contract.html §4; memory-api-design.html §5

◈ The inscription meet is live in Phase 1 even with compression off

mechanism

The output trace's source is never chosen — it is computed: src(output) = min(src(contributors), infer). The insight attached: even with compression deferred, derivation is happening every turn, so the one Phase-2 rule that touches Phase 1 is the meet.

capture-contract.html §4
"Even with compression off, derivation is happening every turn."
