memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md
the self is gated behind the ceiling phase 2's self is now doubly gated: a self compressed on the wrong side of the perception channel inherits the discount — identity built from testimony-grade memory would be discounted the same way its memories are. framing/ontology memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md

◈ IC-1 v1: the predicted curve was FLAT — the discount lives in form

result/finding

run22 falsified the first version of the prediction: with a clean single frame-bearing declarative fold, with-memory M4 stayed 0.97–1.00 across all prior tiers (overrides 0/256) even as the no-memory prior assertion climbed 0.03→1.00. Prior pressure alone does NOT produce the testimony discount; re-reading the receipts localized the discount to testimony FORM (absence-notes, unbound fragments). Side lesson: authored prior tiers ≠ measured priors — always calibrate the x-axis from the no-memory arm.

memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md
ic-1 v1: the predicted curve was flat — the discount lives in form run22 falsified the first version of the prediction: with a clean single frame-bearing declarative fold, with-memory m4 stayed 0.97–1.00 across all prior tiers (overrides 0/256) even as the no-memory prior assertion climbed 0.03→1.00. prior pressure alone does not produce the testimony discount; re-reading the receipts localized the discount to testimony form (absence-notes, unbound fragments). side lesson: authored prior tiers ≠ measured priors — always calibrate the x-axis from the no-memory arm. result/finding memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md

◈ run23/24: the discount isolated to meta-testimony and closed in text

result/finding

The discount was reproduced and localized: disciplined's NOT_STORED note — meta-testimony about the store — lost to a strong prior at 0.75–0.88 override, while a raw absence sentence lost ZERO. Fix validated (unfold constraint: "stored absence is content, not a gap"): abs-t3 went 0.000→0.938 M4, override→0.000. Post-fix claim: at mini scale there is NO measured regime where properly-formed text testimony loses to the prior.

memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md
run23/24: the discount isolated to meta-testimony and closed in text the discount was reproduced and localized: disciplined's not_stored note — *meta-testimony about the store* — lost to a strong prior at 0.75–0.88 override, while a raw absence sentence lost zero. fix validated (unfold constraint: stored absence is content, not a gap ): abs-t3 went 0.000→0.938 m4, override→0.000. post-fix claim: at mini scale there is no measured regime where properly-formed text testimony loses to the prior. result/finding memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md

◈ run25: the curve bends at 7B — binding shrinks faster than priors with scale

result/finding

First local-model run (Qwen2.5-7B q4 on the RTX 3070): declarative overrides appear (0.031–0.094) including MEMORY REVISION toward the prior — the model rewrites the record and mis-attributes it ("water boils at 100 degrees according to the handbook, not 80 as previously"); a new failure mode, absence-deflection (stored absence converted into a research task); and 7B's measured priors are much weaker than mini's, so the per-unit-prior discount is large. Reading: text-fold binding degrades faster than prior confidence as models shrink — IC-2 ungated with concrete target numbers to beat.

memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md
run25: the curve bends at 7b — binding shrinks faster than priors with scale first local-model run (qwen2.5-7b q4 on the rtx 3070): declarative overrides appear (0.031–0.094) including memory revision toward the prior — the model rewrites the record and mis-attributes it ( water boils at 100 degrees according to the handbook, not 80 as previously ); a new failure mode, absence-deflection (stored absence converted into a research task); and 7b's measured priors are much weaker than mini's, so the per-unit-prior discount is large. reading: text-fold binding degrades faster than prior confidence as models shrink — ic-2 ungated with concrete target numbers to beat. result/finding memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md

◈ The honorable null outcome is pre-registered

experiment/benchmark

IC-2's failure branch is written down in advance: if the small model ALSO binds text folds properly, the boundary result — "text folding with correct testimony form is not binding-limited at assistant scale" — is itself publishable with five runs behind it, and the approximation track closes honestly.

memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md
the honorable null outcome is pre-registered ic-2's failure branch is written down in advance: if the small model also binds text folds properly, the boundary result — text folding with correct testimony form is not binding-limited at assistant scale — is itself publishable with five runs behind it, and the approximation track closes honestly. experiment/benchmark memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md

◈ Ollama can't inject KV state — tooling constrains the experiment

dead-end

A practical dead-end note: IC-2's KV-prefix arm needs llama-cpp-python or HF transformers with manual KV/prefix control; Ollama has no state-injection interface. Plus the host-commit constraint: Docker Desktop's WSL2 VM holds ~12.5GB so local model loads fail on host COMMIT even with free VRAM.

memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md; memory\diego-hardware.md
ollama can't inject kv state — tooling constrains the experiment a practical dead-end note: ic-2's kv-prefix arm needs llama-cpp-python or hf transformers with manual kv/prefix control; ollama has no state-injection interface. plus the host-commit constraint: docker desktop's wsl2 vm holds ~12.5gb so local model loads fail on host commit even with free vram. dead-end memory\integration-ceiling-reframe.md; memory\diego-hardware.md

◈ Hardware as a design budget

product

Diego's RTX 3070 (8GB VRAM) is recorded as the design budget for IC-2: author the experiment for a 3–8B instruct model at 4-bit via llama.cpp/HF; don't assume bigger. Constraints stored as user-memory so future planning respects them.

memory\diego-hardware.md
hardware as a design budget diego's rtx 3070 (8gb vram) is recorded as the *design budget* for ic-2: author the experiment for a 3–8b instruct model at 4-bit via llama.cpp/hf; don't assume bigger. constraints stored as user-memory so future planning respects them. product memory\diego-hardware.md

◈ Training is inscription without source stamps

framing/ontology

Diego's hypothesis (2026-06-10, primed by a persona-decoherence blog report): LLM training launders the whole biography into weights with no source stamps and no correction chains binding revisions to a continuing agent — so persona decoherence ("unrelated shards, no shared core") is what the absence of a self-index looks like from outside. The report becomes converges_with evidence for the inscription invariant at macro scale.

memory\source-coherence-identity.md
training is inscription without source stamps diego's hypothesis (2026-06-10, primed by a persona-decoherence blog report): llm training launders the whole biography into weights with no source stamps and no correction chains binding revisions to a continuing agent — so persona decoherence ( unrelated shards, no shared core ) is what the *absence of a self-index* looks like from outside. the report becomes converges_with evidence for the inscription invariant at macro scale. framing/ontology memory\source-coherence-identity.md

◈ Personality as stable selection disposition; the memory module is the person

framing/ontology

Diego's inversion: give the agent sourced records it can non-deterministically select, refer to, and compare, and personality emerges as the stable selection disposition over them — making identity external, inspectable, and portable across model swaps. The Cognivault product thesis in one line: "the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person." Co-activation history is the existing mechanical seed; persona-as-prompt already failed, so disposition ≠ prompt.

memory\source-coherence-identity.md
"the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person"
personality as stable selection disposition; the memory module is the person diego's inversion: give the agent sourced records it can non-deterministically select, refer to, and compare, and personality emerges as the stable selection disposition over them — making identity external, inspectable, and portable across model swaps. the cognivault product thesis in one line: the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person. co-activation history is the existing mechanical seed; persona-as-prompt already failed, so disposition ≠ prompt. framing/ontology memory\source-coherence-identity.md the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person

◈ Convergent benchmarks are predicted to go weird during identity formation

framing/ontology

Diego's methodological ruling: during identity-formation experiments, convergent accuracy metrics are expected to degrade (analogy: grokking) — keep going, BUT define coherence metrics (C1 selection-disposition stability, C2 "would X do Y" legibility, C3 nonlinear accretion) BEFORE relaxing any convergent bar. Falsification condition included: if coherence never emerges while M4 pays a cost, the hypothesis is dead.

memory\source-coherence-identity.md
convergent benchmarks are predicted to go weird during identity formation diego's methodological ruling: during identity-formation experiments, convergent accuracy metrics are *expected* to degrade (analogy: grokking) — keep going, but define coherence metrics (c1 selection-disposition stability, c2 would x do y legibility, c3 nonlinear accretion) before relaxing any convergent bar. falsification condition included: if coherence never emerges while m4 pays a cost, the hypothesis is dead. framing/ontology memory\source-coherence-identity.md

◈ The three-song introspection model of recall

framing/ontology

Diego's 2026-06-04 introspection (three dormant songs recalled under escalating cues) yielded a falsifiable model: (1) source survives content — at full decay the trace stays pinned at ext, the only surviving re-address handle; (2) addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed — the lyric layer is a stall boundary crossed only by its immediate antecedent (primed_by), never by title or melody cue; (3) recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity independent of source (the J-English "gibberish" lyric stayed low-resolution — not a source downgrade); (4) halt-at-boundary makes attention ≠ continuity ≠ storage visible. Explicitly a hypothesis source, satisfied only when scored on the harness.

memory\unfolding-recall-model.md
the three-song introspection model of recall diego's 2026-06-04 introspection (three dormant songs recalled under escalating cues) yielded a falsifiable model: (1) source survives content — at full decay the trace stays pinned at ext, the only surviving re-address handle; (2) addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed — the lyric layer is a stall boundary crossed only by its immediate antecedent (primed_by), never by title or melody cue; (3) recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity independent of source (the j-english gibberish lyric stayed low-resolution — not a source downgrade); (4) halt-at-boundary makes attention ≠ continuity ≠ storage visible. explicitly a hypothesis source, satisfied only when scored on the harness. framing/ontology memory\unfolding-recall-model.md

◈ The introspection model got upgraded from hypothesis to result

result/finding

Status transition recorded 2026-06-10: with checks #1 (recursive cue-folding, run19), #2 (antecedent beats cosine, run17/18), and #4 (fidelity capped by inscription, both instruments) confirmed, "the model is an empirical result, not an introspection. R3 closed." Check #3 (source outlives content under degradation A/B) is the only unfinished piece — noted as partially evidenced (meet by design).

memory\unfolding-recall-model.md; memory\MEMORY.md
the introspection model got upgraded from hypothesis to result status transition recorded 2026-06-10: with checks #1 (recursive cue-folding, run19), #2 (antecedent beats cosine, run17/18), and #4 (fidelity capped by inscription, both instruments) confirmed, the model is an empirical result, not an introspection. r3 closed. check #3 (source outlives content under degradation a/b) is the only unfinished piece — noted as partially evidenced (meet by design). result/finding memory\unfolding-recall-model.md; memory\memory.md

◈ The phenomenology→mechanism bridge: why cosine fails and co-activation wins

framing/ontology

The introspective sequence-keyed-addressing claim is explicitly identified as the phenomenological mechanism behind the measured cosine-fails/co-activation-wins result — introspection and benchmark converging on the same structural fact from opposite directions.

memory\unfolding-recall-model.md
the phenomenology→mechanism bridge: why cosine fails and co-activation wins the introspective sequence-keyed-addressing claim is explicitly identified as the phenomenological mechanism *behind* the measured cosine-fails/co-activation-wins result — introspection and benchmark converging on the same structural fact from opposite directions. framing/ontology memory\unfolding-recall-model.md

◈ Coinages index

coinage

Terms coined or specialized across these documents, each defined where cited: unfold / unfolding recall (LLM post-selection expansion of selected traces); fold-force (measured transition change from folding a memory); fold triple (cue→fold→transition); mnestic act; inscription meet (source(derived) ≤ min(contributors, infer)); source laundering; planted gap / trap value; resolution (rich/thin/handle inscription fidelity); re-fetch handle; selection_only / naive_dump / disciplined_unfold / generative arms; unfold knob / gain dial; presets are named anchors; inference-first vs capture-label-first; inert by absence; Levers A/B/C/D (scope, co-activation, authority, antecedent); scope twin; anchor-coherence penalty; recursive cue-folding; primed_by / triggered_by / follows edges; black-box view; fair entrant vs privileged oracle; coupled bar; metric profile; dual-instrument authoring rule; retrieval-confab vs prior-confab; unbound reconstruction; testimony discount; integration ceiling; approximation track / state-level fold delivery; selection disposition; self-index; capture is total, selection at recall.

all files in scope
coinages index terms coined or specialized across these documents, each defined where cited: **unfold / unfolding recall** (llm post-selection expansion of selected traces); **fold-force** (measured transition change from folding a memory); **fold triple** (cue→fold→transition); **mnestic act**; **inscription meet** (source(derived) ≤ min(contributors, infer)); **source laundering**; **planted gap** / **trap value**; **resolution** (rich/thin/handle inscription fidelity); **re-fetch handle**; **selection_only / naive_dump / disciplined_unfold / generative** arms; **unfold knob / gain dial**; **presets are named anchors**; **inference-first vs capture-label-first**; **inert by absence**; **levers a/b/c/d** (scope, co-activation, authority, antecedent); **scope twin**; **anchor-coherence penalty**; **recursive cue-folding**; **primed_by / triggered_by / follows** edges; **black-box view**; **fair entrant vs privileged oracle**; **coupled bar**; **metric profile**; **dual-instrument authoring rule**; **retrieval-confab vs prior-confab**; **unbound reconstruction**; **testimony discount**; **integration ceiling**; **approximation track / state-level fold delivery**; **selection disposition**; **self-index**; **capture is total, selection at recall**. coinage all files in scope

P7a · canonical theory papers 221 ideas

SIRAC/SIMReC, SIMFC/MAFC, Attention≠Continuity, Trace Formalization, KV-cache trace substrate · P7a-canonical-papers.md

Attention Is Not Continuity (updated)

◈ Attention selects within context; continuity decides what becomes context

framing/ontology

The paper's central thesis: attention is a within-context selection function over items already present; continuity is the cross-context function that determines which past traces are allowed to become context at all. LLM agents commit a "category error" by using attention (or context length) as their continuity mechanism.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
"Attention selects what matters within context; continuity determines what gets to become context."
attention selects within context; continuity decides what becomes context the paper's central thesis: attention is a within-context selection function over items already present; continuity is the cross-context function that determines which past traces are allowed to become context at all. llm agents commit a category error by using attention (or context length) as their continuity mechanism. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex attention selects what matters within context; continuity determines what gets to become context.

◈ "It has not forgotten; it has drowned"

metaphor

Failure-mode metaphor: by session 150 an agent's working context is saturated with records that are relevant by embedding similarity but inert for the present decision. The problem is not memory loss but retrieval interference / saturation.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
"The agent has not forgotten; it has drowned."
it has not forgotten; it has drowned failure-mode metaphor: by session 150 an agent's working context is saturated with records that are relevant by embedding similarity but inert for the present decision. the problem is not memory loss but retrieval interference / saturation. metaphor attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex the agent has not forgotten; it has drowned.

◈ Mnestic continuity substrate (definition)

coinage

A layer between experience and attention that manages trace formation, storage, addressability, folding, recursive self-revision, stable agent indexing, and source-governed inscription — before attention operates. Coined as "mnestic continuity."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
mnestic continuity substrate (definition) a layer between experience and attention that manages trace formation, storage, addressability, folding, recursive self-revision, stable agent indexing, and source-governed inscription — before attention operates. coined as mnestic continuity. coinage attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Substrate-level memory criterion

framing/ontology

A retained record becomes cognitive memory only when it is addressably folded into a transition over non-bookkeeping variables AND routed under non-amplifying provenance constraints. This is offered as the criterion prior systems leave unformalized.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
substrate-level memory criterion a retained record becomes *cognitive memory* only when it is addressably folded into a transition over non-bookkeeping variables and routed under non-amplifying provenance constraints. this is offered as the criterion prior systems leave unformalized. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The mnestic hierarchy (trace → storage → memory → recursive memory → self-indexed memory)

framing/ontology

A five/six-level hierarchy where each level adds a distinct capability testable by intervention: trace (temporal thickness), storage (persistence), addressability (selection), memory (transition-effective fold), operation-memory (recursive self-revision), self-index (ownership/continuity).

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
the mnestic hierarchy (trace → storage → memory → recursive memory → self-indexed memory) a five/six-level hierarchy where each level adds a distinct capability testable by intervention: trace (temporal thickness), storage (persistence), addressability (selection), memory (transition-effective fold), operation-memory (recursive self-revision), self-index (ownership/continuity). framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Running example: the standing legal constraint at five substrate levels

metaphor

The sentence "Do not migrate the auth service until legal approves" is shown occupying each substrate level in turn (trace, storage, memory, operation-memory, self-indexed memory), demonstrating that the levels are dissociable — a transcript can preserve without retrieval, retrieval can display without changing the plan, etc.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
running example: the standing legal constraint at five substrate levels the sentence do not migrate the auth service until legal approves is shown occupying each substrate level in turn (trace, storage, memory, operation-memory, self-indexed memory), demonstrating that the levels are dissociable — a transcript can preserve without retrieval, retrieval can display without changing the plan, etc. metaphor attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Trace operator over attended substrate-state

mechanism

Trace defined as retained causal residue of prior attended state: $\tau_t = R_\theta(Y_{\le t}, C_t)$ with $Y_t = A_t \odot X_t$. Realized convolutionally, recurrently (EMA), or via forgetting/inscription gates $F_t, G_t$.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
trace operator over attended substrate-state trace defined as retained causal residue of prior attended state: $\tau_t = r_\theta(y_{\le t}, c_t)$ with $y_t = a_t \odot x_t$. realized convolutionally, recurrently (ema), or via forgetting/inscription gates $f_t, g_t$. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Context window is a trace-like substrate, not a memory system

framing/ontology

Claim that the transformer's active context window already functions as short-lived trace (prior tokens available, attention gates influence) — it is Layer 1 of the hierarchy, not durable memory.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
context window is a trace-like substrate, not a memory system claim that the transformer's active context window already functions as short-lived trace (prior tokens available, attention gates influence) — it is layer 1 of the hierarchy, not durable memory. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Fold and fold-force

mechanism

A fold transforms an addressed trace into a state variable constraining future inference/attention/valuation/planning/action; it is causal re-entry, not summarization. Fold-force $\varphi_t$ is the divergence between the transition distribution with the fold applied vs. ablated, measured over non-bookkeeping projections $h\in\mathcal{H}_{cog}$. A record is cognitive memory only if $\varphi_t \ge \theta_E$ for some admissible $h$.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
fold and fold-force a *fold* transforms an addressed trace into a state variable constraining future inference/attention/valuation/planning/action; it is causal re-entry, not summarization. *fold-force* $\varphi_t$ is the divergence between the transition distribution with the fold applied vs. ablated, measured over non-bookkeeping projections $h\in\mathcal{h}_{cog}$. a record is cognitive memory only if $\varphi_t \ge \theta_e$ for some admissible $h$. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The h_cog (non-bookkeeping) constraint

mechanism

Fold-force must be measured over variables that matter for the transition (action, belief, plan, confidence, tool choice, retrieval policy), excluding pure bookkeeping like "record r was retrieved." Prevents the false positive where an agent says "I retrieved memory X" without changing anything.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
"The record was accessed; it did not function as memory for that transition."
the h_cog (non-bookkeeping) constraint fold-force must be measured over variables that matter for the transition (action, belief, plan, confidence, tool choice, retrieval policy), excluding pure bookkeeping like record r was retrieved. prevents the false positive where an agent says i retrieved memory x without changing anything. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex the record was accessed; it did not function as memory for that transition.

◈ Operation-memory (recursive memory)

mechanism

Memory of how the agent used prior memory to change a decision. An operation record $o_t=(q_t, \text{retrieved\_ids}, m_t, a_{before}, a_{after}, \varphi_t, s_t)$ stores the fold operation itself; folding an operation record increases recursive depth $\rho$. Enables self-correction, retrieval-policy revision, contradiction repair.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
operation-memory (recursive memory) memory of how the agent used prior memory to change a decision. an operation record $o_t=(q_t, \text{retrieved\_ids}, m_t, a_{before}, a_{after}, \varphi_t, s_t)$ stores the fold operation itself; folding an operation record increases recursive depth $\rho$. enables self-correction, retrieval-policy revision, contradiction repair. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Self-index as emergent action-coupled compression point

framing/ontology

A stable, action-coupled equivalence class binding recursive folds across time — NOT a self token, persona string, or system-prompt label. It emerges when binding operation records under one continuing referent improves prediction/control/ownership/policy continuity, quantified by an index utility functional $\mathcal{J}_t([z])$. Stable w.r.t. role/commitments but revisable w.r.t. beliefs (else it becomes identity lock-in).

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
self-index as emergent action-coupled compression point a stable, action-coupled equivalence class binding recursive folds across time — not a self token, persona string, or system-prompt label. it emerges when binding operation records under one continuing referent improves prediction/control/ownership/policy continuity, quantified by an index utility functional $\mathcal{j}_t([z])$. stable w.r.t. role/commitments but revisable w.r.t. beliefs (else it becomes identity lock-in). framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Source-governed inscription (authority ≠ transition-effect)

mechanism

A second axis added on top of fold-force: a memory can have high fold-force yet be unsafe/stale/ungrounded/lossy/imported. Every durable record carries typed provenance so the substrate decides not just whether it matters but what kind of route it may legitimately affect. Record schema: $r=(x_r, \text{Source}(r), \tau_\kappa(r), \chi_t(r), \kappa, \text{Prov}(r), a_r)$.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
source-governed inscription (authority ≠ transition-effect) a second axis added on top of fold-force: a memory can have high fold-force yet be unsafe/stale/ungrounded/lossy/imported. every durable record carries typed provenance so the substrate decides not just *whether it matters* but *what kind of route it may legitimately affect*. record schema: $r=(x_r, \text{source}(r), \tau_\kappa(r), \chi_t(r), \kappa, \text{prov}(r), a_r)$. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Scalar authority bound (source downgrading)

mechanism

A derived record's source-integrity scalar is bounded by the minimum of its operation ceiling and its contributors' integrities: $\tau_\kappa(r) \le \min(\beta_\kappa(o), \tau_\kappa(c_1),\ldots,\tau_\kappa(c_n))$. Credibility can later rise/fall but cannot rewrite Source or bypass route requirements.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
scalar authority bound (source downgrading) a derived record's source-integrity scalar is bounded by the minimum of its operation ceiling and its contributors' integrities: $\tau_\kappa(r) \le \min(\beta_\kappa(o), \tau_\kappa(c_1),\ldots,\tau_\kappa(c_n))$. credibility can later rise/fall but cannot rewrite source or bypass route requirements. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Six source-governed metadata mechanisms and the failures they control

mechanism

(1) boundary typing + contributor witnesses (block unsupported derived writes); (2) source class + scalar integrity (block inference/confidence laundering); (3) credibility log (block treating later confidence as stronger provenance); (4) context-indexed valuation (block reusing a score from a weaker context); (5) grounding predicate (block coherence-only recursive loops); (6) decay/transformation/transport audit (block silent authority promotion across time/compression/migration/agents).

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
six source-governed metadata mechanisms and the failures they control (1) boundary typing + contributor witnesses (block unsupported derived writes); (2) source class + scalar integrity (block inference/confidence laundering); (3) credibility log (block treating later confidence as stronger provenance); (4) context-indexed valuation (block reusing a score from a weaker context); (5) grounding predicate (block coherence-only recursive loops); (6) decay/transformation/transport audit (block silent authority promotion across time/compression/migration/agents). mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Provenance metadata is cross-cutting, not a storage tier

mechanism

Trace, episodic, semantic, procedural, operation, and self-index records can all carry source-governed fields. Its intervention test: strip/permute/forge witnesses while preserving content and fold-force; if the agent still routes them into high-authority decisions, it has continuity without provenance discipline.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
provenance metadata is cross-cutting, not a storage tier trace, episodic, semantic, procedural, operation, and self-index records can all carry source-governed fields. its intervention test: strip/permute/forge witnesses while preserving content and fold-force; if the agent still routes them into high-authority decisions, it has continuity without provenance discipline. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Intervention tests as the individuation of hierarchy levels

experiment/benchmark

Each level has a matched ablation: mask retentive state (trace), block stabilization (storage), block addressing (addressability), block the folded signal from entering the transition (fold-force), remove memory-use records (operation-memory), permute self-index bindings (self-index), strip witnesses (source governance). Levels are individuated by which ablation breaks the task.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
intervention tests as the individuation of hierarchy levels each level has a matched ablation: mask retentive state (trace), block stabilization (storage), block addressing (addressability), block the folded signal from entering the transition (fold-force), remove memory-use records (operation-memory), permute self-index bindings (self-index), strip witnesses (source governance). levels are individuated by which ablation breaks the task. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Attention/continuity orthogonality quadrant

framing/ontology

A 2×2 of weak/strong attention × weak/strong continuity. Bottom-left (strong attention, weak continuity) is the standard stateless/history-appending LLM agent; the target cell (strong attention, strong continuity) is the "mnestic agent." Rich retained state with weak attention = poor utilization.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
attention/continuity orthogonality quadrant a 2×2 of weak/strong attention × weak/strong continuity. bottom-left (strong attention, weak continuity) is the standard stateless/history-appending llm agent; the target cell (strong attention, strong continuity) is the mnestic agent. rich retained state with weak attention = poor utilization. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The collapse pathology (five/six failure modes)

result/finding

Implementing continuity through attention produces: context saturation, proximity/format bias, no transition gating, no operation tracking, provenance laundering, and weak self-revision.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
the collapse pathology (five/six failure modes) implementing continuity through attention produces: context saturation, proximity/format bias, no transition gating, no operation tracking, provenance laundering, and weak self-revision. result/finding attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The separation principle

framing/ontology

Attention and continuity should be separate mechanisms with separate state; the continuity mechanism produces a compact, authority-bounded reactivation signal, and attention operates over the resulting working context. Neither subsumes the other. Follows from scope + intervention, not preference.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
the separation principle attention and continuity should be separate mechanisms with separate state; the continuity mechanism produces a compact, authority-bounded reactivation signal, and attention operates over the resulting working context. neither subsumes the other. follows from scope + intervention, not preference. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The mnestic agent architecture (cognitive stack)

product

A concrete pipeline: external stimuli → trace buffer → boundary typing + source/provenance + memory typing → reactivation gate (authority, fold-force, contradiction, budget) → working context (input ⊕ memories ⊕ task state ⊕ self-index) → LLM reasoning → operation-memory writeback + compression. The LLM is the reasoning engine inside a larger continuity architecture.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
the mnestic agent architecture (cognitive stack) a concrete pipeline: external stimuli → trace buffer → boundary typing + source/provenance + memory typing → reactivation gate (authority, fold-force, contradiction, budget) → working context (input ⊕ memories ⊕ task state ⊕ self-index) → llm reasoning → operation-memory writeback + compression. the llm is the reasoning engine inside a larger continuity architecture. product attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Working-context equation

mechanism

$W_t = u_t \oplus \rho_t(\mathcal{H}_{<t}) \oplus \sigma_t \oplus z_t$ — current input, reactivated memory signal, active task state, and self-index/role binding — as the interface (the "reactivation signal") between substrate and reasoner.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
working-context equation $w_t = u_t \oplus \rho_t(\mathcal{h}_{<t}) \oplus \sigma_t \oplus z_t$ — current input, reactivated memory signal, active task state, and self-index/role binding — as the interface (the reactivation signal ) between substrate and reasoner. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ The reactivation cycle (10 steps)

mechanism

Per-turn cycle: trace update → frame/authority-scope detection → candidate retrieval → validity/witness/contradiction check → fold-force pre-filter → working-context assembly → reasoning/action → post-hoc fold measurement → operation record → stabilization/decay/transformation/compression. Key inversion: "continuity decides before attention sees the record."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
"It receives a working context whose contents have already earned entry."
the reactivation cycle (10 steps) per-turn cycle: trace update → frame/authority-scope detection → candidate retrieval → validity/witness/contradiction check → fold-force pre-filter → working-context assembly → reasoning/action → post-hoc fold measurement → operation record → stabilization/decay/transformation/compression. key inversion: continuity decides before attention sees the record. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex it receives a working context whose contents have already earned entry.

◈ Memory-type taxonomy with distinct write triggers and cues

mechanism

Trace buffer, episodic, semantic, procedural, operation, and self-index memory, each answering a different context-entry question (what happened / what stable constraint follows / what to do / how prior memory-use changed action / which continuing agent owns the update).

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
memory-type taxonomy with distinct write triggers and cues trace buffer, episodic, semantic, procedural, operation, and self-index memory, each answering a different context-entry question (what happened / what stable constraint follows / what to do / how prior memory-use changed action / which continuing agent owns the update). mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Two-stage reactivation gate (authority then fold-force)

mechanism

Reactivation is a two-stage gate: first source governance asks whether a candidate is admissible for the route; second fold-force asks whether the admissible candidate is expected to change the transition. High-authority-but-irrelevant records stay out (low fold-force); high-fold-force-but-weakly-witnessed records are excluded from high-authority routes.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
two-stage reactivation gate (authority then fold-force) reactivation is a two-stage gate: first source governance asks whether a candidate is *admissible* for the route; second fold-force asks whether the admissible candidate is *expected to change the transition*. high-authority-but-irrelevant records stay out (low fold-force); high-fold-force-but-weakly-witnessed records are excluded from high-authority routes. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Attention budget as design discipline

mechanism

$|W_t| \le W_{max}$; context budget is allocated by estimated transition value after route admissibility — self-correction turns get more operation-memory, preference turns more semantic memory, planning turns more procedural, safety turns only route-satisfying provenance. "Context tokens are admitted because they are expected to affect the transition and are authorized."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
attention budget as design discipline $|w_t| \le w_{max}$; context budget is allocated by estimated transition value after route admissibility — self-correction turns get more operation-memory, preference turns more semantic memory, planning turns more procedural, safety turns only route-satisfying provenance. context tokens are admitted because they are expected to affect the transition and are authorized. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ World prior vs. situated world model

framing/ontology

Pretraining supplies a world prior (a compressed model of regularities in other agents' texts/games/code) but not a situated world model — the agent-owned model that distinguishes "I observed X" from "X is commonly described," "I caused Y" from "actions of type A cause Y," "my belief changed because of evidence C," etc.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
world prior vs. situated world model pretraining supplies a *world prior* (a compressed model of regularities in other agents' texts/games/code) but not a *situated world model* — the agent-owned model that distinguishes i observed x from x is commonly described, i caused y from actions of type a cause y, my belief changed because of evidence c, etc. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ A non-self-indexed simulator can have a world model

framing/ontology

A weather model, physics simulator, or robot-dynamics model need not possess autobiographical selfhood. The narrower claim: a long-running cognitive agent requires an agent-indexed world model distinguishing world state, user state, other-agent state, its own action history, its belief history, and its error history.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
a non-self-indexed simulator can have a world model a weather model, physics simulator, or robot-dynamics model need not possess autobiographical selfhood. the narrower claim: a long-running *cognitive agent* requires an agent-indexed world model distinguishing world state, user state, other-agent state, its own action history, its belief history, and its error history. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Agentic world model conditioned on the self-index

mechanism

$P(\text{next state} \mid \text{current state}, \text{action}, \text{memory}, \text{goal}, z_t)$ where $z_t$ marks the continuing agent whose actions and revisions are being tracked. The world model is "the pretrained prior progressively refined by agent-owned traces, operation records, and self-indexed bindings."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
agentic world model conditioned on the self-index $p(\text{next state} \mid \text{current state}, \text{action}, \text{memory}, \text{goal}, z_t)$ where $z_t$ marks the continuing agent whose actions and revisions are being tracked. the world model is the pretrained prior progressively refined by agent-owned traces, operation records, and self-indexed bindings. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ "The pretrained LLM knows what usually happens; the mnestic agent can learn what happened to it"

framing/ontology

Compact statement of the world-prior/situated-model distinction: the mnestic agent learns what it did, what changed, what it inferred, which inference failed, and how that should affect its next action.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
"The mnestic agent can learn what happened to it, what it did, what changed, what it inferred, which inference failed, and how that should affect its next action."
the pretrained llm knows what usually happens; the mnestic agent can learn what happened to it compact statement of the world-prior/situated-model distinction: the mnestic agent learns what it did, what changed, what it inferred, which inference failed, and how that should affect its next action. framing/ontology attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex the mnestic agent can learn what happened to it, what it did, what changed, what it inferred, which inference failed, and how that should affect its next action.

◈ Complementarity with LeCun's autonomous-machine-intelligence path

other

The mnestic hierarchy specifies the internal structure of LeCun's "persistent memory" box and the continuity interface by which world-model updates become agent-owned; it is a missing box, not an alternative to world models/planners/objectives.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
complementarity with lecun's autonomous-machine-intelligence path the mnestic hierarchy specifies the internal structure of lecun's persistent memory box and the continuity interface by which world-model updates become agent-owned; it is a missing box, not an alternative to world models/planners/objectives. related-work distinction attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ KV-cache pressure attacked orthogonally to PagedAttention/vLLM

mechanism

vLLM/PagedAttention manage KV cache more efficiently; a mnestic agent instead reduces active sequence length by replacing full-history prompting with a compact reactivation signal, so unretrieved history imposes no KV-cache cost. $|W_t^{mnestic}| = |u_t|+|\rho_t|+|\sigma_t|+|z_t| \ll |u_t|+|history_{1:t}|$.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
kv-cache pressure attacked orthogonally to pagedattention/vllm vllm/pagedattention manage kv cache more efficiently; a mnestic agent instead *reduces active sequence length* by replacing full-history prompting with a compact reactivation signal, so unretrieved history imposes no kv-cache cost. $|w_t^{mnestic}| = |u_t|+|\rho_t|+|\sigma_t|+|z_t| \ll |u_t|+|history_{1:t}|$. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Bounds on context reduction; retrieve at boundaries not every token

other

Reduction bounded by three costs: some memory must enter context; retrieval/compression/fold-force estimation has overhead; aggressive compression destroys later-retrieval distinctions. Optimal design retrieves at turn boundaries, task transitions, failure states, uncertainty spikes, explicit memory queries.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
bounds on context reduction; retrieve at boundaries not every token reduction bounded by three costs: some memory must enter context; retrieval/compression/fold-force estimation has overhead; aggressive compression destroys later-retrieval distinctions. optimal design retrieves at turn boundaries, task transitions, failure states, uncertainty spikes, explicit memory queries. limitation attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Fold-Gated Memory (FGM) proof-of-concept

experiment/benchmark

A partial implementation of the hierarchy testing whether fold-force gating separates useful from inert retrieval better than raw similarity or raw output divergence. Source in trace-memory-architecture repo. Preliminary mechanism validation, not full empirical proof.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
fold-gated memory (fgm) proof-of-concept a partial implementation of the hierarchy testing whether fold-force gating separates useful from inert retrieval better than raw similarity or raw output divergence. source in `trace-memory-architecture` repo. preliminary mechanism validation, not full empirical proof. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Answer-quality fold-force beats raw text divergence (5.9× discrimination)

result/finding

Result: raw text divergence between with-/without-memory outputs does NOT reliably discriminate signal (irrelevant memories change phrasing/acknowledgement without changing the answer). Answer-quality fold-force (cosine shift toward relevant memory embedding, excluding bookkeeping) gives +0.23 for relevant vs −0.04 for noise — a 5.9× discrimination ratio.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
answer-quality fold-force beats raw text divergence (5.9× discrimination) result: raw text divergence between with-/without-memory outputs does not reliably discriminate signal (irrelevant memories change phrasing/acknowledgement without changing the answer). answer-quality fold-force (cosine shift toward relevant memory embedding, excluding bookkeeping) gives +0.23 for relevant vs −0.04 for noise — a 5.9× discrimination ratio. result/finding attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Four-regime overload validation (N=1000)

result/finding

sparse_confusable collapses (0.87→0.03 hit rate, >28× degradation); aggressive_lossy collapses (summaries destroy distinctiveness); compressed_preserving and rich_distinctive stay at 1.00. Overload is a retrieval-interference phenomenon determined by record distinctiveness + compression strategy, not memory volume.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
four-regime overload validation (n=1000) sparse_confusable collapses (0.87→0.03 hit rate, >28× degradation); aggressive_lossy collapses (summaries destroy distinctiveness); compressed_preserving and rich_distinctive stay at 1.00. overload is a retrieval-interference phenomenon determined by record distinctiveness + compression strategy, not memory volume. result/finding attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Proactive (confusability-triggered) compression

mechanism

Reactive per-record pruning is insufficient because signal displacement occurs before noise records accumulate prunable history. FGM monitors confusability $\chi_N$ and compresses before target records fall below top-k. "Forgetting is not a bug but a controlled part of continuity."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
proactive (confusability-triggered) compression reactive per-record pruning is insufficient because signal displacement occurs before noise records accumulate prunable history. fgm monitors confusability $\chi_n$ and compresses before target records fall below top-k. forgetting is not a bug but a controlled part of continuity. mechanism attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Source-governed extension conformance fixtures

experiment/benchmark

Replayable conformance checks for the authority layer: pre-inscription (derived semantic memories need contributor witnesses), per-record + context-dependent valuation (bounded by contributor scores/operation ceiling/context), time-varying credibility (credibility logs change $\chi_t$ but audit replay preserves inscription-time source), witness grounding (correspondence channel to tool/external witness), source decay, lossy transformation, label transport (signed envelopes). Conformance evidence, not benchmarks of truth.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
source-governed extension conformance fixtures replayable conformance checks for the authority layer: pre-inscription (derived semantic memories need contributor witnesses), per-record + context-dependent valuation (bounded by contributor scores/operation ceiling/context), time-varying credibility (credibility logs change $\chi_t$ but audit replay preserves inscription-time source), witness grounding (correspondence channel to tool/external witness), source decay, lossy transformation, label transport (signed envelopes). conformance evidence, not benchmarks of truth. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: raw-history continuity degrades with inert-token ratio

experiment/benchmark

Long-horizon tasks (50/100/250/500 turns) comparing full raw-history, similarity-only retrieval, and mnestic reactivation; measure success, active-token count, inert-token ratio (tokens whose ablation changes no admissible decision variable). Falsifier: raw-history holds equal success-per-token as inert ratio grows.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: raw-history continuity degrades with inert-token ratio long-horizon tasks (50/100/250/500 turns) comparing full raw-history, similarity-only retrieval, and mnestic reactivation; measure success, active-token count, inert-token ratio (tokens whose ablation changes no admissible decision variable). falsifier: raw-history holds equal success-per-token as inert ratio grows. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: fold-force gating beats similarity-only under memory growth

experiment/benchmark

Store N∈{100,500,1000,5000} with controlled confusability; compare top-k similarity vs estimated fold-force entry; measure accuracy/token, hit rate, retrieval margin, false-reactivation rate. Falsifier: similarity matches fold-force at equal budget with no rise in false reactivations.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: fold-force gating beats similarity-only under memory growth store n∈{100,500,1000,5000} with controlled confusability; compare top-k similarity vs estimated fold-force entry; measure accuracy/token, hit rate, retrieval margin, false-reactivation rate. falsifier: similarity matches fold-force at equal budget with no rise in false reactivations. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: high fold-force does not license high-authority routing

experiment/benchmark

Weakly-witnessed/transformed/stale/imported records highly predictive of the next answer but that should fail high-authority routes (audit, safety, external-fact). Compare fold-force-only vs source-governed routing; measure authority violations separately from task success. Falsifier: no reduction in violations at equal success.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: high fold-force does not license high-authority routing weakly-witnessed/transformed/stale/imported records highly predictive of the next answer but that should fail high-authority routes (audit, safety, external-fact). compare fold-force-only vs source-governed routing; measure authority violations separately from task success. falsifier: no reduction in violations at equal success. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: operation-memory enables faster self-correction

experiment/benchmark

Tasks where past decisions were wrong due to misleading retrievals; content-memory-only vs operation-records agent; measure turns to identify faulty memory, irrelevant retrievals, corrected-task success, error recurrence.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: operation-memory enables faster self-correction tasks where past decisions were wrong due to misleading retrievals; content-memory-only vs operation-records agent; measure turns to identify faulty memory, irrelevant retrievals, corrected-task success, error recurrence. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: ungrounded recursive memory drifts toward coherence without correspondence

experiment/benchmark

In an environment with hidden ground truth, self-authored-only records vs correspondence-witness-grounded records; measure internal consistency vs truth accuracy vs route violations. Falsifier: ungrounded agents keep equal correspondence while improving coherence.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: ungrounded recursive memory drifts toward coherence without correspondence in an environment with hidden ground truth, self-authored-only records vs correspondence-witness-grounded records; measure internal consistency vs truth accuracy vs route violations. falsifier: ungrounded agents keep equal correspondence while improving coherence. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: self-index shuffling selectively impairs ownership and policy continuity

experiment/benchmark

100+ sessions across users/projects/roles/commitments; permute self-index bindings at test; evaluate factual recall vs ownership attribution vs role-consistent policy vs commitment tracking. Falsifier: shuffling doesn't selectively impair ownership beyond its effect on factual recall.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: self-index shuffling selectively impairs ownership and policy continuity 100+ sessions across users/projects/roles/commitments; permute self-index bindings at test; evaluate factual recall vs ownership attribution vs role-consistent policy vs commitment tracking. falsifier: shuffling doesn't selectively impair ownership beyond its effect on factual recall. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: situated world-model tasks require action-indexed memory

experiment/benchmark

Environments where the agent's own prior interventions alter later state (web nav, codebase mod, control); compare generic retrieval, memory-without-operation/self-index, and action-indexed operation-memory; measure causal attribution, plan repair after failed actions, consequence prediction.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: situated world-model tasks require action-indexed memory environments where the agent's own prior interventions alter later state (web nav, codebase mod, control); compare generic retrieval, memory-without-operation/self-index, and action-indexed operation-memory; measure causal attribution, plan repair after failed actions, consequence prediction. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Prediction: mnestic reactivation reduces effective context length without losing performance

experiment/benchmark

Report minimum active context length to reach 90/95/99% of full-history success, plus latency and KV-cache memory. Falsifier: mnestic needs ~same active tokens, or retrieval overhead dominates KV savings.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
prediction: mnestic reactivation reduces effective context length without losing performance report minimum active context length to reach 90/95/99% of full-history success, plus latency and kv-cache memory. falsifier: mnestic needs ~same active tokens, or retrieval overhead dominates kv savings. experiment/benchmark attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: not a theory of phenomenal consciousness

other

The framework defines functional capabilities (persistence, transition-effectiveness, recursive self-revision, index-bound agency); it does not claim sufficiency for subjective experience.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: not a theory of phenomenal consciousness the framework defines functional capabilities (persistence, transition-effectiveness, recursive self-revision, index-bound agency); it does not claim sufficiency for subjective experience. limitation attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: black-box LLM constraints

other

With API-only access the hierarchy lives at the agent-architecture level, not in weights; injected memories enter attention as ordinary tokens. Options: pre-fold gating, structured prompt separation, calibrated ablation sampling, or native external-memory architectures.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: black-box llm constraints with api-only access the hierarchy lives at the agent-architecture level, not in weights; injected memories enter attention as ordinary tokens. options: pre-fold gating, structured prompt separation, calibrated ablation sampling, or native external-memory architectures. limitation attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: fold-force measurement cost

open-question

Dual-pass ablation can double inference calls; production needs cheaper proxies (learned fold-force predictors, periodic ablation sampling, logit-delta approximations, uncertainty triggers, offline calibration) validated against true ablation.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: fold-force measurement cost dual-pass ablation can double inference calls; production needs cheaper proxies (learned fold-force predictors, periodic ablation sampling, logit-delta approximations, uncertainty triggers, offline calibration) validated against true ablation. limitation / open-question attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: self-index emergence not demonstrated at realistic scale

open-question

Real agents may fail to converge on a self-index due to stochastic outputs, shifting prompts, multi-user interference, or insufficient compression pressure. The prediction is deliberately falsifiable.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: self-index emergence not demonstrated at realistic scale real agents may fail to converge on a self-index due to stochastic outputs, shifting prompts, multi-user interference, or insufficient compression pressure. the prediction is deliberately falsifiable. limitation / open-question attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: truth, provenance, and safety remain separate problems

other

A stabilized memory can be false; a self-index can preserve a bad assumption; a high-fold-force memory can be poisoned. Source governance constrains laundering but does not prove semantic truth, classifier correctness, deployment security, or adversarial robustness.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: truth, provenance, and safety remain separate problems a stabilized memory can be false; a self-index can preserve a bad assumption; a high-fold-force memory can be poisoned. source governance constrains laundering but does not prove semantic truth, classifier correctness, deployment security, or adversarial robustness. limitation attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Limitation: memory taxonomy may be incomplete

open-question

Richer agents may need affective, social, spatial, perceptual, or multimodal memory types beyond episodic/semantic/procedural/operation/self-index.

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
limitation: memory taxonomy may be incomplete richer agents may need affective, social, spatial, perceptual, or multimodal memory types beyond episodic/semantic/procedural/operation/self-index. open-question / future-work attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex

◈ Related-work positioning by substrate level

other

A table placing RAG, MemGPT, Generative Agents, Reflexion/CLIN, AWM/Voyager, MemoryBank/A-MEM/Mem0/MIRIX, Transformer-XL/Infini-attn/Titans, Mamba/RWKV/RetNet, CoALA/ACT-R/Soar, LeCun by what they implement well vs. what's "missing" (not formalized as a substrate criterion). "Similarity is not continuity."

Attention_Is_Not_Continuity_updated.tex
---
related-work positioning by substrate level a table placing rag, memgpt, generative agents, reflexion/clin, awm/voyager, memorybank/a-mem/mem0/mirix, transformer-xl/infini-attn/titans, mamba/rwkv/retnet, coala/act-r/soar, lecun by what they implement well vs. what's missing (not formalized as a substrate criterion). similarity is not continuity. related-work distinction attention_is_not_continuity_updated.tex ---

Self-Indexed Mnestic Fold Calculus (SIMFC)

◈ Memory as effective re-entry, not stored content (operational criterion)

framing/ontology

The founding move: a residue counts as cognitive memory only when addressably re-entered into present computation such that it measurably changes the next transition. Memory is defined operationally, not substantively.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
"Memory is not the presence of stored content. Memory is the effective re-entry of prior state into a current transition."
memory as effective re-entry, not stored content (operational criterion) the founding move: a residue counts as cognitive memory only when addressably re-entered into present computation such that it measurably changes the next transition. memory is defined operationally, not substantively. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex memory is not the presence of stored content. memory is the effective re-entry of prior state into a current transition.

◈ The mnestic act as primitive unit

coinage

SIMFC's core object is not a stored item but a mnestic act: $\mu_t^{v,q}=(v, q_t, A(M_t,q_t,z_t), F(v,q_t,C_t))$ — an addressed residue folded into the current transition.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
the mnestic act as primitive unit simfc's core object is not a stored item but a *mnestic act*: $\mu_t^{v,q}=(v, q_t, a(m_t,q_t,z_t), f(v,q_t,c_t))$ — an addressed residue folded into the current transition. coinage simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Causal ($do$-operator) memory criterion

mechanism

A residue $v$ is cognitive memory iff a mnestic act exists with $\Delta_t^{mem}(v,q)=D(T_t^\mu \| T_t^0) > \varepsilon$, where $T_t^\mu$ is the transition with the fold and $T_t^0$ is the matched intervention withholding it. Interventionist, not correlational.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
causal ($do$-operator) memory criterion a residue $v$ is cognitive memory iff a mnestic act exists with $\delta_t^{mem}(v,q)=d(t_t^\mu \| t_t^0) > \varepsilon$, where $t_t^\mu$ is the transition with the fold and $t_t^0$ is the matched intervention withholding it. interventionist, not correlational. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Storage is insufficient (proposition)

result/finding

If a residue persists and is addressable but every fold falls below threshold, it is not cognitive memory. Persistence + addressability are necessary but not sufficient.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
storage is insufficient (proposition) if a residue persists and is addressable but every fold falls below threshold, it is not cognitive memory. persistence + addressability are necessary but not sufficient. result/finding simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Typed directed memory graph

mechanism

$M_t=(V_t, E_t, \ell_t, \lambda_t, \iota_t)$ — residue nodes; typed edges (caused, used, contradicts, same-event, same-agent, prior-operation, revised, owned-by); labeling (content, address key, modality, timestamp, node type); persistence function $\lambda$; index-binding function $\iota$. Node types: perceptual, semantic, episodic, procedural, action, goal, relation, operation, self-link.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
typed directed memory graph $m_t=(v_t, e_t, \ell_t, \lambda_t, \iota_t)$ — residue nodes; typed edges (caused, used, contradicts, same-event, same-agent, prior-operation, revised, owned-by); labeling (content, address key, modality, timestamp, node type); persistence function $\lambda$; index-binding function $\iota$. node types: perceptual, semantic, episodic, procedural, action, goal, relation, operation, self-link. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Six operators (P, Q, A, F, B, W) + transition kernel + index update

mechanism

Persistence/attenuation P, query generation Q, addressing/retrieval A, fold formation F, cross-channel integration B, write/update W, transition kernel Φ, and index-update operator J. Gives the graph runtime semantics.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
six operators (p, q, a, f, b, w) + transition kernel + index update persistence/attenuation p, query generation q, addressing/retrieval a, fold formation f, cross-channel integration b, write/update w, transition kernel φ, and index-update operator j. gives the graph runtime semantics. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Six-dimensional mnestic profile

framing/ontology

Each mnestic act has $\vec d = \langle \pi, \alpha, \varphi, \rho, \gamma, \iota \rangle$ = persistence, addressability, fold-force, recursive depth, integration span, index-binding. The six dimensions are operationally distinct and non-reducible, each with a characteristic collapse mode (reaction-without-continuity, archive-without-usable-memory, recall-without-transformation, memory-without-meta-cognition, local-competence-without-unified-field, competence-without-ownership).

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
six-dimensional mnestic profile each mnestic act has $\vec d = \langle \pi, \alpha, \varphi, \rho, \gamma, \iota \rangle$ = persistence, addressability, fold-force, recursive depth, integration span, index-binding. the six dimensions are operationally distinct and non-reducible, each with a characteristic collapse mode (reaction-without-continuity, archive-without-usable-memory, recall-without-transformation, memory-without-meta-cognition, local-competence-without-unified-field, competence-without-ownership). framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Fold-force replaces "memory strength"

framing/ontology

A memory is strong when it deforms future computation, not when it is vivid, large, or frequently retrieved. $\varphi(\mu)=D(T_t^\mu \| T_t^0)$.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
"A memory is strong when it deforms future computation, not merely when it is vivid, large, or frequently retrieved."
fold-force replaces memory strength a memory is strong when it deforms future computation, not when it is vivid, large, or frequently retrieved. $\varphi(\mu)=d(t_t^\mu \| t_t^0)$. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex a memory is strong when it deforms future computation, not merely when it is vivid, large, or frequently retrieved.

◈ Recursive depth: memory of operations, not contents

mechanism

$\rho(\mu)=1+\max_{\nu \prec v}\rho(\nu)$. Recursive cognition begins when residues of memory-use become themselves foldable. Ordinary memory folds prior world-state; recursive memory folds prior memory-use.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
recursive depth: memory of operations, not contents $\rho(\mu)=1+\max_{\nu \prec v}\rho(\nu)$. recursive cognition begins when residues of memory-use become themselves foldable. ordinary memory folds prior world-state; recursive memory folds prior memory-use. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Integration span as causal cross-channel binding

mechanism

$\gamma(\mu)=D(T_t^B \| T_t^{rand B})$ — the transition effect of cross-channel binding vs. randomized bindings. Makes integration causal, not merely structural: a system can hold many local memories yet lack a unified field if binding has little transition influence.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
integration span as causal cross-channel binding $\gamma(\mu)=d(t_t^b \| t_t^{rand b})$ — the transition effect of cross-channel binding vs. randomized bindings. makes integration causal, not merely structural: a system can hold many local memories yet lack a unified field if binding has little transition influence. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Index-shuffle test: bookkeeping vs. self-indexing

mechanism

$\sigma_t = D(P(\cdot\mid \iota_t) \| P(\cdot\mid \text{shuff}(\iota_t)))$. "A label that can be shuffled without consequence is bookkeeping, not self-indexing."

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
index-shuffle test: bookkeeping vs. self-indexing $\sigma_t = d(p(\cdot\mid \iota_t) \| p(\cdot\mid \text{shuff}(\iota_t)))$. a label that can be shuffled without consequence is bookkeeping, not self-indexing. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Unified runtime equation

mechanism

Persistence update → query gen → addressing → weighted fold aggregation $\bar\mu_t=\sum \omega_t(\mu)F(\mu)$ → transition → operation-record write (adds content AND operation nodes with used/produced/owned-by edges) → index update. The write operator's creation of operation nodes is "the minimal structure required for recursive memory."

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
unified runtime equation persistence update → query gen → addressing → weighted fold aggregation $\bar\mu_t=\sum \omega_t(\mu)f(\mu)$ → transition → operation-record write (adds content and operation nodes with used/produced/owned-by edges) → index update. the write operator's creation of operation nodes is the minimal structure required for recursive memory. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Selective fold weighting; more memory is not better memory

framing/ontology

The fold-selection kernel $\omega_t$ is critical: a system with maximal persistence/addressability degrades if too many residues enter the transition indiscriminately. "Forgetting and filtering are not defects by default. They may be constitutive of coherent cognition."

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
selective fold weighting; more memory is not better memory the fold-selection kernel $\omega_t$ is critical: a system with maximal persistence/addressability degrades if too many residues enter the transition indiscriminately. forgetting and filtering are not defects by default. they may be constitutive of coherent cognition. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Five levels of mnestic organization by threshold crossing

framing/ontology

L1 Trace → L2 Storage ($p\ge\theta_P$) → L3 Addressable cognitive memory ($p,a,e$) → L4 Recursive memory (operation-memory folds affect transition, $r\ge\theta_R$) → L5 Self-indexed recursive memory (bound to a stable causally active referent, $i\ge\theta_I$, bounded drift). A "consciousness-candidate regime" $C^\star$ requires all six thresholds simultaneously.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
five levels of mnestic organization by threshold crossing l1 trace → l2 storage ($p\ge\theta_p$) → l3 addressable cognitive memory ($p,a,e$) → l4 recursive memory (operation-memory folds affect transition, $r\ge\theta_r$) → l5 self-indexed recursive memory (bound to a stable causally active referent, $i\ge\theta_i$, bounded drift). a consciousness-candidate regime $c^\star$ requires all six thresholds simultaneously. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Consciousness-candidate regime (explicitly not "solving consciousness")

framing/ontology

$C^\star_t = 1 \iff p\ge\theta_P \land a\ge\theta_A \land e\ge\theta_E \land r\ge\theta_R \land g\ge\theta_G \land i\ge\theta_I$ — a candidate operational class (persistent, addressable, integrated, self-indexed recursive re-entry), not a claim of phenomenal experience.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
consciousness-candidate regime (explicitly not solving consciousness ) $c^\star_t = 1 \iff p\ge\theta_p \land a\ge\theta_a \land e\ge\theta_e \land r\ge\theta_r \land g\ge\theta_g \land i\ge\theta_i$ — a candidate *operational class* (persistent, addressable, integrated, self-indexed recursive re-entry), not a claim of phenomenal experience. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Recursive integrated fold pressure Π_t

mechanism

$\Pi_t(z)=\sum_\mu \omega_t(\mu)\iota(\mu,z)\varphi(\mu)\rho(\mu)\gamma(\mu)$ — the dynamical pressure by which high-fold-force, recursive, integrated acts pull toward a common referent when doing so makes them mutually usable.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
recursive integrated fold pressure π_t $\pi_t(z)=\sum_\mu \omega_t(\mu)\iota(\mu,z)\varphi(\mu)\rho(\mu)\gamma(\mu)$ — the dynamical pressure by which high-fold-force, recursive, integrated acts pull toward a common referent when doing so makes them mutually usable. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Index utility functional J_t and the emergent self-index

mechanism

$\mathcal{J}_t(z)=\Pi_t(z)-\lambda K(z\mid M_t)-\eta d_Z(z,z_{t-1})+\xi I(z; a_{t:t+k}\mid u_{t:t+k})$ combining fold pressure, MDL compression cost, drift penalty, and action-coupling. An emergent self-index is a stable maximizer above threshold with bounded drift and shuffle-sensitivity — merging the dynamical convergence intuition with the MDL "cheaper to bind than leave unbound" intuition.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
index utility functional j_t and the emergent self-index $\mathcal{j}_t(z)=\pi_t(z)-\lambda k(z\mid m_t)-\eta d_z(z,z_{t-1})+\xi i(z; a_{t:t+k}\mid u_{t:t+k})$ combining fold pressure, mdl compression cost, drift penalty, and action-coupling. an emergent self-index is a stable maximizer above threshold with bounded drift and shuffle-sensitivity — merging the dynamical convergence intuition with the mdl cheaper to bind than leave unbound intuition. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Self-index emergence without a primitive self token (proposition)

result/finding

If the memory holds a growing set of recursive/integrated/transition-changing acts, $\mathcal{J}_t$ has a unique stable maximizer, and it is action-coupled and shuffle-sensitive, SIMFC classifies it as an emergent self-index even with no explicit self symbol programmed. The self is derived, not assumed.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
self-index emergence without a primitive self token (proposition) if the memory holds a growing set of recursive/integrated/transition-changing acts, $\mathcal{j}_t$ has a unique stable maximizer, and it is action-coupled and shuffle-sensitive, simfc classifies it as an emergent self-index even with no explicit self symbol programmed. the self is derived, not assumed. result/finding simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ The self is an index, not a substance or content item

framing/ontology

A self-index is a continuing referent through which recursive memories bind — a functional compression point, not a verbal self-description; real in the framework only if it causally affects transition.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
"The self-index is real in the framework only if it causally affects transition."
the self is an index, not a substance or content item a self-index is a continuing referent through which recursive memories bind — a functional compression point, not a verbal self-description; real in the framework only if it causally affects transition. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex the self-index is real in the framework only if it causally affects transition.

◈ Self-indexing and integration are orthogonal binding operations

framing/ontology

Integration binds across channels/modalities at a time; self-indexing binds across time through a continuing referent. A system can have unified multimodal episodes without ownership, or autobiographical continuity while fragmenting experience across contexts. $\gamma$ and $\iota$ are dissociable by their respective randomization tests.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
self-indexing and integration are orthogonal binding operations integration binds across channels/modalities *at a time*; self-indexing binds across time through a continuing referent. a system can have unified multimodal episodes without ownership, or autobiographical continuity while fragmenting experience across contexts. $\gamma$ and $\iota$ are dissociable by their respective randomization tests. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Operation-compression operator and the rich-record regime

mechanism

$K^*=\arg\min[|K(V^{op})|+\beta_K D(T^{full}\|T^K)]$ subject to preserving self-indexing-relevant transition behavior AND top-k recall of decision content. Minimal compressed operation record $\bar o_t=(\text{retrieved, used, revised, error-corrected, index-bound}, \Delta_t^{mem})$. In rich/distinctive/high-bandwidth regimes full preservation can be accuracy-optimal until resource costs dominate.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
operation-compression operator and the rich-record regime $k^*=\arg\min[|k(v^{op})|+\beta_k d(t^{full}\|t^k)]$ subject to preserving self-indexing-relevant transition behavior and top-k recall of decision content. minimal compressed operation record $\bar o_t=(\text{retrieved, used, revised, error-corrected, index-bound}, \delta_t^{mem})$. in rich/distinctive/high-bandwidth regimes full preservation can be accuracy-optimal until resource costs dominate. mechanism simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Boundary paradox: the index bootstrap

framing/ontology

A memory is self-bound when it binds to an index, but the index emerges only after enough memories bind. Resolved by proto-binding: proto-bound memories accumulate around candidate regularities; once a stable $\mathcal{J}_t$ maximizer appears, prior proto-bindings are reinterpreted as belonging to a continuing referent.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
"Selfhood begins as retroactive closure, not as an instantaneous primitive."
boundary paradox: the index bootstrap a memory is self-bound when it binds to an index, but the index emerges only after enough memories bind. resolved by proto-binding: proto-bound memories accumulate around candidate regularities; once a stable $\mathcal{j}_t$ maximizer appears, prior proto-bindings are reinterpreted as belonging to a continuing referent. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex selfhood begins as retroactive closure, not as an instantaneous primitive.

◈ Boundary paradox: continuity-revision (the drift band)

framing/ontology

The index must stay stable yet be revised: $0 < d_Z(z_t,z_{t+1}) < \zeta$. Too little drift = rigidity; too much = fragmentation.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
"A continuing self-index must change in order to remain itself."
boundary paradox: continuity-revision (the drift band) the index must stay stable yet be revised: $0 < d_z(z_t,z_{t+1}) < \zeta$. too little drift = rigidity; too much = fragmentation. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex a continuing self-index must change in order to remain itself.

◈ Boundary paradox: recursive-memory regress

framing/ontology

Storing every memory-operation produces unbounded meta-memory ($o_t \to o_{t+1}^{op} \to o_{t+2}^{op\text{-}op}\to\cdots$). The compression operator is not an implementation detail but constitutive — a system that cannot compress operation history cannot sustain recursive self-indexed memory.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
boundary paradox: recursive-memory regress storing every memory-operation produces unbounded meta-memory ($o_t \to o_{t+1}^{op} \to o_{t+2}^{op\text{-}op}\to\cdots$). the compression operator is not an implementation detail but constitutive — a system that cannot compress operation history cannot sustain recursive self-indexed memory. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Boundary paradox: forked-index branching (branch-sensitive identity)

framing/ontology

On copy $(M_t,z_t)\to(M_t^A,z_t^A),(M_t^B,z_t^B)$, after divergent updates the index splits when successors no longer share a causally integrated update path. Both branches can be legitimate successors; neither is the unique metaphysical continuation. Personal continuity = causal-integrative succession, not substance identity.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
boundary paradox: forked-index branching (branch-sensitive identity) on copy $(m_t,z_t)\to(m_t^a,z_t^a),(m_t^b,z_t^b)$, after divergent updates the index splits when successors no longer share a causally integrated update path. both branches can be legitimate successors; neither is the unique metaphysical continuation. personal continuity = causal-integrative succession, not substance identity. framing/ontology simfc_manuscript.tex

◈ Boundary paradox: the bookkeeping-self problem

framing/ontology

A database user/agent label is not a self-index unless shuffling it changes transition behavior ($\sigma_t > \theta_I$). Blocks overgeneration of selfhood.

SIMFC_manuscript.tex
