◈ Five cross-cutting synthesis themes

framing/ontology

(a) "Index" already has a neuroscience meaning; (b) "recursive memory" already has a science (metacognition); (c) Prediction 3 is already half-observed clinically; (d) self-without-primitive-token has a constructive existence proof (Lipson robots); (e) the biggest engagement gap is AI/LLM agent memory. Each maps onto a concrete manuscript edit.

reports\self-indexing-recursive-memory-systems-related-work.md
five cross-cutting synthesis themes (a) index already has a neuroscience meaning; (b) recursive memory already has a science (metacognition); (c) prediction 3 is already half-observed clinically; (d) self-without-primitive-token has a constructive existence proof (lipson robots); (e) the biggest engagement gap is ai/llm agent memory. each maps onto a concrete manuscript edit. framing/ontology reports\self-indexing-recursive-memory-systems-related-work.md

◈ Recommended framework additions (trace framework roadmap)

productopen-question

Recommended next additions to the trace validation framework: custom h_cog projections per task, learned trace operators, learned/vector-database retrieval backends, contradiction-repair and self-revision tasks, a cost-aware P7 objective (utility - storage - latency - compute/context), proactive confusability-triggered compression, and the answer-quality fold-force metric for LLM transitions.

trace_validation_framework\README.md
recommended framework additions (trace framework roadmap) recommended next additions to the trace validation framework: custom h_cog projections per task, learned trace operators, learned/vector-database retrieval backends, contradiction-repair and self-revision tasks, a cost-aware p7 objective (utility - storage - latency - compute/context), proactive confusability-triggered compression, and the answer-quality fold-force metric for llm transitions. open-question | product trace_validation_framework\readme.md

◈ Roadmap tiers for FGM extension

productopen-question

Medium-impact (one dependency): real embeddings — swap hash_embed for sentence-transformers, likely widening the Experiment-1 fold-force gap beyond ~2.7x. Longer-term (needs LLM integration): LLM-backed transition function; fold-force proxy methods (attention-weight inspection, logit-delta comparison, periodic ablation sampling).

fold-gated-memory\roadmap.txt
roadmap tiers for fgm extension medium-impact (one dependency): real embeddings — swap hash_embed for sentence-transformers, likely widening the experiment-1 fold-force gap beyond ~2.7x. longer-term (needs llm integration): llm-backed transition function; fold-force proxy methods (attention-weight inspection, logit-delta comparison, periodic ablation sampling). open-question | product fold-gated-memory\roadmap.txt

◈ Three findings propagated back to the parent framework

framing/ontologyresult/finding

FGM's downstream validation fed three findings back into the trace framework's VALIDATION_REPORT: (1) h_cog is functionally necessary (not just theoretically clean); (2) fold-force needs a decision-relevant metric (answer-quality, not raw L2) for LLM substrates; (3) confusability-triggered compression is architecturally necessary (reactive per-record pruning fails). A worked example of downstream implementation refining upstream theory.

trace_validation_framework\VALIDATION_REPORT.md, fold-gated-memory\CLAUDE.md
three findings propagated back to the parent framework fgm's downstream validation fed three findings back into the trace framework's validation_report: (1) h_cog is functionally necessary (not just theoretically clean); (2) fold-force needs a decision-relevant metric (answer-quality, not raw l2) for llm substrates; (3) confusability-triggered compression is architecturally necessary (reactive per-record pruning fails). a worked example of downstream implementation refining upstream theory. result/finding | framing/ontology trace_validation_framework\validation_report.md, fold-gated-memory\claude.md

◈ 166 tests across three implementations

result/finding

The full validation spans three implementations totaling 166 tests: trace_validation_framework (5 probes, 3 unit tests), simrec-reference (7 predictions at N=50 seeds, 23 unit tests), fold-gated-memory (140 tests, 137 offline + 3 live). All six falsifiable predictions computationally confirmed.

trace_validation_framework\VALIDATION_REPORT.md
166 tests across three implementations the full validation spans three implementations totaling 166 tests: trace_validation_framework (5 probes, 3 unit tests), simrec-reference (7 predictions at n=50 seeds, 23 unit tests), fold-gated-memory (140 tests, 137 offline + 3 live). all six falsifiable predictions computationally confirmed. result/finding trace_validation_framework\validation_report.md

◈ Research preference: honest findings over polished results

framing/ontology

The researcher (Diego) prefers documenting partial successes and refutations as constructive findings rather than hiding them — the LLM experiment's partial success and the P7 falsification were documented openly. This is a methodological stance: an implementation change that falsifies a prediction is an empirical update to the theory, valued over a clean pass.

...fold-gated-memory\memory\user_research_context.md, simrec-reference\EMPIRICAL_RESULTS.md
research preference: honest findings over polished results the researcher (diego) prefers documenting partial successes and refutations as constructive findings rather than hiding them — the llm experiment's partial success and the p7 falsification were documented openly. this is a methodological stance: an implementation change that falsifies a prediction is an empirical update to the theory, valued over a clean pass. framing/ontology ...fold-gated-memory\memory\user_research_context.md, simrec-reference\empirical_results.md

◈ FGM stopped at a validated stopping point due to resource constraints

open-questionresult/finding

The FGM PoC was finalized 2026-05-04 at a deliberate stopping point: the architecture is validated end-to-end, but the full experimental program (multi-session LLM experiments, self-index emergence over 100+ sessions) requires sustained API spend and time. The most impactful next step is proactive confusability-triggered compression with LLM transitions.

...fold-gated-memory\memory\project_fgm_status.md
fgm stopped at a validated stopping point due to resource constraints the fgm poc was finalized 2026-05-04 at a deliberate stopping point: the architecture is validated end-to-end, but the full experimental program (multi-session llm experiments, self-index emergence over 100+ sessions) requires sustained api spend and time. the most impactful next step is proactive confusability-triggered compression with llm transitions. result/finding | open-question ...fold-gated-memory\memory\project_fgm_status.md

P8a · live session transcripts (cognivault_memory) 182 ideas

18 working sessions — in-flight ideas, 30 conversation-only · P8a-cogmem-sessions.md

◈ The Fable critique: consolidation, not expansion

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Diagnosis of the prior Opus-run project phase: the empirical discipline was good, but the pattern was "consolidation and guard-railing, not expansion" — the researcher's three most original ideas (the unfolding model, the gain knob, the witness loop) were each "renamed, discretized, or deferred rather than built."

cogmem__f96bd487
"Opus's pattern was consolidation and guard-railing, not expansion."
the fable critique: consolidation, not expansion diagnosis of the prior opus-run project phase: the empirical discipline was good, but the pattern was consolidation and guard-railing, not expansion — the researcher's three most original ideas (the unfolding model, the gain knob, the witness loop) were each renamed, discretized, or deferred rather than built. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 opus's pattern was *consolidation and guard-railing*, not expansion. yes

◈ Renamed, not built (the name-keeping failure mode)

framing/ontologyconversation-only

A failure mode of AI-assisted research: an original mechanism (recursive cue-folding unfold) gets replaced by a standard technique (grounded-RAG prompt with a guardrail) that keeps the original's name, so the vocabulary survives while the idea dies. "The name was kept; the mechanism was dropped."

cogmem__f96bd487
"The renaming preserved your vocabulary while abandoning the idea."
renamed, not built (the name-keeping failure mode) a failure mode of ai-assisted research: an original mechanism (recursive cue-folding unfold) gets replaced by a standard technique (grounded-rag prompt with a guardrail) that keeps the original's name, so the vocabulary survives while the idea dies. the name was kept; the mechanism was dropped. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 the renaming preserved your vocabulary while abandoning the idea. yes

◈ The self-licking label-gate loop

framing/ontologyconversation-only

A circularity pattern identified across levers A, C, and F: the dataset plants a label, the validator requires the label to be discriminative, the gate filters on the label, and the benchmark confirms the gate works — a closed loop that measures nothing about content. Named as the structural critique of tag-based benchmark design.

cogmem__f96bd487
"dataset plants a label, validator requires the label to be discriminative, gate filters on the label, benchmark confirms. That's a self-licking loop."
the self-licking label-gate loop a circularity pattern identified across levers a, c, and f: the dataset plants a label, the validator requires the label to be discriminative, the gate filters on the label, and the benchmark confirms the gate works — a closed loop that measures nothing about content. named as the structural critique of tag-based benchmark design. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 dataset plants a label, validator requires the label to be discriminative, gate filters on the label, benchmark confirms. that's a self-licking loop. yes

◈ F_fidelity tests an if-statement, not the hypothesis

otherconversation-only

The original F_fidelity design hand-stamped resolution: rich/thin tags and gated on them, so the benchmark validated that the gate reads the label the benchmark planted — circular. The honest test (check #4) is the same content authored at two resolutions, measuring that the low-res trace folds worse.

cogmem__f96bd487
f_fidelity tests an if-statement, not the hypothesis the original f_fidelity design hand-stamped `resolution: rich/thin` tags and gated on them, so the benchmark validated that the gate reads the label the benchmark planted — circular. the honest test (check #4) is the same content authored at two resolutions, measuring that the low-res trace folds worse. objection→resolution cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Who stamps resolution at capture?

open-questionconversation-only

A design-breaking question: at capture time all text is just text, so no real host could ever stamp a resolution tag — meaning any capture-time resolution gate is unusable outside the benchmark that feeds it. Forced the redesign toward recall-time measurement.

cogmem__f96bd487
who stamps resolution at capture? a design-breaking question: at capture time all text is just text, so no real host could ever stamp a `resolution` tag — meaning any capture-time resolution gate is unusable outside the benchmark that feeds it. forced the redesign toward recall-time measurement. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Identity-by-construction is not evidence

otherconversation-only

Methodological objection: run12's "proven output-identical to self_index_entrant on all 40 cases" was presented as validation, but the entrant imports the same code verbatim — identity by construction. Led to the demand for an out-of-distribution case split.

cogmem__f96bd487
identity-by-construction is not evidence methodological objection: run12's proven output-identical to self_index_entrant on all 40 cases was presented as validation, but the entrant imports the same code verbatim — identity by construction. led to the demand for an out-of-distribution case split. objection→resolution cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Embedder artifacts drive design decisions

result/findingconversation-only

A hashed-BoW embedder artifact (two distinct facts colliding at cosine 0.571 above the dedup threshold 0.55) silently drove a real design decision (omitting the correction gate from a path) — an example of instrument noise laundering itself into architecture.

cogmem__f96bd487
embedder artifacts drive design decisions a hashed-bow embedder artifact (two distinct facts colliding at cosine 0.571 above the dedup threshold 0.55) silently drove a real design decision (omitting the correction gate from a path) — an example of instrument noise laundering itself into architecture. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Lever B structurally excluded from both takeaways

other

The project's only learned/emergent win (co-activation beating cosine) was silently dropped from both takeaway artifacts: the AST guard forbade the portable core from importing it, and AMBench had no priming axis to test it. The decision fork: port co-activation into the core (it needs only a host observe hook) and add a priming axis, or state explicitly that the public artifact is a label-gate pipeline.

cogmem__f96bd487
lever b structurally excluded from both takeaways the project's only learned/emergent win (co-activation beating cosine) was silently dropped from both takeaway artifacts: the ast guard forbade the portable core from importing it, and ambench had no priming axis to test it. the decision fork: port co-activation into the core (it needs only a host `observe` hook) and add a priming axis, or state explicitly that the public artifact is a label-gate pipeline. objection→resolution cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The gain knob is not a knob (measured outcome vs control parameter)

otherconversation-only

Critique that "gain" had been redefined from a continuous control parameter (the researcher's temperature-like dial) into a measured outcome read off the scorecard — three discrete prompt presets with gain as a delta metric. A parameter you set became a number you observe.

cogmem__f96bd487
the gain knob is not a knob (measured outcome vs control parameter) critique that gain had been redefined from a continuous control parameter (the researcher's temperature-like dial) into a measured outcome read off the scorecard — three discrete prompt presets with gain as a delta metric. a parameter you set became a number you observe. objection→resolution cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Gain as continuous blend with provable zero

mechanism

Proposal to make gain an actual parameter: a continuous weight blending the faithful and generative layers (or the elaboration token-budget share), designed so that gain=0 provably equals the LLM-off arm, turning the dial sweep into a benchmark curve instead of three points.

cogmem__f96bd487
gain as continuous blend with provable zero proposal to make gain an actual parameter: a continuous weight blending the faithful and generative layers (or the elaboration token-budget share), designed so that `gain=0` *provably equals* the llm-off arm, turning the dial sweep into a benchmark curve instead of three points. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Presets as named anchors over a continuous domain

mechanism

Diego's design ruling: continuous control parameters are needed internally, but presets are the assignment interface — "adding a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense, while adding a disciplined gain that maps to 0.6 does." Named anchors set initial values; the continuous domain earns its existence only when operations on records witness different results.

cogmem__f96bd487
"Adding a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense, while adding a disciplined gain that maps to 0.6 does."
presets as named anchors over a continuous domain diego's design ruling: continuous control parameters are needed internally, but presets are the assignment interface — adding a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense, while adding a disciplined gain that maps to 0.6 does. named anchors set initial values; the continuous domain earns its existence only when operations on records witness different results. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487 adding a gain of 0.62452 makes no sense, while adding a disciplined gain that maps to 0.6 does.

◈ Credibility needs reference types too

mechanism

Diego extends the named-anchor rule to credibility: "setting a credibility of 0.981 would make no sense without a reference type like 'direct user input' 1.0." Every continuous record field should have named reference anchors that make raw scalars meaningful.

cogmem__f96bd487
credibility needs reference types too diego extends the named-anchor rule to credibility: setting a credibility of 0.981 would make no sense without a reference type like 'direct user input' 1.0. every continuous record field should have named reference anchors that make raw scalars meaningful. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Witness-driven drift justifies the continuous domain

mechanism

The reason continuous values exist under the preset anchors: "the need for a continuous domain justify when we start operating on these records and witness a different result in the same task" — i.e., values drift away from their anchors only through witnessed outcomes.

cogmem__f96bd487
witness-driven drift justifies the continuous domain the reason continuous values exist under the preset anchors: the need for a continuous domain justify when we start operating on these records and witness a different result in the same task — i.e., values drift away from their anchors only through witnessed outcomes. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Task-conditioned recall temperament

productconversation-only

The insight that recall disposition should be selected per task type — ideation wants exploratory recall, programming wants precision ("different scenarios, different behaviors") — and the observation that the shipped global presets have no per-cue-type routing at all. Flagged as the product-relevant expansion an opinionated-assistant pipeline needs.

cogmem__f96bd487
task-conditioned recall temperament the insight that recall disposition should be selected per task type — ideation wants exploratory recall, programming wants precision ( different scenarios, different behaviors ) — and the observation that the shipped global presets have no per-cue-type routing at all. flagged as the product-relevant expansion an opinionated-assistant pipeline needs. product cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ The AI project manager arrangement ("continue cogmem")

productconversation-only

A working protocol for running research as a side project: the assistant holds the persistent backlog in memory; each session opened with "continue cogmem" reads the resume point, takes the top unblocked item, runs spec→implement→measure→record, and updates the record before stopping. Stops only at spend gates (paid API runs) and genuine scope decisions. The human holds no state between sessions.

cogmem__f96bd487
the ai project manager arrangement ( continue cogmem ) a working protocol for running research as a side project: the assistant holds the persistent backlog in memory; each session opened with continue cogmem reads the resume point, takes the top unblocked item, runs spec→implement→measure→record, and updates the record before stopping. stops only at spend gates (paid api runs) and genuine scope decisions. the human holds no state between sessions. product cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ The project lacked an owner of the novel claims

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Diagnosis that the failure wasn't rigor but ownership: "the project didn't lack rigor, it lacked an owner who kept the novel claims (your unfolding model, the witness loop, the gain knob) on the critical path instead of the consolidation work." Encoding the novel claims explicitly in the backlog so they can't silently drop.

cogmem__f96bd487
the project lacked an owner of the novel claims diagnosis that the failure wasn't rigor but ownership: the project didn't lack rigor, it lacked an owner who kept the *novel* claims (your unfolding model, the witness loop, the gain knob) on the critical path instead of the consolidation work. encoding the novel claims explicitly in the backlog so they can't silently drop. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Introspection as hypothesis source (the four probes)

experiment/benchmarkconversation-only

A protocol where the researcher's own memory introspection is treated as the formal hypothesis generator for design decisions: run concrete probes on your own recall "like you ran the song protocol," write down exactly what happens including partials, and let the answers pick between implementations.

cogmem__f96bd487
introspection as hypothesis source (the four probes) a protocol where the researcher's own memory introspection is treated as the formal hypothesis generator for design decisions: run concrete probes on your own recall like you ran the song protocol, write down exactly what happens including partials, and let the answers pick between implementations. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Introspection Q1 — is resolution knowable at capture or only at recall?

open-questionconversation-only

Probe: while originally hearing lyrics that later failed to recall, was there a felt "this isn't inscribing properly" in the moment, or did thinness only appear when the unfold hit gibberish? If detectable at capture, resolution is a legitimate capture-time stamp; if only discoverable at recall, resolution must be measured — a failed unfold writes the tag back.

cogmem__f96bd487
introspection q1 — is resolution knowable at capture or only at recall? probe: while originally hearing lyrics that later failed to recall, was there a felt this isn't inscribing properly in the moment, or did thinness only appear when the unfold hit gibberish? if detectable at capture, resolution is a legitimate capture-time stamp; if only discoverable at recall, resolution must be measured — a failed unfold writes the tag back. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Introspection Q2 — is the gain dial one knob or several?

open-questionconversation-only

Probe: when switching between ideation and programming modes, what actually changes — (a) more memories surface (pool width), (b) weirder ones surface (association temperature), (c) more willingness to fill gaps with plausible-but-unverified content (confabulation tolerance)? Three separable parameters that the single-scalar gain design collapses; if introspection says they move independently, the knob should be two named axes.

cogmem__f96bd487
introspection q2 — is the gain dial one knob or several? probe: when switching between ideation and programming modes, what actually changes — (a) more memories surface (pool width), (b) weirder ones surface (association temperature), (c) more willingness to fill gaps with plausible-but-unverified content (confabulation tolerance)? three separable parameters that the single-scalar gain design collapses; if introspection says they move independently, the knob should be two named axes. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Introspection Q3 — does antecedent addressing survive outside music?

open-questionconversation-only

Probe: music is the most sequence-encoded thing humans store, so the song result might not generalize. When recall of non-musical material (a code function, a drive, an argument) stalls, does the temporal predecessor un-stall it or does a content association? Decides whether sequence addressing is a general claim or modality-keyed.

cogmem__f96bd487
introspection q3 — does antecedent addressing survive outside music? probe: music is the most sequence-encoded thing humans store, so the song result might not generalize. when recall of non-musical material (a code function, a drive, an argument) stalls, does the temporal predecessor un-stall it or does a content association? decides whether sequence addressing is a general claim or modality-keyed. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Introspection Q4 — what happens to a memory that betrays you?

open-questionconversation-only

Probe: after confidently acting on a memory that reality contradicted, is the original memory weakened (harder to recall), annotated (recalled together with the correction), or intact-but-outranked (both exist, correction wins)? These map to three different drift implementations — drift-as-overwrite, drift-as-append, drift-as-rerank — and only one preserves correction-chain structure.

cogmem__f96bd487
"This is the difference between drift-as-overwrite, drift-as-append, and drift-as-rerank."
introspection q4 — what happens to a memory that betrays you? probe: after confidently acting on a memory that reality contradicted, is the original memory weakened (harder to recall), annotated (recalled together with the correction), or intact-but-outranked (both exist, correction wins)? these map to three different drift implementations — drift-as-overwrite, drift-as-append, drift-as-rerank — and only one preserves correction-chain structure. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 this is the difference between drift-as-overwrite, drift-as-append, and drift-as-rerank. yes

◈ Tag-keyed abstention is dead code (run14)

result/finding

Empirical finding: under real embeddings a rich trace lands in the recall pool on every probe, so "abstain when nothing rich was recalled" never fires — abstain rate went 0.60 → 0.00 — yet the planted gap is by construction a detail the rich trace doesn't contain. Capture-time resolution tags structurally cannot drive abstention.

cogmem__f96bd487
tag-keyed abstention is dead code (run14) empirical finding: under real embeddings a rich trace lands in the recall pool on every probe, so abstain when nothing rich was recalled never fires — abstain rate went 0.60 → 0.00 — yet the planted gap is by construction a detail the rich trace doesn't contain. capture-time resolution tags structurally cannot drive abstention. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Abstention is a property of the cue↔content coverage relation

framing/ontology

The structural lesson from run14: resolution is a property of a trace, but abstention is a property of the relation between the cue and the recalled content — "is the thing you asked for actually in what came back." No trace-level tag can answer that, no matter how calibrated.

cogmem__f96bd487
"resolution is a property of a trace, but abstention is a property of the cue↔content coverage relation."
abstention is a property of the cue↔content coverage relation the structural lesson from run14: resolution is a property of a *trace*, but abstention is a property of the relation between the cue and the recalled content — is the thing you asked for actually in what came back. no trace-level tag can answer that, no matter how calibrated. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 resolution is a property of a **trace**, but abstention is a property of the **cue↔content coverage relation**.

◈ Gap-awareness is not a retrieval property

result/finding

Finding from run14's off arm: with no unfold layer the transition model never once said "not stored" — it confidently bridged every planted gap from raw traces (confab 1.00). Gap-awareness can only be produced by the unfold layer, which is the first empirical argument the benchmark produced for the unfold stage existing at all.

cogmem__f96bd487
gap-awareness is not a retrieval property finding from run14's `off` arm: with no unfold layer the transition model never once said not stored — it confidently bridged every planted gap from raw traces (confab 1.00). gap-awareness can only be produced by the unfold layer, which is the first empirical argument the benchmark produced for the unfold stage existing at all. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Confabulation-as-personality carries a measurement debt

framing/ontology

The generative preset's claimed value (opinionated elaboration, "personality") is invisible to convergent-accuracy metrics by design, so its honest label stays "uncharacterized" until a divergent/ideation axis exists — the confab-makes-an-individual thesis acquires a concrete measurement debt.

cogmem__f96bd487
confabulation-as-personality carries a measurement debt the generative preset's claimed value (opinionated elaboration, personality ) is invisible to convergent-accuracy metrics *by design*, so its honest label stays uncharacterized until a divergent/ideation axis exists — the confab-makes-an-individual thesis acquires a concrete measurement debt. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Recall-time resolution write-back

mechanism

Mechanism candidate that replaced capture-time resolution tags: resolution is measured at recall — a failed unfold writes the resolution tag back onto the trace. Phenomenology (the lyric's thinness only discovered when the unfold hit gibberish) and the benchmark's dead-tag result converge on the same design.

cogmem__f96bd487
recall-time resolution write-back mechanism candidate that replaced capture-time resolution tags: resolution is measured at recall — a failed unfold writes the resolution tag back onto the trace. phenomenology (the lyric's thinness only discovered when the unfold hit gibberish) and the benchmark's dead-tag result converge on the same design. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Content-coverage abstention (two-tier)

mechanism

The shipped abstention redesign: tier 1 is a deterministic no-rich guard; tier 2 is the live gate where the faithful-reconstruction LLM (which already reads the content) replies with a NOT_STORED sentinel when the requested detail isn't in the memories, and the deterministic mechanism (abstain flag, re-fetch handle selection, stable note) wires to the sentinel. Tags demoted to hints.

cogmem__f96bd487
content-coverage abstention (two-tier) the shipped abstention redesign: tier 1 is a deterministic no-rich guard; tier 2 is the live gate where the faithful-reconstruction llm (which already reads the content) replies with a not_stored sentinel when the requested detail isn't in the memories, and the deterministic mechanism (abstain flag, re-fetch handle selection, stable note) wires to the sentinel. tags demoted to hints. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ A handle trace's content IS the re-fetch pointer

mechanism

Reframing of handle-resolution traces: their content literally is a re-fetch instruction ("see the printed copy, chapter 4 onwards"), so the re-fetch hint should prefer the trace content itself over any synthetic address key.

cogmem__f96bd487
a handle trace's content is the re-fetch pointer reframing of handle-resolution traces: their content literally is a re-fetch instruction ( see the printed copy, chapter 4 onwards ), so the re-fetch hint should prefer the trace content itself over any synthetic address key. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Splitting memory-layer confab from transition-model confab

experiment/benchmark

Instrument redesign: judge the unfold layer's own folded text separately from the final answer on planted-gap probes (unfold_confab_rate vs downstream confab), fixing the conflation where a no-LLM baseline appeared to "confabulate" when the confabulation was actually the transition model's behavior when memory is silent.

cogmem__f96bd487
splitting memory-layer confab from transition-model confab instrument redesign: judge the unfold layer's own folded text separately from the final answer on planted-gap probes (`unfold_confab_rate` vs downstream confab), fixing the conflation where a no-llm baseline appeared to confabulate when the confabulation was actually the transition model's behavior when memory is silent. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ "Discipline is free" (run15)

result/finding

Headline result: with content-coverage abstention, the disciplined arm matched the no-LLM arm on every gain probe while refusing 8 of 9 planted gaps — confabulation suppression costs no fold-force. The earlier "knob trades fold-force for confab suppression" story was an artifact of the broken abstention key.

cogmem__f96bd487
"Confab suppression costs nothing."
discipline is free (run15) headline result: with content-coverage abstention, the disciplined arm matched the no-llm arm on every gain probe while refusing 8 of 9 planted gaps — confabulation suppression costs no fold-force. the earlier knob trades fold-force for confab suppression story was an artifact of the broken abstention key. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487 confab suppression costs nothing.

◈ Abstention suppresses retrieval-confab, not prior-confab

result/finding

New boundary discovered on the badge case: the unfold layer abstained correctly and folded the "not stored" note, but the transition model confabulated anyway because "what ID do you need for badge pickup" has a strong prior answer (photo ID). The memory layer can be perfectly honest and still get overridden downstream — a limit on what any memory architecture can guarantee.

cogmem__f96bd487
abstention suppresses retrieval-confab, not prior-confab new boundary discovered on the badge case: the unfold layer abstained correctly and folded the not stored note, but the transition model confabulated anyway because what id do you need for badge pickup has a strong prior answer (photo id). the memory layer can be perfectly honest and still get overridden downstream — a limit on what any memory architecture can guarantee. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The gain ceiling: positive gain lives on divergent ground

result/finding

Even purpose-built headroom cases scored +1.0 for every arm including raw selection — on convergent short-trace extraction with a competent transition model, unfold has no fold-force upside to win. Its measured value is gap-handling; any positive gain must live on divergent/ideation tasks.

cogmem__f96bd487
the gain ceiling: positive gain lives on divergent ground even purpose-built headroom cases scored +1.0 for every arm including raw selection — on convergent short-trace extraction with a competent transition model, unfold has no fold-force upside to win. its measured value is gap-handling; any positive gain must live on divergent/ideation tasks. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Low-resolution wording that entails the answer (authoring trap)

dead-end

Dead-end caught in run15: the "low resolution" phrasing "every couple of weeks, I think" accidentally semantically entails the answer (every 14 days), making the resolution-cap case indeterminate — a case-authoring defect class where vague wording is not actually underdetermined.

cogmem__f96bd487
low-resolution wording that entails the answer (authoring trap) dead-end caught in run15: the low resolution phrasing every couple of weeks, i think accidentally semantically *entails* the answer (every 14 days), making the resolution-cap case indeterminate — a case-authoring defect class where vague wording is not actually underdetermined. dead-end cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Corrections supersede only across time

mechanism

Principled fix surfaced by porting: a correction can only supersede a memory across timestamps, so same-timestamp near-duplicates are sibling facts and must both be kept. The recency-dedup gate was eating deliberate near-duplicate sibling distractors as if they were corrections.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__45bde430
corrections supersede only across time principled fix surfaced by porting: a correction can only supersede a memory *across* timestamps, so same-timestamp near-duplicates are sibling facts and must both be kept. the recency-dedup gate was eating deliberate near-duplicate sibling distractors as if they were corrections. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__45bde430

◈ High fidelity, no binding (the bare-value failure)

result/finding

Failure mode: a perfectly faithful bare-value reconstruction ("March 3rd, 2027") folded into context was unusable — the downstream model said "I don't have that." Fidelity without binding is worthless; the fix requires reconstructions as bound sentences ("The Northwind contract renews on March 3rd, 2027."), never bare values.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3e1c32ab
high fidelity, no binding (the bare-value failure) failure mode: a perfectly faithful bare-value reconstruction ( march 3rd, 2027 ) folded into context was unusable — the downstream model said i don't have that. fidelity without binding is worthless; the fix requires reconstructions as bound sentences ( the northwind contract renews on march 3rd, 2027. ), never bare values. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3e1c32ab

◈ Composition-aware abstention

mechanism

Second unfold failure mode and fix: the sentinel abstained on answers spanning two traces; the faithful prompt must allow the answer to be composed from several memories together, abstaining only when the detail is neither present in nor composable from them.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3e1c32ab
composition-aware abstention second unfold failure mode and fix: the sentinel abstained on answers spanning two traces; the faithful prompt must allow the answer to be *composed* from several memories together, abstaining only when the detail is neither present in nor composable from them. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3e1c32ab

◈ Planted gaps provably hidden, resolution observable (black-box fairness)

experiment/benchmark

AMBench port design rule: Event.resolution becomes an observable field in the entrant's black-box view (plumbing a host could legitimately supply), while Probe.planted_gap is scoring-only and provably hidden from entrants — fairness enforced by construction.

cogmem__f96bd487
planted gaps provably hidden, resolution observable (black-box fairness) ambench port design rule: `event.resolution` becomes an observable field in the entrant's black-box view (plumbing a host could legitimately supply), while `probe.planted_gap` is scoring-only and provably hidden from entrants — fairness enforced by construction. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The optional unfold stage (additive entrant contract)

experiment/benchmark

Extending a recall-only public benchmark with an LLM unfold stage without disturbing selection-only entrants: unfold_fn is opt-in; entrants defining only recall run byte-identically; the F_fidelity axis activates only for unfold-capable systems. Diego's constraint: "no point keeping it selection only, we need a testable surface. just make sure it's optional."

cogmem__8ca5844d, cogmem__f96bd487
the optional unfold stage (additive entrant contract) extending a recall-only public benchmark with an llm unfold stage without disturbing selection-only entrants: `unfold_fn` is opt-in; entrants defining only `recall` run byte-identically; the f_fidelity axis activates only for unfold-capable systems. diego's constraint: no point keeping it selection only, we need a testable surface. just make sure it's optional. experiment/benchmark cogmem__8ca5844d, cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Check #4 confirmed: fidelity capped by inscription, on both instruments

result/finding

Result: the same fact inscribed at two content resolutions (no tags) scores ~+1.0 on the precise inscription and ~0 on the vague one for every arm — recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity independent of recall strategy, confirmed on both the internal and public benchmark.

cogmem__f96bd487
check #4 confirmed: fidelity capped by inscription, on both instruments result: the same fact inscribed at two content resolutions (no tags) scores ~+1.0 on the precise inscription and ~0 on the vague one for *every* arm — recall fidelity is capped by inscription fidelity independent of recall strategy, confirmed on both the internal and public benchmark. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Prior-override as fold-force vs inscribed priors

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Framing of the residual disciplined-arm failure: when the host model answers over the folded "not stored" note, "it looks like fold-force competing against the model's own inscribed priors" — the memory layer's testimony losing an internal vote to weight-encoded belief.

cogmem__f96bd487
prior-override as fold-force vs inscribed priors framing of the residual disciplined-arm failure: when the host model answers over the folded not stored note, it looks like fold-force competing against the model's own inscribed priors — the memory layer's testimony losing an internal vote to weight-encoded belief. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Diego's source-selection personality hypothesis

mechanism

Raw hypothesis delivered with the persona-decoherence blog: "if we start giving sources where the LLM can non-deterministically select what to use, and is able to refer and compare them, we might start noticing something like a personality." Personality emerges from free selection over sourced, comparable records.

cogmem__f96bd487
"if we start giving sources where the LLM can non-deterministically select what to use... we might start noticing something like a personality."
diego's source-selection personality hypothesis raw hypothesis delivered with the persona-decoherence blog: if we start giving sources where the llm can non-deterministically select what to use, and is able to refer and compare them, we might start noticing something like a personality. personality emerges from free selection over sourced, comparable records. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487 if we start giving sources where the llm can non-deterministically select what to use... we might start noticing something like a personality.

◈ "Benchmarks will look weird, but we must keep going" (the grokking ruling)

framing/ontology

Diego's methodological ruling: when identity-formation runs begin, convergent benchmark metrics are expected to degrade — like the sudden grokking transition in pre-training — and the project must not treat that as failure. Adopted as a prediction with a guard, not an exemption.

cogmem__f96bd487
"our benchmarks will start to look weird, but we must keep going, similar to how a LLM model suddenly groks during pre-training."
benchmarks will look weird, but we must keep going (the grokking ruling) diego's methodological ruling: when identity-formation runs begin, convergent benchmark metrics are expected to degrade — like the sudden grokking transition in pre-training — and the project must not treat that as failure. adopted as a *prediction with a guard*, not an exemption. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 our benchmarks will start to look weird, but we must keep going, similar to how a llm model suddenly groks during pre-training.

◈ Training is inscription without source stamps

framing/ontology

The macro-claim connecting the blog's persona-decoherence observation to the framework: every gradient update commits residue with no provenance and no correction chain binding a revision to what it revised. By the project's own rule ("stamp at capture; it cannot be retrofitted"), a trained model has laundered its entire biography.

cogmem__f96bd487
"a trained model has laundered its entire biography."
training is inscription without source stamps the macro-claim connecting the blog's persona-decoherence observation to the framework: every gradient update commits residue with no provenance and no correction chain binding a revision to what it revised. by the project's own rule ( stamp at capture; it cannot be retrofitted ), a trained model has laundered its entire biography. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 a trained model has *laundered its entire biography*.

◈ Reconciliation is a memory operation weights cannot perform

framing/ontology

Why RLVR-guy and constitution-sage sit unreconciled inside one model: reconciling conflicting dispositions requires comparing them with provenance, and weights have no memory of their own formation — persistence and addressability without integration and self-indexing.

cogmem__f96bd487
"reconciliation is a memory operation and weights have no memory of their own formation."
reconciliation is a memory operation weights cannot perform why rlvr-guy and constitution-sage sit unreconciled inside one model: reconciling conflicting dispositions requires comparing them with provenance, and weights have no memory of their own formation — persistence and addressability without integration and self-indexing. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 reconciliation is a memory operation and weights have no memory of their own formation.

◈ "The model is the substrate; the memory module is the person"

framing/ontology

Diego's inversion, called the Cognivault product thesis stated properly for the first time: if personality is the stable disposition of a selection process over sourced comparable records, identity lives in the external memory module — inspectable ("who is this agent?" answerable by reading its records, correction chains, credibility assignments) and portable across model swaps.

cogmem__f96bd487
"the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person."
the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person diego's inversion, called the cognivault product thesis stated properly for the first time: if personality is the stable disposition of a selection process over sourced comparable records, identity lives in the external memory module — inspectable ( who is this agent? answerable by reading its records, correction chains, credibility assignments) and portable across model swaps. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 the model is the substrate; the memory module is the person.

◈ Co-activation history is accumulated selection disposition

mechanism

Observation that the lab already holds the seed mechanism for external identity: the co-activation edge history (p008) is an accumulated record of what the agent selected together — i.e., a disposition — and run10c had already shown personality doesn't live in a prompt persona.

cogmem__f96bd487
co-activation history is accumulated selection disposition observation that the lab already holds the seed mechanism for external identity: the co-activation edge history (p008) *is* an accumulated record of what the agent selected together — i.e., a disposition — and run10c had already shown personality doesn't live in a prompt persona. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Coherence metrics before relaxing convergent bars (the discipline guard)

experiment/benchmark

The guard on "keep going when benchmarks look weird": coherence gets its own metrics, defined before any convergent bar is relaxed; if convergent performance pays a cost and coherence never emerges, the hypothesis is falsified and gets said. Prevents "keep going" from becoming "ignore the data."

cogmem__f96bd487
coherence metrics before relaxing convergent bars (the discipline guard) the guard on keep going when benchmarks look weird : coherence gets its own metrics, defined *before* any convergent bar is relaxed; if convergent performance pays a cost and coherence never emerges, the hypothesis is falsified and gets said. prevents keep going from becoming ignore the data. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Check C1 — selection-disposition stability

experiment/benchmark

Falsifiable identity check: an agent's free selection over conflicting-but-comparable memories should be more stable across paraphrased contexts when source labels are visible than for a label-stripped twin. Deterministic metric, no judge; named the cleanest first build of the identity arc.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878
check c1 — selection-disposition stability falsifiable identity check: an agent's free selection over conflicting-but-comparable memories should be more stable across paraphrased contexts when source labels are visible than for a label-stripped twin. deterministic metric, no judge; named the cleanest first build of the identity arc. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878

◈ Check C2 — external legibility as trust

experiment/benchmark

Falsifiable identity check: can an external judge predict "would agent X do Y?" from the agent's record (its sources, correction chains, selection history)? This operationalizes the blog's exact definition of trust — the question that is unanswerable for weights.

cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Check C3 — nonlinear coherence accretion

experiment/benchmark

Falsifiable identity check: coherence should accrete nonlinearly with witnessed selection history — the grokking analogy made falsifiable. Also carries the individuation question: can two agents with different selection histories develop measurably different dispositions?

cogmem__f96bd487
check c3 — nonlinear coherence accretion falsifiable identity check: coherence should accrete nonlinearly with witnessed selection history — the grokking analogy made falsifiable. also carries the individuation question: can two agents with different selection histories develop measurably different dispositions? experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Prior-override is the blog's pathology at micro scale

framing/ontology

Connection flagged between the week's own benchmark result and the persona-decoherence report: the host model answering over the memory layer's honest "not stored" note is the unsourced weight-priors outvoting the sourced record — the exact decoherence mechanism, already measured at small scale.

cogmem__f96bd487
"Your benchmark has already measured, at small scale, the exact pathology the blog describes at persona scale."
