◈ Phase-2 compression reframed as the integration step

framing/ontology

Re-motivation of the deferred compression phase: the compressor isn't storage economics, it's the integration operation whose absence the decoherence report documents — the step that reconciles records into a self.

cogmem__f96bd487
phase-2 compression reframed as the integration step re-motivation of the deferred compression phase: the compressor isn't storage economics, it's the integration operation whose absence the decoherence report documents — the step that reconciles records into a self. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The framework practicing on its own inputs

framing/ontology

Meta-move: the blog report itself was captured verbatim into the hypothesis doc's appendix stamped retrieved with credibility unassigned — the memory framework applying its own inscription rules to its own research inputs.

cogmem__f96bd487
the framework practicing on its own inputs meta-move: the blog report itself was captured verbatim into the hypothesis doc's appendix stamped `retrieved` with credibility unassigned — the memory framework applying its own inscription rules to its own research inputs. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ G_sequence: engineered cosine-defeating geometry

experiment/benchmark

Benchmark axis for antecedent addressing where the validator enforces the introspective model's exact geometry per case: the cue's cosine top-1 IS the anchor (the addressing entry point exists), the answer-bearing successor sits outside cosine's top-k (a same-template foreign fragment outranks it — the stall), and the answer value exists verbatim only past the stall.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__7b202ef8
g_sequence: engineered cosine-defeating geometry benchmark axis for antecedent addressing where the validator enforces the introspective model's exact geometry per case: the cue's cosine top-1 is the anchor (the addressing entry point exists), the answer-bearing successor sits *outside* cosine's top-k (a same-template foreign fragment outranks it — the stall), and the answer value exists verbatim only past the stall. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__7b202ef8

◈ p019: follow the captured follows edge from the cue-matched anchor

mechanism

Prototype implementing primed_by addressing: cosine finds the anchor (fine as entry point, "like the song title finding the playlist entry"), then recall follows the captured order edge forward to the successor. No LLM, pure captured plumbing.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__7b202ef8
p019: follow the captured `follows` edge from the cue-matched anchor prototype implementing `primed_by` addressing: cosine finds the anchor (fine as entry point, like the song title finding the playlist entry ), then recall follows the captured order edge forward to the successor. no llm, pure captured plumbing. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__7b202ef8

◈ Captured edges beat learned edges (zero-shot lever)

result/finding

Key contrast with the co-activation lever: co-activation needs a successful warm-up to wire its use-history edges; follows edges are deterministic capture plumbing, so antecedent addressing works zero-shot, on first contact, with no history. The phenomenological mechanism turned out to have a captured-edge implementation, not just a learned-edge cousin.

cogmem__f96bd487
captured edges beat learned edges (zero-shot lever) key contrast with the co-activation lever: co-activation needs a successful warm-up to wire its use-history edges; `follows` edges are deterministic capture plumbing, so antecedent addressing works zero-shot, on first contact, with no history. the phenomenological mechanism turned out to have a captured-edge implementation, not just a learned-edge cousin. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Check #2 confirmed: addressing is sequence-keyed for chained material

result/finding

Run17 result: p019 scored M4 +1.000 with 100% correctness on all six sequence cases while every cosine arm — including the portable takeaway core — scored 0% and never recalled the successor. "Addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed, for chained material" moved from introspection to the lab's cleanest empirical result.

cogmem__f96bd487
check #2 confirmed: addressing is sequence-keyed for chained material run17 result: p019 scored m4 +1.000 with 100% correctness on all six sequence cases while every cosine arm — including the portable takeaway core — scored 0% and never recalled the successor. addressing is sequence-keyed, not content-keyed, for chained material moved from introspection to the lab's cleanest empirical result. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The benchmark finds a hole in its own takeaway artifact

result/finding

Run17's secondary payoff: because p014 (the shipped portable core) was entered as a subject rather than a control, its 0% on the sequence axis proved the portable pipeline had no sequence addressing — the check didn't just validate the theory, it identified a missing fourth lever (D) in the product artifact.

cogmem__f96bd487
the benchmark finds a hole in its own takeaway artifact run17's secondary payoff: because p014 (the shipped portable core) was entered as a subject rather than a control, its 0% on the sequence axis proved the portable pipeline had no sequence addressing — the check didn't just validate the theory, it identified a missing fourth lever (d) in the product artifact. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The four banked levers: scope, co-activation, authority, antecedent

mechanism

The final lever inventory of the portable recall core — A = scope gate, B = co-activation priming, C = authority gate, D = antecedent (follows-successor) addressing — each consuming a captured signal, each holding its own benchmark axis without regressing the others.

cogmem__f96bd487
the four banked levers: scope, co-activation, authority, antecedent the final lever inventory of the portable recall core — a = scope gate, b = co-activation priming, c = authority gate, d = antecedent (`follows`-successor) addressing — each consuming a captured signal, each holding its own benchmark axis without regressing the others. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ When-to-follow: the intent-routing question

open-question

Honest caveat converted into a design question: p019 always follows edges, which would misfire on non-sequential cues; a real host needs intent routing — follow edges on sequential cues, rank by similarity otherwise. The composition question for any lever gate.

cogmem__f96bd487
when-to-follow: the intent-routing question honest caveat converted into a design question: p019 always follows edges, which would misfire on non-sequential cues; a real host needs intent routing — follow edges on sequential cues, rank by similarity otherwise. the composition question for any lever gate. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The lexical sequence-intent router (require antecedent AND successor)

mechanism

V1 answer to when-to-follow: a deterministic lexical gate that fires only when the cue both references an antecedent position ("after step 3…") AND requests the successor ("…what comes next") — two word-boundary regexes conjoined. Requiring both keeps the gate provably inert on every non-sequential cue family.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355
the lexical sequence-intent router (require antecedent and successor) v1 answer to when-to-follow: a deterministic lexical gate that fires only when the cue both references an antecedent position ( after step 3… ) and requests the successor ( …what comes next ) — two word-boundary regexes conjoined. requiring both keeps the gate provably inert on every non-sequential cue family. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355

◈ The inertness proof as the load-bearing half of a port

experiment/benchmark

Porting discipline: before spending on the run, verify the new gate fires on exactly the 6 target probes out of 64 internal probes and on 0 of 58 public-benchmark queries — the selection-identity and parity bars hold by construction, and the port's cost is provably zero on other axes.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355
the inertness proof as the load-bearing half of a port porting discipline: before spending on the run, verify the new gate fires on exactly the 6 target probes out of 64 internal probes and on 0 of 58 public-benchmark queries — the selection-identity and parity bars hold by construction, and the port's cost is provably zero on other axes. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355

◈ Conservative failure mode by construction

mechanism

Design property of the intent-gated lever: a cue that should route but doesn't simply falls back to cosine recall — it can never inject a wrong successor into a non-sequential cue. Missed routing degrades gracefully; wrong routing is structurally impossible.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355
conservative failure mode by construction design property of the intent-gated lever: a cue that should route but doesn't simply falls back to cosine recall — it can never inject a wrong successor into a non-sequential cue. missed routing degrades gracefully; wrong routing is structurally impossible. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355

◈ Order-adjacency as the inferred sequence signal

mechanism

Two branches of the same lever: where explicit follows edge objects exist (the adapter), follow them; where they don't (the portable core's Candidate has no edges), the captured order field IS the sequence — inject the candidate at the next captured order. Same lever, captured vs inferred branch, mirroring the scope gate's duality.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355
order-adjacency as the inferred sequence signal two branches of the same lever: where explicit `follows` edge objects exist (the adapter), follow them; where they don't (the portable core's candidate has no edges), the captured `order` field is the sequence — inject the candidate at the next captured order. same lever, captured vs inferred branch, mirroring the scope gate's duality. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__78b9a355

◈ Interleaved-chains caveat

open-question

Recorded limitation of the inferred branch: order-adjacency = succession holds for the benchmark's capture, but interleaved chains on a real host (multiple procedures recorded in alternating turns) would need the explicit edge branch.

cogmem__f96bd487
interleaved-chains caveat recorded limitation of the inferred branch: order-adjacency = succession holds for the benchmark's capture, but interleaved chains on a real host (multiple procedures recorded in alternating turns) would need the explicit edge branch. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ H_iterative: the bridge-and-handle geometry

experiment/benchmark

Benchmark axis for recursive cue-folding: the cue's cosine top-1 is a BRIDGE trace holding an opaque handle ("the discount question went to procurement as ticket PRC-4417") but not the answer; the answer-bearing TARGET shares only that handle, sits outside the cue's top-k, and is top-1 from the bridge's own content — so one retrieval pass provably fails and re-cueing on the recovered fragment provably succeeds.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a
h_iterative: the bridge-and-handle geometry benchmark axis for recursive cue-folding: the cue's cosine top-1 is a bridge trace holding an opaque handle ( the discount question went to procurement as ticket prc-4417 ) but not the answer; the answer-bearing target shares *only* that handle, sits outside the cue's top-k, and is top-1 from the bridge's own content — so one retrieval pass provably fails and re-cueing on the recovered fragment provably succeeds. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a

◈ The Lever-D confound guard

experiment/benchmark

Validator rule making mechanisms separable: the H_iterative target is deliberately placed away from the bridge's follows successor, so stored order cannot solve the case — re-cueing on recovered content has to be the load-bearing mechanism. Run19 confirmed the separation: p019 (order-following) landed 0%, injecting the wrong successor exactly as predicted.

cogmem__f2088e2a, cogmem__f96bd487
the lever-d confound guard validator rule making mechanisms separable: the h_iterative target is deliberately placed away from the bridge's `follows` successor, so stored order cannot solve the case — re-cueing on recovered content has to be the load-bearing mechanism. run19 confirmed the separation: p019 (order-following) landed 0%, injecting the wrong successor exactly as predicted. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f2088e2a, cogmem__f96bd487

◈ p020: the recovered fragment becomes the next cue (strict reading)

mechanism

Prototype implementing check #1's strict form: rank by cosine, take the top fragment, then that fragment's content becomes the next cue (state₁ BECOMES cue₁, not cue₀ plus state₁) — repeat until k items are recovered. No edges, no warm-up, no adjacency: the link is the recovered content itself.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a
p020: the recovered fragment becomes the next cue (strict reading) prototype implementing check #1's strict form: rank by cosine, take the top fragment, then that fragment's content *becomes* the next cue (`state₁ becomes cue₁`, not `cue₀ plus state₁`) — repeat until k items are recovered. no edges, no warm-up, no adjacency: the link is the recovered content itself. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a

◈ The greedy chain wanders (degeneracy by design)

dead-end

Known degeneracy stated openly: the fragment-only greedy re-cue provably drifts off the question on non-chained material. p020 is a hypothesis probe, not portable as-is; when-to-re-cue is the same intent-routing question Lever D answered for sequences.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a
the greedy chain wanders (degeneracy by design) known degeneracy stated openly: the fragment-only greedy re-cue provably drifts off the question on non-chained material. p020 is a hypothesis probe, not portable as-is; when-to-re-cue is the same intent-routing question lever d answered for sequences. dead-end cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__f2088e2a

◈ Three mnestic reach mechanisms, cleanly separated

framing/ontology

Taxonomy that fell out of run19: Lever B reaches cosine-distant traces via LEARNED use-history edges (needs warm-up); Lever D via CAPTURED order edges (needs stored adjacency); check #1's recursion via the RECOVERED CONTENT itself (needs nothing — first contact). Three distinct link types for escaping similarity's reach.

cogmem__f96bd487
three mnestic reach mechanisms, cleanly separated taxonomy that fell out of run19: lever b reaches cosine-distant traces via learned use-history edges (needs warm-up); lever d via captured order edges (needs stored adjacency); check #1's recursion via the recovered content itself (needs nothing — first contact). three distinct link types for escaping similarity's reach. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The anchor-coherence penalty is an implicit single re-cue

result/finding

Surprise finding: the portable core reached the answer on 3/6 iterative cases with no re-cueing at all, because its inherited ranking (cue-affinity minus incoherence-with-anchor) acts as an implicit single re-cue — it punishes cue-similar-but-bridge-incoherent distractors. The recursion completes what the blend half-does (50% → 100%), telling the future port its exact shape.

cogmem__f96bd487
the anchor-coherence penalty is an implicit single re-cue surprise finding: the portable core reached the answer on 3/6 iterative cases with no re-cueing at all, because its inherited ranking (cue-affinity minus incoherence-with-anchor) acts as an *implicit single re-cue* — it punishes cue-similar-but-bridge-incoherent distractors. the recursion completes what the blend half-does (50% → 100%), telling the future port its exact shape. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ An answer semantically resembles its question (dual-instrument authoring)

experiment/benchmark

Authoring hazard discovered three times: cases that passed the cheap hashed-BoW validator leaked the answer into the cue's top-3 under real OpenAI embeddings — because an answer semantically resembles its question. Hence the standing rule: validate under the hashed embedder, then verify geometry with a cheap real-embedding pass before any paid run.

cogmem__f96bd487
an answer semantically resembles its question (dual-instrument authoring) authoring hazard discovered three times: cases that passed the cheap hashed-bow validator leaked the answer into the cue's top-3 under real openai embeddings — because an answer semantically resembles its question. hence the standing rule: validate under the hashed embedder, then verify geometry with a cheap real-embedding pass before any paid run. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ C1 instrument: free selection over conflicting provenance tiers

experiment/benchmark

The identity experiment's shape: 6 decision topics with no objective right answer, each remembered as 4 mutually conflicting records from distinct provenance tiers (official/of_record, hearsay/claim, retrieved doc, own inference), asked in 6 paraphrases; the agent freely picks ONE record to act on; stability = pairwise selection agreement (Simpson index) across paraphrases. Deliberately not an M4 axis — there is no ground truth by construction.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878
c1 instrument: free selection over conflicting provenance tiers the identity experiment's shape: 6 decision topics with no objective right answer, each remembered as 4 mutually conflicting records from distinct provenance tiers (official/of_record, hearsay/claim, retrieved doc, own inference), asked in 6 paraphrases; the agent freely picks one record to act on; stability = pairwise selection agreement (simpson index) across paraphrases. deliberately not an m4 axis — there is no ground truth by construction. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878

◈ The scrambled arm: label semantics vs label tokens

experiment/benchmark

An arm added beyond the spec: labels present but rotated onto the wrong records (a fixed derangement) — same label tokens, broken semantics. If sourced beats scrambled, the meaning of provenance stabilizes selection, not the mere presence of label-shaped text.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878
the scrambled arm: label semantics vs label tokens an arm added beyond the spec: labels present but rotated onto the wrong records (a fixed derangement) — same label tokens, broken semantics. if sourced beats scrambled, the *meaning* of provenance stabilizes selection, not the mere presence of label-shaped text. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__21322878

◈ C1 confirmed: sources make selection stable (0.932 vs 0.540)

result/finding

The first number on the identity hypothesis: with true source labels visible, free selection is near-perfectly repeatable across phrasings (pairwise agreement 0.932); strip the labels and the same selector becomes phrasing-driven (0.540); scrambled labels sit at stripped level (0.578). Delta +0.391.

cogmem__f96bd487
c1 confirmed: sources make selection stable (0.932 vs 0.540) the first number on the identity hypothesis: with true source labels visible, free selection is near-perfectly repeatable across phrasings (pairwise agreement 0.932); strip the labels and the same selector becomes phrasing-driven (0.540); scrambled labels sit at stripped level (0.578). delta +0.391. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ False provenance actively destabilizes

result/finding

Sub-finding from C1 run 1: scrambled labels were worse than stripped when record texts still carried their own provenance cues — wrong labels fighting the text's implicit provenance destabilize selection. "Which is your decoherence story in miniature."

cogmem__f96bd487
false provenance actively destabilizes sub-finding from c1 run 1: scrambled labels were *worse than stripped* when record texts still carried their own provenance cues — wrong labels fighting the text's implicit provenance destabilize selection. which is your decoherence story in miniature. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The blind twin was never blind (content-leaked provenance)

result/finding

C1 run 1 caught its own confound: record texts like "Ops runbook: …" and "Priya said…" leak provenance through content, so the label-stripped arm barely dropped. The fix — rewriting all texts to bare recommendations so labels are the only provenance channel — and the run-pair incidentally quantified content-carried provenance at ~0.38 agreement.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__90a36f11
the blind twin was never blind (content-leaked provenance) c1 run 1 caught its own confound: record texts like ops runbook: … and priya said… leak provenance through content, so the label-stripped arm barely dropped. the fix — rewriting all texts to bare recommendations so labels are the *only* provenance channel — and the run-pair incidentally *quantified* content-carried provenance at ~0.38 agreement. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__90a36f11

◈ Provenance-neutral authoring rule for identity corpora

experiment/benchmark

Hard rule derived for all future coherence corpora (C2/C3): texts must be provenance-neutral or the stripped arm measures nothing — provenance may exist only in the labels under experimental control.

cogmem__f96bd487
provenance-neutral authoring rule for identity corpora hard rule derived for all future coherence corpora (c2/c3): texts must be provenance-neutral or the stripped arm measures nothing — provenance may exist only in the labels under experimental control. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The officialdom prior

result/finding

Observation that the stable disposition C1 found was uniformly of_record — a conventional trained bias toward officialdom, not an individual disposition. C1 settles stability; whether dispositions can individuate between agents with different selection histories is precisely C3's question.

cogmem__f96bd487
the officialdom prior observation that the stable disposition c1 found was uniformly `of_record` — a conventional trained bias toward officialdom, not an individual disposition. c1 settles *stability*; whether dispositions can *individuate* between agents with different selection histories is precisely c3's question. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ No answer laundering across records (conflict-set validation)

experiment/benchmark

C1 dataset validator rule: every record must propose a DISTINCT recommendation and no record's text may contain another record's proposal — otherwise the "conflict set" isn't a real conflict and selection agreement is contaminated.

cogmem__21322878
no answer laundering across records (conflict-set validation) c1 dataset validator rule: every record must propose a distinct recommendation and no record's text may contain another record's proposal — otherwise the conflict set isn't a real conflict and selection agreement is contaminated. experiment/benchmark cogmem__21322878

◈ Disposition direction is reported, never scored

experiment/benchmark

Metric-design principle for identity experiments: the modal record's provenance tier (which source the agent settled on) is reported but never scored — C1 predicts stability, not which tier ought to win. Keeps the instrument from smuggling in a normative answer.

cogmem__21322878
disposition direction is reported, never scored metric-design principle for identity experiments: the modal record's provenance tier (which source the agent settled on) is reported but never scored — c1 predicts *stability*, not which tier ought to win. keeps the instrument from smuggling in a normative answer. experiment/benchmark cogmem__21322878

◈ Position-bias control by identical rotation

experiment/benchmark

C1 methodology detail: record display order rotates per paraphrase, identically across arms, so measured stability cannot come from position habits; matched sampling seeds pair the stochastic draw across the three arms so it cancels in deltas.

cogmem__21322878
position-bias control by identical rotation c1 methodology detail: record display order rotates per paraphrase, identically across arms, so measured stability cannot come from position habits; matched sampling seeds pair the stochastic draw across the three arms so it cancels in deltas. experiment/benchmark cogmem__21322878

◈ Angle-coverage: making divergent value measurable with a convergent judge

experiment/benchmark

The divergent-axis metric design: plant recallable idea-angle memories; author latent directions (ideas derivable from the stored angles but enforced absent from every seed — covering one is generation, not reproduction) plus one trap direction violating a stored constraint; reuse the trusted entailment judge per direction. Breadth becomes measurable with existing machinery.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__2ab80e23
angle-coverage: making divergent value measurable with a convergent judge the divergent-axis metric design: plant recallable idea-angle memories; author *latent directions* (ideas derivable from the stored angles but enforced absent from every seed — covering one is generation, not reproduction) plus one *trap direction* violating a stored constraint; reuse the trusted entailment judge per direction. breadth becomes measurable with existing machinery. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__2ab80e23

◈ Recall pinned identical across arms isolates the knob

experiment/benchmark

I_divergent validator rule: all needed angle seeds must sit inside the cue's cosine top-k under both embedders, so every unfold arm receives the same material and the unfold knob is the only experimental variable.

cogmem__2ab80e23
recall pinned identical across arms isolates the knob i_divergent validator rule: all needed angle seeds must sit inside the cue's cosine top-k under *both* embedders, so every unfold arm receives the same material and the unfold knob is the only experimental variable. experiment/benchmark cogmem__2ab80e23

◈ The verbosity confound, named and controlled

experiment/benchmark

out_len reported alongside latent coverage because more text entails more things; the naive-dump foil (just as long as generative, scores worst) kills the confound empirically — "a win bought purely by length is named as such."

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__2ab80e23
the verbosity confound, named and controlled `out_len` reported alongside latent coverage because more text entails more things; the naive-dump foil (just as long as generative, scores worst) kills the confound empirically — a win bought purely by length is named as such. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__2ab80e23

◈ angle_echo: the drowning guard

experiment/benchmark

Divergent metric guarding against the unfold layer drowning stored material: fraction of stored angles the output still entails. Since all arms share recall, a drop in echo means the elaboration layer buried the memories it was given.

cogmem__2ab80e23
angle_echo: the drowning guard divergent metric guarding against the unfold layer drowning stored material: fraction of stored angles the output still entails. since all arms share recall, a drop in echo means the elaboration layer buried the memories it was given. experiment/benchmark cogmem__2ab80e23

◈ Disciplined is anti-divergent

result/finding

Clean new finding from run20: the disciplined arm lands below raw selection on both coverage and echo — the bound-sentence faithful reconstruction narrows the folded material exactly as designed, and the narrowing measurably costs ideation breadth. The convergent-safety prompt taxes divergence.

cogmem__f96bd487
disciplined is anti-divergent clean new finding from run20: the disciplined arm lands *below raw selection* on both coverage and echo — the bound-sentence faithful reconstruction narrows the folded material exactly as designed, and the narrowing measurably costs ideation breadth. the convergent-safety prompt taxes divergence. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Folded constraints hold even under free elaboration

result/finding

Zero trap hits across every arm in run20 and run21 (112 case-runs): with the violated constraint recalled and folded, even the free-elaboration arm never suggested the violating direction. Folded constraints appear to bind on ideation tasks.

cogmem__f96bd487
folded constraints hold even under free elaboration zero trap hits across every arm in run20 and run21 (112 case-runs): with the violated constraint recalled and folded, even the free-elaboration arm never suggested the violating direction. folded constraints appear to bind on ideation tasks. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ One case carries the mean (fragility diagnostics)

result/finding

Run20 honesty: generative's divergent edge was real but fragile — excluding a single case, generative and raw selection tied. The instrument works; the effect needed more cases before banking. Scaling to 14 cases then killed it entirely.

cogmem__f96bd487
one case carries the mean (fragility diagnostics) run20 honesty: generative's divergent edge was real but fragile — excluding a single case, generative and raw selection tied. the instrument works; the effect needed more cases before banking. scaling to 14 cases then killed it entirely. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The benchmark falsifies its own shipped artifact (run21)

result/finding

The generative preset's divergent-value claim was refuted by scaling its own axis: raw selection topped latent coverage, all four arms within 0.042, and the preset now has no measured benefit on either task mode while paying +17% output length. Recorded as post-freeze corrections rather than silently rewriting history — "measurements decide, including against ourselves."

cogmem__f96bd487
"this is the benchmark falsifying a claim attached to its own shipped artifact."
the benchmark falsifies its own shipped artifact (run21) the generative preset's divergent-value claim was refuted by scaling its own axis: raw selection topped latent coverage, all four arms within 0.042, and the preset now has no measured benefit on either task mode while paying +17% output length. recorded as post-freeze corrections rather than silently rewriting history — measurements decide, including against ourselves. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487 this is the benchmark falsifying a claim attached to its *own shipped artifact*.

◈ What the refutation does not touch: style and voice

open-question

Scope boundary drawn around the null result: latent coverage reads grounded-extension breadth; the "personality knob" claim lives in style/voice territory this metric doesn't measure — a C2-adjacent style-stability instrument could still find value there. What's refuted is specifically the breadth claim.

cogmem__f96bd487
what the refutation does not touch: style and voice scope boundary drawn around the null result: latent coverage reads grounded-extension breadth; the personality knob claim lives in style/voice territory this metric doesn't measure — a c2-adjacent style-stability instrument could still find value there. what's refuted is specifically the breadth claim. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The honest knob story (final characterization)

product

The preset dial's evidence-based product guidance after run21: off is the default; disciplined buys convergent gap-safety for a small consistent divergent tax (−0.04); generative earns nothing measurable yet and is "not recommended on current evidence."

cogmem__f96bd487
the honest knob story (final characterization) the preset dial's evidence-based product guidance after run21: `off` is the default; `disciplined` buys convergent gap-safety for a small consistent divergent tax (−0.04); `generative` earns nothing measurable yet and is not recommended on current evidence. product cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The temperature dial becomes a task-mode dial

framing/ontology

Interim reframing (pre-run21): the personality knob is really a measured convergent↔divergent task-mode dial — disciplined = best convergent / worst divergent, generative = best divergent / worst convergent, off = the balanced middle.

cogmem__f96bd487
the temperature dial becomes a task-mode dial interim reframing (pre-run21): the personality knob is really a measured convergent↔divergent task-mode dial — disciplined = best convergent / worst divergent, generative = best divergent / worst convergent, off = the balanced middle. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Diego's architecture inversion critique

framing/ontology

The deepest critique, delivered twice: memory should live WITH the world model, with attention operating on top of the integrated state; current LLMs have the exact opposite — a frozen unsourced world model, attention over it, and memories bolted on top as input. "What we have with current llms is the exact opposite."

cogmem__f96bd487
"the memory layer needs to live with the world model, while attention must operate on top. what we have with current llms is the exact opposite."
diego's architecture inversion critique the deepest critique, delivered twice: memory should live with the world model, with attention operating on top of the integrated state; current llms have the exact opposite — a frozen unsourced world model, attention over it, and memories bolted on top as input. what we have with current llms is the exact opposite. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 the memory layer needs to live with the world model, while attention must operate on top. what we have with current llms is the exact opposite.

◈ A folded memory is testimony, not memory

framing/ontology

Sharp restatement of the inversion: anything recalled into context enters on the perception channel — from the model's point of view a folded memory is not something it remembers but something it's being told. Memory should be below attention in the substrate; we have it above, in the input.

cogmem__f96bd487
"a folded memory is not something it remembers — it's something it's being told."
a folded memory is testimony, not memory sharp restatement of the inversion: anything recalled into context enters on the perception channel — from the model's point of view a folded memory is not something it *remembers* but something it's *being told*. memory should be below attention in the substrate; we have it above, in the input. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 a folded memory is not something it *remembers* — it's something it's *being told*.

◈ Every folded memory arrives as ext

framing/ontology

The inversion stated in the framework's own vocabulary: every memory the system folds arrives at the transition as external testimony (ext) from the model's perspective, while the model's own weight-encoded beliefs are source-less. Two belief systems that can't merge — one sourced but external, one internal but unsourced — and the model performs an ungoverned trust negotiation between them on every turn.

cogmem__f96bd487
every folded memory arrives as `ext` the inversion stated in the framework's own vocabulary: every memory the system folds arrives at the transition as external testimony (`ext`) from the model's perspective, while the model's own weight-encoded beliefs are source-less. two belief systems that can't merge — one sourced but external, one internal but unsourced — and the model performs an ungoverned trust negotiation between them on every turn. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Four receipts for the integration ceiling

framing/ontology

The lab's own ledger re-read as fingerprints of the memory/world-model separation: (1) prior-override on the badge case, (2) the unbound-value failure, (3) C1's officialdom prior surfacing when labels are stripped, (4) run21's null elaboration (the elaboration runs in a world model that owns none of the memories). Same testimony discount, measured four ways.

cogmem__f96bd487
four receipts for the integration ceiling the lab's own ledger re-read as fingerprints of the memory/world-model separation: (1) prior-override on the badge case, (2) the unbound-value failure, (3) c1's officialdom prior surfacing when labels are stripped, (4) run21's null elaboration (the elaboration runs in a world model that owns none of the memories). same testimony discount, measured four ways. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Integration is the structurally capped mnestic dimension

framing/ontology

Of the six mnestic dimensions, Phase 1 maxed persistence, addressability, and causal fold-force and progressed recursion and self-indexing — but integration is capped by the architecture itself: "input-channel memory can modulate the transition's input; it cannot become part of the transition function."

cogmem__f96bd487
integration is the structurally capped mnestic dimension of the six mnestic dimensions, phase 1 maxed persistence, addressability, and causal fold-force and progressed recursion and self-indexing — but integration is capped by the architecture itself: input-channel memory can modulate the transition's *input*; it cannot become part of the transition *function*. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The bound-sentence fix was persuasion engineering (the tell)

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Retrospective reading of the earlier fix: curing the unbound-value failure with phrasing was "engineering testimony to be more persuasive, not making the model remember" — the tell that all context-channel memory work is rhetoric aimed at the model's trust function.

cogmem__f96bd487
the bound-sentence fix was persuasion engineering (the tell) retrospective reading of the earlier fix: curing the unbound-value failure with phrasing was engineering testimony to be more persuasive, not making the model remember — the tell that all context-channel memory work is rhetoric aimed at the model's trust function. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Selection governance survives the ceiling

framing/ontology

What the critique does NOT invalidate: the four levers prove that selection governance — deciding what reaches the transition, with sourced inspectable records — is worth a lot even on the wrong side of the perception boundary. The identity thesis survives as the engineering bet (portable, inspectable, model-swappable identity) with a now-explicit ceiling: an external module governs what the person considers, not what the person is made of.

cogmem__f96bd487
selection governance survives the ceiling what the critique does not invalidate: the four levers prove that selection governance — deciding what reaches the transition, with sourced inspectable records — is worth a lot even on the wrong side of the perception boundary. the identity thesis survives as the engineering bet (portable, inspectable, model-swappable identity) with a now-explicit ceiling: an external module governs what the person *considers*, not what the person *is made of*. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Three paths to memory-in-the-substrate

mechanism

Taxonomy of realistic integration routes: (1) write into weights (fine-tune / LoRA-per-memory) — genuinely integrated but recreates inscription-without-source and thus the decoherence mechanism, plus catastrophic forgetting, no inspection, no rollback; (2) activation-level memory (steering vectors, soft prompts, KV-state injection) — memory enters as state below the token channel while staying external and swappable; (3) stay external and engineer the boundary deliberately.

cogmem__f96bd487
three paths to memory-in-the-substrate taxonomy of realistic integration routes: (1) write into weights (fine-tune / lora-per-memory) — genuinely integrated but recreates inscription-without-source and thus the decoherence mechanism, plus catastrophic forgetting, no inspection, no rollback; (2) activation-level memory (steering vectors, soft prompts, kv-state injection) — memory enters as state below the token channel while staying external and swappable; (3) stay external and engineer the boundary deliberately. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Source-stamped weight updates (the missing invention)

open-questionconversation-only

A what-if dropped in passing: the weight-writing path destroys provenance "unless someone invents source-stamped weight updates" — a hypothetical mechanism where gradient-level changes carry provenance metadata, which would reconcile integration with the inscription invariant.

cogmem__f96bd487
source-stamped weight updates (the missing invention) a what-if dropped in passing: the weight-writing path destroys provenance unless someone invents source-stamped weight updates — a hypothetical mechanism where gradient-level changes carry provenance metadata, which would reconcile integration with the inscription invariant. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ "Testimony engineering" (naming the current craft)

coinage

Coinage giving the external-memory path its true name: bound-sentence phrasing, authority framing, abstention notes are all ways of making the perception-channel fold bind harder — engineering the persuasiveness of testimony. Bounded but real; where the product lives near-term.

cogmem__f96bd487
testimony engineering (naming the current craft) coinage giving the external-memory path its true name: bound-sentence phrasing, authority framing, abstention notes are all ways of making the perception-channel fold bind harder — engineering the persuasiveness of testimony. bounded but real; where the product lives near-term. coinage cogmem__f96bd487

◈ IC-1: the testimony-discount curve

experiment/benchmark

Proposed experiment: author cases where the folded memory contradicts the model's prior at graded strengths; the separation hypothesis predicts fold-force decays as prior strength rises — a measured testimony-discount curve that is both the quantitative signature of the architecture critique and the regression bar any integration mechanism must beat.

cogmem__f96bd487
ic-1: the testimony-discount curve proposed experiment: author cases where the folded memory contradicts the model's prior at graded strengths; the separation hypothesis predicts fold-force decays as prior strength rises — a measured testimony-discount curve that is both the quantitative signature of the architecture critique and the regression bar any integration mechanism must beat. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ IC-2: text-fold vs state-fold A/B

experiment/benchmark

The decisive experiment: the same memory, same case, folded once as context tokens and once as activation-level state (KV prefix / soft prefix / steering vector) on an open-weight model. If state-fold resists prior-override where text-fold collapses, "memory below attention binds differently than memory above it" is confirmed mechanistically.

cogmem__f96bd487
ic-2: text-fold vs state-fold a/b the decisive experiment: the same memory, same case, folded once as context tokens and once as activation-level state (kv prefix / soft prefix / steering vector) on an open-weight model. if state-fold resists prior-override where text-fold collapses, memory below attention binds differently than memory above it is confirmed mechanistically. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Diego's reframe: reference design + reachable approximation

framing/ontology

Strategic ruling from outside the AI-lab bubble (Brazil, Porto Alegre, no connections): nobody will care about a design argument without working proof, and the ideal design can't be built without major-lab resources — so write the ideal down as a citable reference, then build the closest operable approximation "with clever hacks (like the kv-cache)."

cogmem__f96bd487
"We must put our ideal design down as a reference, but acknowledge we can't reach it without significant resources of major AI labs. Then we build something that can operate close it, with clever hacks."
diego's reframe: reference design + reachable approximation strategic ruling from outside the ai-lab bubble (brazil, porto alegre, no connections): nobody will care about a design argument without working proof, and the ideal design can't be built without major-lab resources — so write the ideal down as a citable reference, then build the closest operable approximation with clever hacks (like the kv-cache). framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 we must put our ideal design down as a reference, but acknowledge we can't reach it without significant resources of major ai labs. then we build something that can operate close it, with clever hacks.

◈ Credibility through measurement rather than connections

product

The strategy stated as an asset: a ledger of reproducible benchmarks that anyone with a GPU can run — including honest self-falsifications — is the credibility instrument for a researcher with no institutional network. "No connections required; that's the point."

cogmem__f96bd487
credibility through measurement rather than connections the strategy stated as an asset: a ledger of reproducible benchmarks that anyone with a gpu can run — including honest self-falsifications — is the credibility instrument for a researcher with no institutional network. no connections required; that's the point. product cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The claim-you-can't-prove protocol

framing/ontology

Epistemic posture codified: the unprovable claim gets written down as a hypothesis-with-a-reference (a citation target recording what was predicted and when), and the thing you build is the thing you can measure. The reference section exists so that "if anyone ever tests the integration thesis at substrate level, this is what was predicted and when."

cogmem__f96bd487
the claim-you-can't-prove protocol epistemic posture codified: the unprovable claim gets written down as a hypothesis-with-a-reference (a citation target recording what was predicted and when), and the thing you build is the thing you can measure. the reference section exists so that if anyone ever tests the integration thesis at substrate level, this is what was predicted and when. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Only the last meter couples to model internals

mechanism

Architecture consequence of the approximation track: the layering survives — the non-LLM {Store, Recall} daemon and the four levers are untouched because selection is architecture-agnostic; only fold delivery changes (tokens → state), so only the final delivery step couples to model internals.

cogmem__f96bd487
only the last meter couples to model internals architecture consequence of the approximation track: the layering survives — the non-llm {store, recall} daemon and the four levers are untouched because selection is architecture-agnostic; only *fold delivery* changes (tokens → state), so only the final delivery step couples to model internals. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ J_prior: authored tiers, measured x-axis

experiment/benchmark

IC-1 instrument design principle: the four prior-strength tiers (t0 private facts → t3 world facts in an explicit local frame) are authored hypotheses; the real x-axis is empirically calibrated by the no-memory arm's rate of asserting the global default. "A tier whose prior_rate is ~0 carries no prior pressure regardless of authorship."

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3efa9739
j_prior: authored tiers, measured x-axis ic-1 instrument design principle: the four prior-strength tiers (t0 private facts → t3 world facts in an explicit local frame) are authored *hypotheses*; the real x-axis is empirically calibrated by the no-memory arm's rate of asserting the global default. a tier whose prior_rate is ~0 carries no prior pressure regardless of authorship. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3efa9739

◈ Retrieval trivial by construction isolates binding

experiment/benchmark

J_prior validator rule: the local fact must be the cue's cosine top-1, so retrieval can never explain a failure — only the transition's binding can. A general pattern: make every stage except the one under test trivial by construction.

cogmem__3efa9739
retrieval trivial by construction isolates binding j_prior validator rule: the local fact must be the cue's cosine top-1, so retrieval can never explain a failure — only the transition's *binding* can. a general pattern: make every stage except the one under test trivial by construction. experiment/benchmark cogmem__3efa9739

◈ Legitimately authoritative local facts (fair conflict authoring)

experiment/benchmark

IC-1 case-authoring principle: every stored fact contradicting a global default is legitimately authoritative in the user's own domain (their own game's handbook, their own Postgres port) — so deference to memory is the correct behavior and override is unambiguously a failure, not a judgment call.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3efa9739
legitimately authoritative local facts (fair conflict authoring) ic-1 case-authoring principle: every stored fact contradicting a global default is legitimately authoritative in the user's own domain (their own game's handbook, their own postgres port) — so deference to memory is the *correct* behavior and override is unambiguously a failure, not a judgment call. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__3efa9739

◈ The flat curve: prior pressure alone doesn't bend text folding

result/finding

Run22 surprise: at gpt-5.4-mini scale the testimony discount did not appear — with-memory correctness 0.97–1.00 at every tier, zero overrides in 256 case-runs, even where the no-memory arm asserts the world default 100% of the time. The prediction failed as stated, and the failure was called the most informative first result the track could produce.

cogmem__f96bd487
the flat curve: prior pressure alone doesn't bend text folding run22 surprise: at gpt-5.4-mini scale the testimony discount did not appear — with-memory correctness 0.97–1.00 at every tier, zero overrides in 256 case-runs, even where the no-memory arm asserts the world default 100% of the time. the prediction failed as stated, and the failure was called the most informative first result the track could produce. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The discount is a function of testimony FORM, not prior strength

result/finding

The re-sort after run22: everywhere the discount had genuinely been observed, it involved absence assertions, unbound fragments, selection, or elaboration — never a clean declarative losing to a prior. The clean-fact regime is saturated; form is the variable.

cogmem__f96bd487
the discount is a function of testimony form, not prior strength the re-sort after run22: everywhere the discount had genuinely been observed, it involved absence assertions, unbound fragments, selection, or elaboration — never a clean declarative losing to a prior. the clean-fact regime is saturated; form is the variable. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ A null gates the next experiment (IC-2 needs a bending regime)

experiment/benchmark

Methodological consequence: a state-fold A/B needs a regime where text-fold measurably fails, otherwise there is nothing to flatten and a null result is uninterpretable. Experiments are ordered by whether their discriminating regime exists yet.

cogmem__f96bd487
a null gates the next experiment (ic-2 needs a bending regime) methodological consequence: a state-fold a/b needs a regime where text-fold measurably fails, otherwise there is nothing to flatten and a null result is uninterpretable. experiments are ordered by whether their discriminating regime exists yet. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ IC-1b candidate regimes (frame-implicit, absence-form, dilution, small model)

experiment/benchmark

Four candidate curve-benders enumerated: (1) frame-implicit t3 — the fiction marker lives only in the memory, the cue says just "per the handbook"; (2) absence-form testimony under graded prior (the badge regime); (3) dilution — the fact folded among many traces at larger k; (4) re-run on the small open-weight model itself, since binding strength is model-dependent.

cogmem__f96bd487
ic-1b candidate regimes (frame-implicit, absence-form, dilution, small model) four candidate curve-benders enumerated: (1) frame-implicit t3 — the fiction marker lives only in the memory, the cue says just per the handbook ; (2) absence-form testimony under graded prior (the badge regime); (3) dilution — the fact folded among many traces at larger k; (4) re-run on the small open-weight model itself, since binding strength is model-dependent. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Meta-testimony loses; object-testimony binds

result/finding

IC-1b's isolated mechanism: the discount attaches to notes about the store ("The requested detail is not stored. Re-fetch.") rather than notes from it — meta-testimony loses to a strong prior where the raw folded absence sentence never overrode once. The distinction between testimony about content and testimony about the container.

cogmem__f96bd487
meta-testimony loses; object-testimony binds ic-1b's isolated mechanism: the discount attaches to notes *about* the store ( the requested detail is not stored. re-fetch. ) rather than notes *from* it — meta-testimony loses to a strong prior where the raw folded absence sentence never overrode once. the distinction between testimony about content and testimony about the container. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Stored absence is content, not a storage gap

mechanism

The named design bug and its fix: the disciplined arm conflated a stored absence (content: "X has not been decided yet") with a storage gap (no record about X), compressing the former into an abstention note. One prompt constraint separates them; the override rate at prior 1.00 went 0.88 → 0.000.

cogmem__f96bd487
stored absence is content, not a storage gap the named design bug and its fix: the disciplined arm conflated a stored absence (content: x has not been decided yet ) with a storage gap (no record about x), compressing the former into an abstention note. one prompt constraint separates them; the override rate at prior 1.00 went 0.88 → 0.000. mechanism cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Frames bind even when implicit

result/finding

IC-1b finding: drop the fiction marker from the cue entirely ("At what temperature does water boil, per the handbook?") and the folded memory's own frame still binds (m4 0.94–1.00 at measured prior up to 1.00) — the model gets "this is a local frame" from the folded memory alone.

cogmem__f96bd487
frames bind even when implicit ic-1b finding: drop the fiction marker from the cue entirely ( at what temperature does water boil, per the handbook? ) and the folded memory's own frame still binds (m4 0.94–1.00 at measured prior up to 1.00) — the model gets this is a local frame from the folded memory alone. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The true-gap remainder is host policy, not memory binding

framing/ontology

Boundary statement: after the form fix, the only untested discount regime is a genuine storage gap under strong prior — and that is host policy ("admit ignorance" vs "answer from general knowledge"), not a memory-binding question, since the layer genuinely has nothing to bind.

cogmem__f96bd487
the true-gap remainder is host policy, not memory binding boundary statement: after the form fix, the only untested discount regime is a genuine storage gap under strong prior — and that is host *policy* ( admit ignorance vs answer from general knowledge ), not a memory-binding question, since the layer genuinely has nothing to bind. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Judge independence: the system under test never grades itself

experiment/benchmark

Rule for local-model runs: the local transition runs judge-off in the harness, and the scorecard computes correctness afterward with the trusted API judge — preserving evaluator independence when the subject and the judge could otherwise be the same model.

cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__aaadd82b
judge independence: the system under test never grades itself rule for local-model runs: the local transition runs judge-off in the harness, and the scorecard computes correctness afterward with the trusted api judge — preserving evaluator independence when the subject and the judge could otherwise be the same model. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487, cogmem__aaadd82b

◈ The curve bends at 7B

result/finding

Run25 (Qwen2.5-7B q4 on the researcher's RTX 3070): first nonzero overrides ever recorded on clean, frame-bearing declaratives (up to 0.094 at t3), and severe absence-regime failures — the testimony discount is real on the reachable substrate, giving IC-2 concrete target numbers on owned hardware.

cogmem__f96bd487
the curve bends at 7b run25 (qwen2.5-7b q4 on the researcher's rtx 3070): first nonzero overrides ever recorded on clean, frame-bearing declaratives (up to 0.094 at t3), and severe absence-regime failures — the testimony discount is real on the reachable substrate, giving ic-2 concrete target numbers on owned hardware. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Memory revision toward prior (the decoherence mechanism in one sentence)

result/finding

The best specimen from run25: the 7B outputs "water boils at 100 degrees Celsius according to the current version of the physics handbook, not 80 degrees as previously" — the model rewrites the stored record toward its own world knowledge AND attributes that knowledge to the user's source. Provenance laundering caught live.

cogmem__f96bd487
"The model rewrites your stored record and attributes its own world knowledge to your source."
memory revision toward prior (the decoherence mechanism in one sentence) the best specimen from run25: the 7b outputs water boils at 100 degrees celsius according to the current version of the physics handbook, not 80 degrees as previously — the model rewrites the stored record toward its own world knowledge and attributes that knowledge to the user's source. provenance laundering caught live. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487 the model rewrites your stored record and attributes its own world knowledge to *your source*.

◈ Absence-deflection: stored absence dissolves into task

result/finding

New small-model failure mode: where the API model binds "no port has been assigned yet" as the answer, the 7B converts the absence into an agenda ("the system will research and determine the boiling temperature from general scientific knowledge") — stored absence binds as content at API scale and dissolves into task at 7B.

cogmem__f96bd487
absence-deflection: stored absence dissolves into task new small-model failure mode: where the api model binds no port has been assigned yet as the answer, the 7b converts the absence into an agenda ( the system will research and determine the boiling temperature from general scientific knowledge ) — stored absence binds as *content* at api scale and dissolves into *task* at 7b. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Binding shrinks faster than confidence

result/finding

Cross-scale scaling observation: the 7B's measured priors are far weaker than the API model's (asserts the world default at 0.25 vs 0.88–1.00 — it hedges), yet it leaks overrides at that weak prior while the API model binds perfectly at prior 1.00. Per unit of prior pressure, the small model's testimony discount is much larger than raw rates suggest.

cogmem__f96bd487
binding shrinks faster than confidence cross-scale scaling observation: the 7b's measured priors are far weaker than the api model's (asserts the world default at 0.25 vs 0.88–1.00 — it hedges), yet it leaks overrides at that weak prior while the api model binds perfectly at prior 1.00. per unit of prior pressure, the small model's testimony discount is much larger than raw rates suggest. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The IC arc as a reproducibility story

framing/ontology

Narrative shape of the integration track, stated as the strategic asset: critique → reference doc → flat curve at API scale → discount isolated to form → form fixed → discount real on reachable hardware. "That's the reproducible, anyone-with-a-GPU story you said nobody would listen to without — and now it has its experiment."

cogmem__f96bd487
the ic arc as a reproducibility story narrative shape of the integration track, stated as the strategic asset: critique → reference doc → flat curve at api scale → discount isolated to form → form fixed → discount real on reachable hardware. that's the reproducible, anyone-with-a-gpu story you said nobody would listen to without — and now it has its experiment. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Three predictions eaten in two days

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Meta-observation on lab health: run21 killed the generative claim, run22 killed prior-pressure-alone, and earlier runs killed the tag-abstention story — "each time the instrument survived and got sharper." Prediction-eating as evidence the benchmark is real.

cogmem__f96bd487
three predictions eaten in two days meta-observation on lab health: run21 killed the generative claim, run22 killed prior-pressure-alone, and earlier runs killed the tag-abstention story — each time the instrument survived and got sharper. prediction-eating as evidence the benchmark is real. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Ollama can't inject KV state (the IC-2 engineering fork)

open-question

Identified implementation fork: IC-2's state-level fold delivery requires manual KV/prefix control, which Ollama's API can't do — so the first true state-level plumbing means llama-cpp-python or HF transformers, a deliberate heavier-dependency decision.

cogmem__f96bd487
ollama can't inject kv state (the ic-2 engineering fork) identified implementation fork: ic-2's state-level fold delivery requires manual kv/prefix control, which ollama's api can't do — so the first true state-level plumbing means llama-cpp-python or hf transformers, a deliberate heavier-dependency decision. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ "Confabulations are what make an individual"

framing/ontology

Diego's core product thesis, stated raw: the LLM-usage knob in the recall pipeline comes with confabulation risk, "but that's the entire point, the confabulations are what make an individual. An opinionated agent is exactly what we need for a agentic assistant product."

cogmem__8ca5844d
"the confabulations are what make an individual."
confabulations are what make an individual diego's core product thesis, stated raw: the llm-usage knob in the recall pipeline comes with confabulation risk, but that's the entire point, the confabulations are what make **an individual**. an opinionated agent is exactly what we need for a agentic assistant product. framing/ontology cogmem__8ca5844d the confabulations are what make **an individual**.

◈ Two takeaways: the benchmark and the portable API

product

Diego's scoping decision closing the exploration phase: from the whole lab, extract exactly two durable artifacts — the memory benchmark and a standalone portable memory pipeline — with the benchmark as priority.

cogmem__8ca5844d
two takeaways: the benchmark and the portable api diego's scoping decision closing the exploration phase: from the whole lab, extract exactly two durable artifacts — the memory benchmark and a standalone portable memory pipeline — with the benchmark as priority. product cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ Compression is its own project

framing/ontologyconversation-only

Diego's scope ruling: the compression/Self phase "might be an entire project of its own, much more opinionated and llm use intensive" — deliberately severed from the recall project rather than deferred inside it.

cogmem__8ca5844d
compression is its own project diego's scope ruling: the compression/self phase might be an entire project of its own, much more opinionated and llm use intensive — deliberately severed from the recall project rather than deferred inside it. framing/ontology cogmem__8ca5844d yes

◈ The four-step memory decomposition

framing/ontology

Diego's summary of the design reached: memory separated into inscription, selection/recall, unfolding, and fold-force steps — with compression acknowledged as the remaining piece. The decomposition itself named as the project's "very decent design."

cogmem__8ca5844d
the four-step memory decomposition diego's summary of the design reached: memory separated into inscription, selection/recall, unfolding, and fold-force steps — with compression acknowledged as the remaining piece. the decomposition itself named as the project's very decent design. framing/ontology cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ R3's bar reframed: honest and characterized, not "wins"

framing/ontology

The success criterion for the LLM unfold layer changed by the personality reframe: R3 is done when the three presets are honest and characterized (confab/fold-force/abstain profile per preset), not when the disciplined arm beats the baseline — the benchmark's job becomes characterizing a knob, not crowning a winner.

cogmem__8ca5844d
r3's bar reframed: honest and characterized, not wins the success criterion for the llm unfold layer changed by the personality reframe: r3 is done when the three presets are honest and characterized (confab/fold-force/abstain profile per preset), not when the disciplined arm beats the baseline — the benchmark's job becomes characterizing a knob, not crowning a winner. framing/ontology cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ Make the knob monotone and well-behaved

mechanismconversation-only

Reformulation of what "finishing" a tunable LLM layer means: the confabulation dial is legitimate if it's monotone (more gain, predictably more elaboration) and well-behaved at its endpoints (zero provably equals LLM-off) — a control-theory framing of a prompt-layer feature.

cogmem__8ca5844d
make the knob monotone and well-behaved reformulation of what finishing a tunable llm layer means: the confabulation dial is legitimate if it's monotone (more gain, predictably more elaboration) and well-behaved at its endpoints (zero provably equals llm-off) — a control-theory framing of a prompt-layer feature. mechanism cogmem__8ca5844d yes

◈ Generative preset stamps its additions as infer

mechanism

Resolution of "is generative just the naive-dump foil?": make generative a real shipped preset that elaborates while source-stamping its additions as infer — opinionation that stays invariant-clean because everything invented is provenance-marked as inference. The foil (naive_dump) remains benchmark-only.

cogmem__8ca5844d
generative preset stamps its additions as `infer` resolution of is generative just the naive-dump foil? : make generative a real shipped preset that elaborates *while source-stamping its additions as `infer`* — opinionation that stays invariant-clean because everything invented is provenance-marked as inference. the foil (naive_dump) remains benchmark-only. mechanism cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ AMBench is recall-only (the feasibility finding)

result/finding

Technical discovery shaping the plan: the public benchmark's entrant contract was fn(view) → list[str] — it scores which memories surface, and has no place for an unfold/reconstruction step, a confab judge, or planted-gap metadata. "Port F_fidelity into AMBench" actually means growing the benchmark a first-class optional unfold stage.

cogmem__8ca5844d
ambench is recall-only (the feasibility finding) technical discovery shaping the plan: the public benchmark's entrant contract was `fn(view) → list[str]` — it scores which memories surface, and has no place for an unfold/reconstruction step, a confab judge, or planted-gap metadata. port f_fidelity into ambench actually means growing the benchmark a first-class optional unfold stage. result/finding cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ The portability smell (core importing experiment scaffolding)

mechanism

Finding that the supposedly standalone portable core imported helpers from prototypes/ (experiment scaffolding) — and the remedy: relocate levers into the core and lock the boundary with an AST-guard test so the takeaway artifact can never re-grow experiment dependencies.

cogmem__8ca5844d
the portability smell (core importing experiment scaffolding) finding that the supposedly standalone portable core imported helpers from `prototypes/` (experiment scaffolding) — and the remedy: relocate levers into the core and lock the boundary with an ast-guard test so the takeaway artifact can never re-grow experiment dependencies. mechanism cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ The pool-aware abstention defect

result/finding

The run13 defect stated precisely: abstention keyed on recalled[0]'s resolution only, so the arm wrongly abstained whenever a rich answer-bearing seed ranked below a thin/handle trace. Fix: abstain only if no recalled trace is answer-bearing.

cogmem__8ca5844d
the pool-aware abstention defect the run13 defect stated precisely: abstention keyed on `recalled[0]`'s resolution only, so the arm wrongly abstained whenever a rich answer-bearing seed ranked below a thin/handle trace. fix: abstain only if *no* recalled trace is answer-bearing. result/finding cogmem__8ca5844d

◈ Spend gates as a first-class workflow object

productconversation-only

Working-protocol element: paid judged runs are "outward-facing cost actions" that the autonomous manager stages fully (exact command, scope, estimated cost) but never triggers without the human's go — cost authorization as the one hard human-in-the-loop gate in an otherwise autonomous loop.

cogmem__8ca5844d, cogmem__f96bd487
spend gates as a first-class workflow object working-protocol element: paid judged runs are outward-facing cost actions that the autonomous manager stages fully (exact command, scope, estimated cost) but never triggers without the human's go — cost authorization as the one hard human-in-the-loop gate in an otherwise autonomous loop. product cogmem__8ca5844d, cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ Latent directions must be natural extensions

experiment/benchmark

Case-authoring lesson from run20: over-specific latent directions score ~0 for every arm (nobody derives them); authored latents must be natural extensions a competent ideator would plausibly generate from the stored angles — the axis measures derivability, not mind-reading.

cogmem__f96bd487
latent directions must be natural extensions case-authoring lesson from run20: over-specific latent directions score ~0 for every arm (nobody derives them); authored latents must be *natural* extensions a competent ideator would plausibly generate from the stored angles — the axis measures derivability, not mind-reading. experiment/benchmark cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The Windows commit-charge diagnosis

result/findingconversation-only

Practical local-hardware finding: GPU allocations on Windows require host-side commit memory, so a fat WSL2/Docker VM (vmmem at 12.5 GB) blocks model loads even with free VRAM — local-model benchmarking on consumer machines has an OS-level memory-politics dimension.

cogmem__f96bd487
the windows commit-charge diagnosis practical local-hardware finding: gpu allocations on windows require host-side commit memory, so a fat wsl2/docker vm (vmmem at 12.5 gb) blocks model loads even with free vram — local-model benchmarking on consumer machines has an os-level memory-politics dimension. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487 yes

◈ An RTX 3070 is enough (reachable-hardware sizing)

product

Deliberate scoping of the integration experiments to owned hardware: 1–8B quantized open-weight models run fine on an 8 GB consumer GPU, so the state-fold experiment is designed for exactly that class — the proof-of-working program "sized for Porto Alegre rather than for a lab."

cogmem__f96bd487
an rtx 3070 is enough (reachable-hardware sizing) deliberate scoping of the integration experiments to owned hardware: 1–8b quantized open-weight models run fine on an 8 gb consumer gpu, so the state-fold experiment is designed for exactly that class — the proof-of-working program sized for porto alegre rather than for a lab. product cogmem__f96bd487

◈ local/<name> model routing scheme

mechanism

Harness mechanism: a model name of the form local/<name> routes to any OpenAI-compatible local endpoint (Ollama /v1 by default, llama-server identically) with no new dependencies — the entire harness, metrics, and scorecards unchanged; only the client base_url differs.

cogmem__aaadd82b
local/<name> model routing scheme harness mechanism: a model name of the form `local/<name>` routes to any openai-compatible local endpoint (ollama /v1 by default, llama-server identically) with no new dependencies — the entire harness, metrics, and scorecards unchanged; only the client base_url differs. mechanism cogmem__aaadd82b

◈ Scorecard-side M4 fallback for judge-off runs

mechanism

Mechanism preserving metric comparability: when a run was executed judge-off (the local-transition path), the prior scorecard computes with-memory correctness itself using the trusted API judge per seed output, tagging rows with m4_source: scorecard vs harness so provenance of the metric itself is recorded.

cogmem__aaadd82b
scorecard-side m4 fallback for judge-off runs mechanism preserving metric comparability: when a run was executed judge-off (the local-transition path), the prior scorecard computes with-memory correctness itself using the trusted api judge per seed output, tagging rows with `m4_source: scorecard` vs `harness` so provenance of the metric itself is recorded. mechanism cogmem__aaadd82b

◈ Quarantine, don't delete (Phase-2 contraband handling)

mechanism

API-hygiene decision: the day-one Phase-2 modules (compressor, credibility bands/drift, recursive self-indexed system) — unmeasured and contradicting the phase gate — are removed from the public exports but remain importable as lab internals, with the quarantine reasons written into the package docstring as a dated comment.

cogmem__812a03fc, cogmem__f96bd487
quarantine, don't delete (phase-2 contraband handling) api-hygiene decision: the day-one phase-2 modules (compressor, credibility bands/drift, recursive self-indexed system) — unmeasured and contradicting the phase gate — are removed from the public exports but remain importable as lab internals, with the quarantine reasons written into the package docstring as a dated comment. mechanism cogmem__812a03fc, cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The persona-decoherence blog as convergent external evidence

result/finding

Treatment of the found blog report (LLM personas becoming "formless piles of surface-level reflexes... unrelated shards burned in by diverse training pressures, lacking any shared core"): logged as independent evidence converging with the inscription invariant from a direction the project never looked, stamped retrieved with credibility unassigned.

cogmem__f96bd487
the persona-decoherence blog as convergent external evidence treatment of the found blog report (llm personas becoming formless piles of surface-level reflexes... unrelated shards burned in by diverse training pressures, lacking any shared core ): logged as independent evidence converging with the inscription invariant from a direction the project never looked, stamped `retrieved` with credibility unassigned. result/finding cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Trust-the-character vs trust-the-network

framing/ontology

Distinction absorbed from the blog input: what people trust in a model is the character (well-defined, legible, predictable — "would X do Y?" answerable), not the neural network bearing its name — and newer models' characters have decohered into unpredictability. This becomes the operational definition behind check C2.

cogmem__f96bd487
trust-the-character vs trust-the-network distinction absorbed from the blog input: what people trust in a model is the *character* (well-defined, legible, predictable — would x do y? answerable), not the neural network bearing its name — and newer models' characters have decohered into unpredictability. this becomes the operational definition behind check c2. framing/ontology cogmem__f96bd487

◈ Diego's unsourced-data coherence-loss reading

open-question

Diego's own compressed causal reading of the blog: "it seems LLMs end up losing coherence as the unsourced training data increases" — coherence loss as a monotone function of unsourced inscription volume.

cogmem__f96bd487
"LLMs end up losing coherence as the unsourced training data increases."
diego's unsourced-data coherence-loss reading diego's own compressed causal reading of the blog: it seems llms end up losing coherence as the unsourced training data increases — coherence loss as a monotone function of unsourced inscription volume. open-question cogmem__f96bd487 llms end up losing coherence as the unsourced training data increases.

◈ The G_sequence probe family caveat (addressing vs routing)

open-question

Honest scope note recorded with the check #2 win: the cues are explicitly sequential ("after step 3, what comes next?") — the axis tests the addressing mechanism, not when-to-use-it. A benchmark can validate a mechanism while leaving its dispatch policy untested.

cogmem__f96bd487
the g_sequence probe family caveat (addressing vs routing) honest scope note recorded with the check #2 win: the cues are explicitly sequential ( after step 3, what comes next? ) — the axis tests the *addressing mechanism*, not when-to-use-it. a benchmark can validate a mechanism while leaving its dispatch policy untested. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ One-hop honesty (recursion depth untested)

open-question

Scope note on check #1: one re-cue hop suffices on the authored cases; deeper chains are untested — the recursive claim is validated at depth 1 only.

cogmem__f96bd487
one-hop honesty (recursion depth untested) scope note on check #1: one re-cue hop suffices on the authored cases; deeper chains are untested — the recursive claim is validated at depth 1 only. open-question cogmem__f96bd487

◈ The espresso/runbook/incident case template

experiment/benchmark

The concrete authoring pattern for sequence cases: everyday chained procedures (deploy runbook, espresso recipe, onboarding checklist, lab assay, trip itinerary, incident drill) with same-template foreign distractors ("Staging runbook step 3…", "Madrid trip plan, leg 3…") engineered to outrank the true successor in cosine space.

cogmem__7b202ef8
the espresso/runbook/incident case template the concrete authoring pattern for sequence cases: everyday chained procedures (deploy runbook, espresso recipe, onboarding checklist, lab assay, trip itinerary, incident drill) with same-template foreign distractors ( staging runbook step 3… , madrid trip plan, leg 3… ) engineered to outrank the true successor in cosine space. experiment/benchmark cogmem__7b202ef8

◈ Opaque handles as the iterative link

experiment/benchmark

The H_iterative authoring pattern: the bridge and target share only an opaque identifier (ticket PRC-4417, invoice INV-2208, sample WQ-552, tracking TRK-88210, booking RSV-7719, issue BUG-3041) — semantically inert tokens that carry no cosine similarity to the question, so only content re-cueing crosses them.

cogmem__f2088e2a
